name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Patriot,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Patriot, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59734742:JJlsA5E5N:m:1:3299561967:7C2F3F2706B6DFB15B5D8EA538A735D6:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---

| Patriot, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59734743:JJlsA5E5N:m:1:3299561967:7C2F3F2706B6DFB15B5D8EA538A735D6:r "Please click here to donate now")**

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014. As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort. By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration. During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future. Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart. As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win. I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear. In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail. Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win. So I will humbly ask, Patriot, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA. | | | "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON" Thank you, Ron Johnson | | | | | Patriot, It's Ron Johnson. I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate. I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster. This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to SAVE AMERICA from the Democrats. "Please click here to donate now"** | | | "SAVE THE SENATE" | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc. PO Box 1159 Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159 Text RonJon to 47682 for mobile alerts! If you would prefer to donate by mail, please send your contribution to the following address. RON JOHNSON FOR SENATE, INC. subject: Please send in all the signatures you have collected!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Peter,

It has been amazing to see so many people all over Idaho collecting signatures for my run for governor. Thank you!If you have signatures in any stage please send them to the campaign headquarters immediately. Overnight them or bring them by if you can. If you need reimbursement let us know. We need all the signatures here in Emmett ASAP.**By Mail:** P.O. BOX 370
**Drop Off:** 800 East Locust St.
Emmett, Idaho 83617We are very confident that we have the signatures needed to meet the requirement. However, we must turn them all into the Secretary of State early next week with time to resolve any challenges.Once again we have shown the naysayers that when we work together we can accomplish whatever the task may be. It is because of you that I am able to run for the office of governor. Idahoans, old and new, are amazing and I am more certain than ever that we will do whatever it takes to maintain liberty here in this beautiful land we call Idaho.Thank you,Ammon Bundy

Fair Fight Action’s founder, Stacey Abrams, said it best when she stated that “Georgia Republicans’ shameful efforts to suppress the vote and seize electoral power through SB 202 demonstrate how critical the fight for voting rights remains.” [**Can you please join us in this critical work, and help us continue to fight by supporting our work with a donation of $10, $25 or $50 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42547373/333388760/402066511?refcode=342022&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzE3ZGY3NS1jNTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8el1lUNzCOrI_YZx70ydmWImJ3OFQCa03nQ2TyvQYPo=) One year later, our founder’s words remain urgent. And as elections approach once more, we’re relaunching PeachVote.com to make sure you have all the information you need. name: Congressman Carlos Gimenez
subject: I’m embarrassed to have Joe Biden as president
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARLOS GIMENEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
The State of Biden’s Presidency: INCOMPETENCE
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4dlhi4qdlqvoh18vemsjgs6997a3mc9f99qhke0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uerb6olicgor5d9jepi66phieqqmeo31eaq31dj6eerbdd3m6err1pph6aoe9dpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchmcoqmecr1cup34phim2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cdgm0oj1c9ie49fg)
Fellow Patriot, In a failed attempt to spin the first year of his presidency as a success, the world once again got a glimpse at the total incompetence of Joe Biden.

❌ The economy ❌ The southern border crisis ❌ The withdrawal from Afghanistan ❌ Putting America last ❌ The supply chain crisis ❌ Skyrocketing inflation ❌ Eliminated America’s energy independence ❌ Caving to the woke mob ❌ Kowtowing to communist China ❌ Letting Putin run wild **The only thing Joe Biden has been successful at is destroying our country.** [**HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqp4laq2jmr3hurqjlrt3uao7rtmsup09slhjj9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5g64ob2cjh2bs) If we want to put an end to this disaster and hold Joe Biden accountable, we are going to have to **FLIP THE HOUSE** in 2022. Right now, Joe Biden’s socialist agenda is unchecked and emboldened by the radicals in control of the House and Senate. **Before we can kick Joe out of the White House in 2024, we have to reclaim the republican majority in Congress in 2022.** [**HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvptpr55ru199mo5rcjfpkq4ebmiknnqa34afg38_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5g64ob2cjh2bs) **[Join my fight to hold Biden accountable for his countless failures, and flip the House before midnight tonight!>>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfke7neam4fokae1tgten2efvlocadj6uighrg08_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5g64ob2cjh2bs)** Thank you for joining me, Congressman Carlos Gimenez [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zup8m9kfd4r5ppla3la4uikd8c3147nhum81m7ig_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5g64ob2cjh2bs) >From Cuba to Congress, Carlos Gimenez is the American Dream personified. As a child, Carlos and his family fled Cuba following the communist revolution. Now, Carlos is fighting in Congress to ensure that his children and grandchildren are never forced to make the same decision.
Carlos Gimenez is a steadfast fighter for freedom and conserving the American way of life. Support his mission **[HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zokf2i1jkq5s8i2fts4jdipjg9266jbeb0bgs668_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5g64ob2cjh2bs)**. [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf42qit6ho75pa5263fkpriemvq34d06k5rpofao_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5g64ob2cjh2bs) PAID FOR BY CARLOS GIMENEZ FOR CONGRESS

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.

| | | **URGENT: PLATINUM MEMBERSHIP OFFER EXPIRED **
We can’t tell you enough how much we appreciate you standing by House Republicans' side these last few years. Your constant support has brought us extremely close to winning back the House in 2022. That's why we were SHOCKED when we saw this!

And we hate to bring you bad news but....

The deadline to upgrade your membership to platinum has passed!

We have good news though!

We spoke with House Republican Leaders and because you have stood beside us for so long, they were willing to extend the deadline one more time just for you!

**[This is an exclusive offer. You must act before midnight if you want to upgrade your membership to PLATINUM>>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3m943-21d1c-4qqlpo2/ "This is an exclusive offer. You must act before midnight if you want to upgrade your membership to PLATINUM>>>>")**

---

This is very exciting news! You still have the chance to be a part of our most exclusive membership tier yet!

This platinum tier will be essential in the fight to take back the House and Fire Nancy Pelosi in November.

We know that you never shy down from a fight, that's why we reached out to you specifically! Because House Republicans are ready to win this fight and take back the Majority in 2022.

Are you ready to join us by upgrading your membership to platinum? Or will you sit on the sidelines as House Republicans make history?

**[Answer the call and upgrade your membership to platinum before 11:59pm tonight to join the fight and take back the House in 2022!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3m943-21d1e-4qqlpo4/ "Answer the call and upgrade your membership to platinum before 11:59pm tonight to join the fight and take back the House in 2022!")**

Thank you,

Platinum Membership Services (via House GOP)
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3m943-21d1f-4qqlpo5/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3m943-21d1g-4qqlpo6/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59733704:JU2W15E-N:m:1:3317145305:DE1681F519B7FBCF843EC193A52DA697:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59733705:JU2W15E-N:m:1:3317145305:DE1681F519B7FBCF843EC193A52DA697:r)
---
| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59733705:JU2W15E-N:m:1:3317145305:DE1681F519B7FBCF843EC193A52DA697:r "Please click here to donate now")**

subject: I'm coming to you personally, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
still falling short
| | |
---
Apologies for dropping into your inbox again, but I have some bad news: As of 9 a.m., I'm still falling short of my daily fundraising goal. So I'm coming to you personally, friend:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42550795/333401773/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2489-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDMzMzY0NC1jODliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jbZl3KLfBgg9mDoiJb5sl9kjD0rqkNUDDa6xIwCCfrQ=)

Our race for North Carolina’s open Senate seat could hardly be any closer. The latest polling shows me in a statistical tie with my Republican opponents. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42554457/333417567/-59309968?refcode=20220304_CB_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGQxOTM0Ny1jZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TbOP2Zx78TJbnNIErLJmx8WN4cCn6rLxy7lxhl-8R5Y=) Look, this is going to be so, so close, and it is so important that we do all we can to win. Flipping North Carolina’s Senate seat would be transformative. [**If you can, please split a $25 donation between our campaign and Seth Moulton today so we can reach more voters and win. We can change what is possible in the U.S. Senate by flipping this seat and expanding our majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42554458/333417568/-59309968?refcode=20220304_CB_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGQxOTM0Ny1jZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TbOP2Zx78TJbnNIErLJmx8WN4cCn6rLxy7lxhl-8R5Y=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42554459/333417569/-477674924?refcode=20220304_CB_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGQxOTM0Ny1jZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TbOP2Zx78TJbnNIErLJmx8WN4cCn6rLxy7lxhl-8R5Y=)
North Carolina is a purple state, and we know that our elections are usually very close. And when I say this race could come down to a handful of votes, it’s because I’ve seen it happen. It happened to me, in fact. My race for Chief Justice was decided by just 401 votes. Out of 5,391,501 votes. In a race where I earned more votes than almost every Democrat on the ticket — including President Biden. The latest polling is showing we could be in for just as close of a race, so we cannot afford to take anything for granted here. That’s why I’m asking: [**Will you split a $25 donation between our campaign to flip North Carolina’s open Senate seat and Seth Moulton today? There’s no doubt in my mind that every dollar will make a difference when the votes are counted.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42554460/333417570/-59309968?refcode=20220304_CB_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGQxOTM0Ny1jZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TbOP2Zx78TJbnNIErLJmx8WN4cCn6rLxy7lxhl-8R5Y=) In a race that could come down to such a narrow margin, this is why we have to work even harder. What we each do can truly make a difference. \- Cheri Beasley

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59735686:JU9My5EpN:m:1:3298722022:936408B2246469EBB61ECEFCDCB1E564:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59735687:JU9My5EpN:m:1:3298722022:936408B2246469EBB61ECEFCDCB1E564:r)
---
| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59735687:JU9My5EpN:m:1:3298722022:936408B2246469EBB61ECEFCDCB1E564:r "Please click here to donate now")**

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Folks need relief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
The American people need relief from the high price of prescription medications. Our families need help accessing affordable, quality child care for every child who needs it. I was so glad to hear President Biden address struggles impacting so many Marylanders during his State of the Union Address.
But we can’t stop there, friends.
Every one of us -- no matter what neighborhood we live in or how it rates on the priorities of big corporations -- should have access to healthy, nutritious food.
Meanwhile, inflation has a disproportionate impact on low-income workers as well as Black families and Black business owners. So while we are focused on solving the wealth gap, we must take into account the intersection of systemic racism and do all we can to tackle that as well.
Folks, I believe our government must do more to make necessities like prescription drugs, child care, and healthy food affordable and accessible for every American, regardless of our zip code or background.
Will you let me know if you agree? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FXj044grWUap06W-ArUmfw2?contactdata=lb95uUvrFonL0NeLUpoBMw8svXt%2BVvhrLHyjXP3VYF73CxlbBsKjQhm2b4pPnxx6lYyPgCtXnO0InPRQ0tnqw2A05JENnAnsRPE%2BcP642mnNR%2FLWO2vSLH1rtOPheWBlPt%2B5hKQvcO0nR0I4P6gK5nL0zJtiDACwyesAhG68AzY%3D&refcode2=body_link]
ONE-QUESTION POLL
Our government must do more to make sure prescription drugs, child care, and healthy food are affordable and accessible for all Americans.
YES » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FXj044grWUap06W-ArUmfw2?contactdata=lb95uUvrFonL0NeLUpoBMw8svXt%2BVvhrLHyjXP3VYF73CxlbBsKjQhm2b4pPnxx6lYyPgCtXnO0InPRQ0tnqw2A05JENnAnsRPE%2BcP642mnNR%2FLWO2vSLH1rtOPheWBlPt%2B5hKQvcO0nR0I4P6gK5nL0zJtiDACwyesAhG68AzY%3D&refcode2=body_btnYES] NO » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FXj044grWUap06W-ArUmfw2?contactdata=lb95uUvrFonL0NeLUpoBMw8svXt%2BVvhrLHyjXP3VYF73CxlbBsKjQhm2b4pPnxx6lYyPgCtXnO0InPRQ0tnqw2A05JENnAnsRPE%2BcP642mnNR%2FLWO2vSLH1rtOPheWBlPt%2B5hKQvcO0nR0I4P6gK5nL0zJtiDACwyesAhG68AzY%3D&refcode2=body_btnNO]
We can’t afford to wait years or decades for progress we can make now. That’s why I’m running for Congress, and I know that if we work together, we can win this critical open seat for the people.
Change can’t wait,
Jazz
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
Friends of Jazz Lewis
P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States

name: Kyle Rittenhouse
subject: Time to hold the corrupt media accountable
body:
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59735072:J6s4C5ENX:m:1:3317145305:DF5FF7F4DD5F7B180446FF9D715C6527:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

Last year I was vindicated in the court of law, and while I'll be forever grateful for my freedom, **deep corruption in our media was exposed** for all to see.

Now that I'm free, I will ensure it does not go unanswered.

**It's time to hold the media accountable in court** for their malicious lies and slander, and their attempts to tear this nation apart and destroy my life.

To do so, **I'm excited to share the launch of The Media Accountability Project**, which will serve as the official fundraising vehicle for the coming wave of defamation lawsuits against the worst offenders in our activist media.

**[Please watch the short launch video here, and become a FOUNDING DONOR by making the largest donation you can afford.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59735072:J6s4C5ENX:m:1:3317145305:DF5FF7F4DD5F7B180446FF9D715C6527:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59735072:J6s4C5ENX:m:1:3317145305:DF5FF7F4DD5F7B180446FF9D715C6527:r)
|
---
Without the support of people all across America, I fully believe I'd be sitting in prison today. It was their generosity which gave me a fighting chance.

Now, as I seek to restore my name and reputation and ensure that the propagandists in our media pay a price for their vicious dishonesty, I hope that I can count on that support once again.

After all, this is not just about me. It's about holding one of our most powerful institutions accountable for seeking to play judge, jury and executioner with everyday citizens who have very limited means to punch back.

There's a ton of work to do, but right now, the number one job is to raise the resources necessary to launch a massive wave of defamation litigation, and win.

**[So please watch the launch video, and become a FOUNDING DONOR by supporting The Media Accountability Project with a donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59735072:J6s4C5ENX:m:1:3317145305:DF5FF7F4DD5F7B180446FF9D715C6527:r)**

Sincerely,

Kyle Rittenhouse
|
---

This week, a new Marquette Law School Poll showed that Ron Johnson sits at a record low net favorability rating of -12. **Only 33% of Wisconsinites say they approved of the job he was doing, while 45% say they disapprove.**

He promised to stand up to the Chinese government. Instead, he led the charge to kill the U.S. Innovation and Competition Act, a landmark piece of legislation to hold China accountable.

name: Beth Kloser
subject: What we achieved in Texas, together
body:
| | | We made our voices heard during the 2022 Texas primary. Volunteer with us to grow this momentum toward the upcoming general election.
---
| [Volunteer](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42564546/333431483/926710363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2M1ZjcxZi1kNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yzxxwzC6YEsBNtJegnP1s25X_1su-WTq5myjB58y_sQ=&emci=a4451650-129b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5cc5f71f-d49b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
This primary season, y’all showed up for Texas, and I can’t thank you enough. I know I speak for all of us here at NextGen America when I say how proud I am of all of our organizers, volunteers, and voters across the state.
What we achieved together in Texas is nothing short of historic. Our month of statewide outreach represents **one of the largest youth-focused voter mobilization campaigns in Texas primary history.**
Here’s how we did it:
* **Contacted a total of 2,259,081 million young voters** in Texas through texts, calls, and in-person contacts throughout February;
* **Hosted nearly 50 events across the state** from the start of early voting on February 14;
* **1764 volunteer shifts completed** online or offline by volunteers across the country;
* **Connected with voters in all 254 Texas counties** and 2,273 different zip codes.

Without you, none of this would have been possible.
When we look at these primary efforts, there’s no doubt that young voters are shaping the future of our state. And by making these on-the-ground connections with millions of young voters, we’re laying the groundwork for youth participation in the 2022 general elections, and all elections to come.
**By working together, we’re empowering voters for generations to come.**
[**Sign up to volunteer with us to keep this historic momentum growing as we head into the 2022 general election.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42564547/333431484/-639373578?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2M1ZjcxZi1kNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yzxxwzC6YEsBNtJegnP1s25X_1su-WTq5myjB58y_sQ=&emci=a4451650-129b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=5cc5f71f-d49b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6787172)

Beth Kloser

clean_body: | | | We made our voices heard during the 2022 Texas primary. Volunteer with us to grow this momentum toward the upcoming general election. | | | Friend, This primary season, y’all showed up for Texas, and I can’t thank you enough. I know I speak for all of us here at NextGen America when I say how proud I am of all of our organizers, volunteers, and voters across the state. What we achieved together in Texas is nothing short of historic. Our month of statewide outreach represents one of the largest youth-focused voter mobilization campaigns in Texas primary history. Here’s how we did it: Contacted a total of 2,259,081 million young voters in Texas through texts, calls, and in-person contacts throughout February; Hosted nearly 50 events across the state from the start of early voting on February 14; 1764 volunteer shifts completed online or offline by volunteers across the country; Connected with voters in all 254 Texas counties and 2,273 different zip codes. Without you, none of this would have been possible. When we look at these primary efforts, there’s no doubt that young voters are shaping the future of our state. And by making these on-the-ground connections with millions of young voters, we’re laying the groundwork for youth participation in the 2022 general elections, and all elections to come. By working together, we’re empowering voters for generations to come. "CTA Button" Thank you, Beth Kloser Texas State Director NextGen Texas | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

name: Steven Olikara
subject: I'm the only UW Badger in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
Image of Olikara campaign logo with photo of Steven Olikara and link to campaign website:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/OfS%20logo%20w%20headshot.png]
[https://www.stevenolikara.com]

Dear Peter,

Last week I was glad to be back on campus at UW-Madison, my alma mater, to participate in a U.S. Senate candidate forum hosted by the UW College Democrats and the Wisconsin Union Directorate Society and Politics. I benefited immensely from attending Wisconsin public schools. I’m proud to be the only UW-Madison graduate running for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin.

Photo of Steven Olikara behind a podium speaking at the U.S. Senate candidate forum on Feb . 25, 2022 with link to campaign donation page:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Margaret/UW_Dems_Forum_1.jpg]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0304email]

UW-Madison is where I found my calling in politics. I was the first Environmental Studies major – in fact, I helped create the major. As I was getting involved with environmental issues, I quickly realized our politics are broken. I’m running for the U.S. Senate because we need to fundamentally change the business model of politics so that we can take on the generational challenges we face, like the climate crisis.

As I told those in attendance at last week’s forum, my first piece of legislation as your U.S. Senator would be aimed at getting big money out of politics so members of Congress are motivated to collaborate and get things done. Pundits say that good governance isn’t interesting to voters, but UW students and hundreds more supporters across the state disagree. We know that radical bridgebuilding is necessary to actually pass legislation on the biggest challenges we face.

Photo of Steven Olikara talking to U.W. students with link to campaign donation page:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Margaret/Speaking_with_UW_Students.jpg]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0304email]

This may sound like idealism, but we’ve been doing it for nearly a decade. I have the most extensive federal legislative experience of any candidate in this race. I know I can get this legislation passed because I have a track record of successfully bringing people together across political, racial, and cultural divides. I founded the Millennial Action Project with the aim of building a bipartisan Congressional caucus of young elected leaders. Today, over 2,000 members of Congress and state legislators have joined this movement. We’ve introduced over 200 bills - 31 of which have become law.

Our campaign is about electing a candidate who can execute on their ideas. Someone who can translate ideas into concrete legislative action. Please donate to our campaign so we can put our plans into action and make life better for millions of Wisconsinites. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0304email]

Thank you,
Steven

Still shot of Steven Olikara speaking at U.S. Senate candidate forum with link to video:
[https://youtu.be/3BeAJpr7cZE]

This is a movement to build a more inclusive, honest, and kind form of politics, and we need your help to continue reaching more voters in Wisconsin.

Button that says,"DONATE NOW" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0218email]

Facebook logo with link to Steven Olikara's Facebook profile: [https://www.facebook.com/olikaraforsenate]
Twitter logo with link to Steven Olikara's Twitter profile: [https://twitter.com/stevenolikara]
Instagram logo with link to Steven Olikara's Instagram profile: [https://www.instagram.com/stevenolikara/]
TikTok logo with link to Steven Olikara's TikTok profile: [https://www.tiktok.com/@stevenolikara]

Paid for by Olikara for Senate
P.O. Box 510216
Milwaukee, WI 53203
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/dd80084e-589b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/b1d6e769-d49b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDgwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWQ2ZTc2OS1kNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wbHlZLp9INjUgVlNgXeuSiu4pQ8ZcXlw9LbFBk92Sd4=&id=130029555 .

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: critical moment for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I know we can win this seat and keep the Senate blue
| | |
---
Friend – my team gave me some urgent news that I need to share with you.
**Political experts reported that New Hampshire is now a toss-up.** This is urgent: If I lose, Democrats will lose the Senate majority.
Extreme GOP groups have already spent over $7.5 million attacking me, and polls are showing that this race will be tight. But folks, this news is going to invite even more dark money into New Hampshire as Mitch McConnell tries to unseat me and flip the Senate red.
This is a critical moment in the campaign. New Hampshire could very well determine control of the Senate, so we need to act now to turn this around.
I know we can win this seat and keep the Senate blue – I've won tough races before – but it's going to take a grassroots effort.
**[So I have to ask: Can you give $5 or more today? The full force of the GOP's war chest is coming for New Hampshire, and I urgently need your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42565985/333438311/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk747-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMzNWFlZS1kNjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bRMIsgDXYQc1ULqtE676axNy6SHgW972S03CrTZHoK8=)**

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: March forth!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/cjRu8LmJbF1wqSCjcT0eavuu4vuYf3PyUImdYOvFLyI=/C0OiPjofsRF0sjio9b3rLIsYCqBcQTd9Bd01rG_A9rs=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220304-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

Happy March 4th - the only day of the year that's also a call to action!

**And more importantly, it 's my youngest daughter, Catherine's, birthday!**

Today, before we celebrate with cake and candles, I'm reflecting on the importance of our march towards a better future for my daughter and all children in VA-07.

In Congress, we are working hard to deliver results for our community. The historic infrastructure package the House passed will help Virginia increase our climate resiliency - paving the way for a greener, healthier future for our planet and for generations to come. I'm leading the charge to ban members of Congress from buying, selling, or trading stocks - affirming public trust and removing even the perception of impropriety.

And in the months ahead, we will march forth towards a brighter future for all Americans. There are many lingering challenges we face as a country, **and I 'm eager to tackle them each day in Congress.**

[_**I hope that I can continue to count on your support for all the work that I do and that we 'll march forth together.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/cjRu8LmJbF1wqSCjcT0eavuu4vuYf3PyUImdYOvFLyI=/C0OiPjofsRF0sjio9b3rLIsYCqBcQTd9Bd01rG_A9rs=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220304-1-EM&amount=25)

Abigail

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42566923/333442799/-1832414505?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220304reasons_TH_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDI0NjRkYS1kYjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PWe1Rdmqlr_zWanfU_dtigTUngUAiiFq-OnS3TyPVnA=)

Hi there, Being a combat veteran overseas and graduating as the only woman in her Apache helicopter class, Ashley knows how to defeat the odds stacked against her. Unlike Fitzpatrick, she will get the job done for working families and fight for good-paying jobs, mental health services, substance abuse treatment, affordable education, and so much more. [**Will you pitch in $10 to help us prepare for the upcoming May primary?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42566925/333442800/-1832414505?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220304reasons_TH_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDI0NjRkYS1kYjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PWe1Rdmqlr_zWanfU_dtigTUngUAiiFq-OnS3TyPVnA=) Before we continue, we want to share three reasons why Ashley is the leader we need for PA-01:
* **Ashley will not cozy up to lobbyists: **Unlike Fitzpatrick, Ashley is focused on our communities and will fight to prioritize people over profits.

* **Ashley believes in working hard because nothing worth doing is straightforward:** This grassroots campaign is powered by supporters like you who believe in a leader who isn’t afraid to tackle the tough issues so that every person can thrive — regardless of income, skin color, zip code, or gender identity.

* **Ashley will protect our democracy** : She will do everything she can to protect voting rights from GOP attacks. Ashley will always put people first and fight for the voices of Pennsylvanians.

Thanks to supporters like you, we can flip PA-01 blue and defeat Fitzpatrick. **[But campaigns take significant resources, so we're asking you to pitch in. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59719971:66M-25ENO:m:1:3103520637:A0B09378869ADE85D679C31C379C82F4:r "Biden") Peter, I was hoping President Biden would have used his State of the Union to answer for his awful job performance, to explain how he would fix the many crises he created. But no. Once again, Biden lied THROUGH HIS TEETH! This is the man who campaigned on being the only President who can stop Putin's tyranny. How's that going for Ukraine right now? Isn't it funny how Trump was accused of colluding with Russia, but it's Biden who's proven to be Putin's lapdog? And Biden is the man who said he'd stop COVID if elected, wouldn't mandate vaccines, and would make sure we had enough test kits. **That 's 0 for 3, Joe!** The State of the Union is crystal clear. We are buckling under Biden's failed leadership, our economy is collapsing, and it's all driving our country to the brink of destruction. **[We can't take any more of Biden's epic failures! Help me fight back with your donation of $25, $50, $100 or even $1,000 TODAY!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59719971:66M-25ENO:m:1:3103520637:A0B09378869ADE85D679C31C379C82F4:r "We can’t take any more of Biden’s epic failures! Help me
fight back with your donation of $25, $50, $100 or even $1,000 TODAY!")** I'm Rep. Andy Biggs from the border state of Arizona. As a member of the House Freedom Caucus and Co-Chair of the House Border Security Caucus, I understand that America will never truly be free until America is truly safe and that's why I'm standing up to the Biden administration's dangerous policies every day. There's no time to waste if you want to save our nation from becoming a figment of your imagination. It's why I'm working so hard to be a voice for reason and sanity in the Halls of Congress. I need your help to fight back against Tone-Deaf Joe and the lies he and the left spew. **[But I can't do it without your help. Can I count on you for $500, $250, or $1,000 today?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59719971:66M-25ENO:m:1:3103520637:A0B09378869ADE85D679C31C379C82F4:r "But I can’t do it without your help. Can I count on you for
$500, $250, or $1,000 today?")** Biden's speech was no different than the lies he's spewed since he got elected:
* Our nation's recovery is strong. **LIE**
* Inflation is just temporary. **LIE**
* "I will end COVID." **LIE**
* "We're sending back the vast majority of the (illegal immigrants) that are coming." **LIE**
* He's an expert on Russia and foreign policy. **LIE**
* "We're not about "Defunding (the Police)." **LIE**
* Vaccines won't be mandatory - **LIE**

[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59719971:66M-25ENO:m:1:3103520637:A0B09378869ADE85D679C31C379C82F4:r "Agenda")He and the Left push CRT while lying to our faces that it isn't being taught in our schools. They claim they're addressing illegal immigration while secretly flying illegals all across the country, making it easier for them to evade the law. They cancel people for touting natural immunity or the ineffectiveness of masking... until they see their disastrous polling and suddenly they call off their mask mandates. **[Please act today and help me return America back to a nation of Greatness that our children can enjoy for generations to come.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59719971:66M-25ENO:m:1:3103520637:A0B09378869ADE85D679C31C379C82F4:r "Please act today and help me return America back to a nation of Greatness that our children can enjoy for generations to come.")** **The only thing Biden has done successfully is wreak havoc on America!** While Biden's State of the Union was another example of him bumbling about his fake accomplishments, we still have a real fight in Washington over the future of our freedoms. That's why conservatives like me must be there to battle the lies of the left and put an end to Biden's tyranny, but I can't succeed without your help. **[Do not sit this one out. It's vital you help me keep up the fight for our freedom with your donation TODAY of $50, $100, $1,000 or any amount you can afford from $5 to the Federal Maximum Amount of $2,900.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59719971:66M-25ENO:m:1:3103520637:A0B09378869ADE85D679C31C379C82F4:r "Do not sit this one out. It’s vital you help me keep up
the fight for our freedom with your donation TODAY of $50, $100, $1,000 or any amount you can afford from $5 to the Federal Maximum Amount of $2,900")** Thank you! Keep America Great, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59719971:66M-25ENO:m:1:3103520637:A0B09378869ADE85D679C31C379C82F4:r "Andy Biggs") Andy Biggs

name: Victor Davis Hanson
subject: The decline of American Citizenship
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vse4X8ZHNw

I wish to invite you to enroll in an eight-lecture course that I
prepared with the help and under the auspices of Hillsdale
College. It is called.....
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/ose4X8ZHNw

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

I wish to
invite you to enroll in an eight-lecture course that I prepared
with the help and under the auspices of Hillsdale College. It is
called "American Citizenship and Its Decline," and the online
course is based on my latest book, the recently released The
Dying Citizen.

Like the
book, the course describes the current crises in America as
symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the
autonomy and political influence of the citizen.

The class
describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West,
reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and
the present-given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens
to create and control their own government.

Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle
class-currently shrinking under enormous economic strains.
Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure
a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs,
sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet
borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and
citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational
tribalism-identifying by superficial appearance rather than
through shared culture and values-is returning to America as so
often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot.

These
organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down
stresses such as the growth of a permanent, but unelected,
government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine
judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the
citizen.

In
addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to
change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and
political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the
theory that a new changing and fluid Constitution must match an
always evolving human nature.

Globalism
is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state.
But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented
concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to
supplant American laws and independence with international
organizations and often without the consent of the legislative
branch or the assent of the governed.

The
course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still
have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered
citizenship and return government to the control of citizens.

"American
Citizenship and Its Decline" is free to enroll in, and you can
begin the course today by clicking on the secure link below.

https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/american-citizenship-and-its-decline

Best
wishes,

Victor
Davis Hanson
Wayne &
Marcia Buske Distinguished Fellow in History

Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Hello Friend,
The campaign is holding a virtual Meet & Greet with Victoria Virasingh on Saturday, March 5th from 4PM - 5PM EST. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mandgmar5]
This Meet and Greet will take place over Zoom and is a great opportunity to get to know Victoria and ask her questions in a personal setting, and meet with other like-minded people who care about Virginia's 8th. There is no cost to attend the event so RSVP today.
A Zoom link will be provided upon RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mandgmar5] .

Team Victoria

Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlqfraqq2gghk3um31u9k5t4r80n4bk4uftejibo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i6apr5c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqj6p5n6ji74or2esobbcpncop76c72mdq78s5getgb1o9mmcq64sb7mep64t3n6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6pj3ap5jcgo74tb66hgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z69l7gcoj5rmqkh0lsrogmm8ngherrntnfv6ndo0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i6apr5c1h2bs) [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zp27h229d3tee00f3rkmt381ddekacedv9738870_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i6apr5c1h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvvd7vo5c4cpr0ab9v7ts1q1lfhfld71be9avuh8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i6apr5c1h2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2m8sug15nrog3789t7eba5c4hv88a1a2gpaitv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i6apr5c1h2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

subject: [BREAKING] Roger Stone caught in the act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC

We can't say we're surprised that a guy who has lobbied for preemptive pardons, is known for political sabotage, and has a Nixon tattoo participated in the planning of January 6. **We'll be honest, we don't know what Roger Stone was thinking when he let a whole camera crew follow him around on January 6.** But after denying any involvement in the insurrection for a year, footage has come out that explicitly shows him **coordinating** post-election protests, **conspiring** with a leader of the Oath Keepers (who pleaded guilty a few days ago to seditious conspiracy), and having **open communication** with Trump during the attack.

Though Stone might not be an elected official, treasonous members of Congress and demagogues like Trump let people like him into the inner circles of our government and enabled them to destabilize our democracy. As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: Walz is Afraid to Debate Me, Hides Behind Unions
body:
| Peter -- You read that right, I challenged Tim Walz to a debate and the Establishment didn’t want it to happen. A Union named AFSCME Council 5 put on a forum last night to hear from gubernatorial candidates on Right to Work and other workplace political issues. Only Tim Walz has been accepted to participate in this 'forum' of one. What kind of debate is that? A captive audience spoon fed the ideas of only one person is **NOT** a forum or debate. It is a bad campaign rally. I wanted to change that. Despite claims that this group reached out to our campaign, we received nothing. We reached out and told them that **we want in**! I am not afraid to walk into the lion’s den and go toe to toe with Walz. The man who supported OSHA vaccine mandates to **FIRE** workers now wants to pretend to be their champion? Give me a break! **AFSCME Council 5 Members are saying they want Health Freedom!!** But Tim Walz and his stooges won't even let Health Freedom be part of the discussion. Instead they're focused advancing a political agenda while ignoring the interests of their workers. The absence of gumption among all other GOP candidates shows that they are unwilling to take on Walz when it counts. This organization was given the choice; They could allow a non-politician, grassroots conservative to stand up to Walz or protect the Tyrant and refuse to allow me in. They chose to protect Tim Walz. Walz does not want to debate me because I will call out his corrupt administration and failed policies to his face! If any candidate is unprepared to do just that, they are unprepared to be Governor. This sign of cowardice from Walz and this Union is proof that we need new leadership. It’s going to take a lot of work, time, and money. Our campaign is growing everyday; We are cultivating a coalition of conservatives, libertarians, independents, and disaffected former Democrats. This is the campaign Walz is most afraid of, **and he should be**. **With your support, we will continue to expand the conservative base and win the Endorsement at the State Convention. This is not easy, and this is why we need your help.** Your contribution of [$25, $50, $100, or more](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_is_afraid_to_debate&n=1) will go directly toward our fight for the GOP Endorsement. Yard signs, flyers, events, travel, and other means of spreading the word costs money. With your loyal support we will win the GOP Endorsement and take on Walz in the General Election, with debates that he can’t run away from! Our campaign represents the **Glenn Youngkin** style candidate that can win in our state without sacrificing **ANY** of our principles. This is our race to win as long as we can count on your support and your vote. With your donation, we will Save Minnesota from Tyranny, Career Politicians, Lobbyists/Special Interests, and Big Government. Thank you for your support. | [](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_is_afraid_to_debate&n=2 "DONATE HERE") [DONATE HERE](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_is_afraid_to_debate&n=2)
---
Thank you!
Dr. Neil Shah
Conservative Candidate for Governor
[www.ElectNeil.com](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=5JezZIIJQQrVuUtHI_sfDD1Ub6RYh9Vgrrtgs-Sc8qk&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_is_afraid_to_debate&n=3)
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_is_afraid_to_debate&n=4). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_is_afraid_to_debate&n=5), software for leaders.

name: Fairness Project
subject: making progress on health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
The Affordable Care Act is only helpful to families when they can access the plan’s full benefits, which means removing state-level obstacles to funding and distribution. Enter: The Fairness Project’s Medicaid ballot measure campaigns. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42572115/333464105/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjVhMTBjYy1lODliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wZLeeTdDE2eng4opbNwmN1stjJWauSCpPkmkKXst-Mo=&emci=34c47a99-309b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=f25a10cc-e89b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=561582) | Team, The Affordable Care Act, strengthened by efforts at the local level to expand Medicaid, has grown and improved _significantly_ over the past few years. The effect has been especially pronounced within Black communities, who have been historically marginalized in our medical system: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42572116/333464106/-338586715?refcode=E14330-20220304-ACASuccess-graphic-Healthcare-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjVhMTBjYy1lODliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wZLeeTdDE2eng4opbNwmN1stjJWauSCpPkmkKXst-Mo=) **Of course, progress shouldn’t stop here.** The Affordable Care Act is only helpful to families when they can access the plan’s _full_ benefits, which means removing state-level obstacles to funding and distribution. **Enter: The Fairness Project’s Medicaid ballot measure campaigns.** We have a tried-and-true plan for putting Medicaid expansion on the ballot and winning vital health care expansions. body:
Amanda is the only candidate who's been inside the heart of the Pentagon when our nation was under attack. | [](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=c0b5adce31164d4ba5c8748249e1bd24&_e=Bzxl1PByB3jn7LlRAH2-mWwsazTwoo_5T-GpIOYyhxobBCzQdhU44A4CXN4UxuUyBdygwbCaJE5whDxZWUxi2ZplCeFl0ug4x55X-VE_D_R6xt-1f-a-rS6uHJfnL5ZEqadBEsc-ABWUeUGNi3Tl2h5A3-yv8KQc_qMWrPDDcZtHt4JAua3ufZHuo1jY6g2BKo3vDpQqx7LjjIQ7oy9LnaBVNtdYqGyxkXsu6k8Lsf_7oQIQ9q2OfeTMbMT3nN6HNccxOiCzFqZu48l3vsk-nGkQNTSPLQ-zMW9Zz11X7DoWfMGnGd6ftSR1J5wD-gCfaEFuR24HQtanTPlpA85ZVmL3qPEFxoOozOXEKGO5TMynbVl3Dug5e2QhKywzeDo0fiVqpAssPAX_acKKEzRM8oQ5Kfp9gMJ_d_yb2gnkcQWqSWtmz6hG4NShXcG3S40h)

Peter -

Six weeks before the September 11th attack on the United States, I was appointed to serve as the first Native American General Counsel of the Army.

**In the weeks following September 11 th, Amanda Makki was appointed to work alongside me. During one of the most crucial times in America, Amanda was a vital part of the defense of our nation.**

Now Amanda is running for Congress in Florida's 13th Congressional District. She is the only candidate with first-hand experience making tough decisions in defense of our nation and the only candidate who has what it takes to stand up for our men and women in uniform as they fight for our freedom

[** ****STAND WITH AMANDA > > DEFEAT CRT**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=c0b5adce31164d4ba5c8748249e1bd24&_e=Bzxl1PByB3jn7LlRAH2-mWwsazTwoo_5T-GpIOYyhxobBCzQdhU44A4CXN4UxuUyBdygwbCaJE5whDxZWUxi2ZplCeFl0ug4x55X-VE_D_R6xt-1f-a-rS6uHJfnL5ZEqadBEsc-ABWUeUGNi3Tl2h5A3-yv8KQc_qMWrPDDcZtHt4JAua3ufZHuo1jY6g2BKo3vDpQqx7LjjIQ7oy9LnaBVNtdYqGyxkXsu6k8Lsf_ZW-uckWwgVEKSinN_lQ-su5RbMXZw2Qg4ukVnWoSFDUaEY4vjUILnyb_c_N4XkgKDNkBDhj3ouIHMGCy5c4CIXig96emRbQBIQKdcE4mbBYXkqmyXcgoFT5sS8976s--lqcvejRTNPKgxA6c-mM72SUjRQI4mSW30RvQkQ9U5CBtmJfl-riyNIPJbMzx39sXcSS2ALuN5QnVGzdVka31G)
**Having served in the Army for ten years, I can tell you that critical race theory, with its Marxist origins, has no place on the training schedule.** Every minute spent on training CRT and its related nonsense is a minute taken away from teaching lethal warrior skills to our service members. Skills that help them defeat the enemy and survive when under attack.

Amanda knows that to ensure our military is prepared to defend our nation, we shouldn't waste precious training time teaching our Soldiers, Sailors, Airmen, and Marines CRT. **It does nothing to help them carry out their mission of protecting our nation and defeating the enemy!**

[** ****STAND WITH AMANDA > > DEFEAT CRT **](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=c0b5adce31164d4ba5c8748249e1bd24&_e=Bzxl1PByB3jn7LlRAH2-mWwsazTwoo_5T-GpIOYyhxobBCzQdhU44A4CXN4UxuUyBdygwbCaJE5whDxZWUxi2ZplCeFl0ug4x55X-VE_D_R6xt-1f-a-rS6uHJfnL5ZEqadBEsc-ABWUeUGNi3Tl2h5A3-yv8KQc_qMWrPDDcZtHt4JAua3ufZHuo1jY6g2BKo3vDpQqx7LjjIQ7oy9LnaBVNtdYqGyxkXsu6k8Lsf8bkLSk--e5FeJhHUr3lBC2klCNUhwOkoMKH964i-pxm16guILmKNl19tj56xertujPy7ODbiDIVV0QkYmNtwKIU2ysPzCOO3fKwyQJvWHNkTOphP4LQMJtsby9o80PexAbXWK-Dhr7bqKZ1nRVa4q1oayzmWYVxmdQFvw2Mc9Ysu2nz39T6pJAa6gd1xdNda7f2Vk9xyINViLof9K8YvEi)
[**Peter, I'm asking you to join me today in support of Amanda Makki. She is the best choice for FL-13 and will go toe to toe with House Democrats to defend our nation and our military from CRT and other toxic political ideologies.**](http://links.amandamakkiforcongress.com/u/click?_t=8965a0767ffa477684a41cb5767552cd&_m=c0b5adce31164d4ba5c8748249e1bd24&_e=Bzxl1PByB3jn7LlRAH2-mWwsazTwoo_5T-GpIOYyhxobBCzQdhU44A4CXN4UxuUyBdygwbCaJE5whDxZWUxi2ZplCeFl0ug4x55X-VE_D_R6xt-1f-a-rS6uHJfnL5ZEqadBEsc-ABWUeUGNi3Tl2h5A3-yv8KQc_qMWrPDDcZtHt4JAua3ufZHuo1jY6g2BKo3vDpQqx7LjjIQ7oy9LnaBVNtdYqGyxkXsu6k8Lsf92Ccl3PvXvsP4Hl49Ula1KLEirZuRT8a2rD0WuAd17c2EnpoCZuUi4djTI0Vwwx3djatK1FiAPMTzOXYybGmtnyD4vKBHv6m8KUFct0LawKCM6L4IC0LIK9t9H-1r0zyAW2C9ETv_fl0cW1_oaYjaurkAeLa6XBpblT6_8UPPxbFyDtYx58yhvLHHiONLxoTFD-KPn3gCvn3aAJmxEHwQs)

Thank you,

Steven J. Morello
Former General Counsel of the U.S. Army (2001-2004)

A legal immigrant, attorney, and conservative national commentator, Amanda is a strong conservative with a proven record of fighting for the values and principles that made America the greatest country in the world! **A SPECIAL NOTE FROM MIKE POMPEO**

I would like to make you aware of a Cozzens for Congress event hosted by Twin Barns Brewing in Meredith, NH on March 22nd. The event runs from 5:00 -7:00 PM.

Jeff
