name: Jessica Cisneros
subject: Allow me to explain.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JESSICA CISNEROS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
I’m confident that we can win. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4nia1hqD3ugtYrtjQboeav-FzrDbt3ne0OauKFSpk4sWEh0SHmGJEUJVrzhm_y6nlDTKKkzTVZYrlGq1FeK1v_MKTz9pHhA9yBfRoxnYy17aJeYGncfiM3lDgYtPc2Bmtb6CDXK4ZMgU3AKgKy6uY8VADnOHm2FucrKeQlp2tvjiXqunjjd3h4ItzrP1MizGgE/3k2/iQ44fvsnT3a7rQtdbPM7OA/h0/Dn92hYY4MSJVgTgE8arg5zj1pEocjfLLENcYJJ28BYg) Hi Peter, I’m just getting a break from all the madness of this week’s primary election results and wanted to reach out to you directly. As you may have heard already, Henry Cuellar failed to get 50% of the vote. So now, we’re headed to a runoff election! And, yes, you can probably guess I’m about to ask for your support. But first, I hope you’ll give me just a minute to explain why I’m running and why it’s so important. [**_After I’m done explaining, I hope you’ll consider contributing today to support my campaign._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCYll2jM_yz0u-TnCsNGSvLnwcy0_q_hRBuDSh4X-6_4YXgVQhweIQo5sgZjgjOiHqssfb-h5Ft8xt1uwd_fPLheFA6JtFsZ4sxnQ2wpMxNakCz7FYNgSNM4rOcpu_5OgnFL41cklqkBUSMDU22FXiojOvd5PHoruApsPpmfWSY5wAlH9D2TTf6ECOYVBsPGnHkJUF9QwYE5PaGAVznBC0GRWni4QIwslt2ElCJqVYt1BkAIUPH8SrQp_gJFjAwQxQ/3k2/iQ44fvsnT3a7rQtdbPM7OA/h1/dZLIfE5-px53d8tZZHxDugVqVS7j1879MrOx2oGqbDg) [Contribute now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCYll2jM_yz0u-TnCsNGSvLnwcy0_q_hRBuDSh4X-6_4aGtho3fGTFsekcJullqVfmavS9Zn3p4t_5lB0Bbm6YjXrPU7MRW79o2O7Q297e-JehzzhIzgG-IHo3B5a-zQ4pzDw_ee743tvYSeWm3cxo2FvoOAd6pGHfxEwSMGbbMjhYyQeC4SleqRcGdVecJjCbvnNhwmODbazwO-tY90UpJCdCi-kJkydRDoyAoEUPICME4SYHkzuBySXSUBso61Fk/3k2/iQ44fvsnT3a7rQtdbPM7OA/h2/OINsptyw_7rV6dhQS22J3QTiW2fNme-NSPehFmOM_eA) I was born and raised in Laredo, right on the border. My parents immigrated to Texas to give our family a better life. Even as a child growing up, I could see how lawmakers in Washington, DC were failing to protect and serve communities like mine — the lack of health care, low wages and high unemployment, and a badly broken immigration system. I wanted to be part of solving the problems we were facing, so I became an immigration and human rights lawyer. A few years ago, friends and neighbors encouraged me to take a big leap of faith and run for Congress. Our district has voted for Barack Obama, Hillary Clinton, and Joe Biden. Most people here vote for Democrats. But for some reason, we’ve been represented by a congressman who acts like a Republican. **In fact, before I challenged him in last year’s primary, Rep. Henry Cuellar had voted with Donald Trump 70% of the time.** Henry Cuellar has been in Congress since 2005. He voted for Trump’s border wall twice. He’s proudly anti-worker and voted against the PRO Act to protect workers from exploitation. And he was the only Democrat to vote against the Women’s Health and Protection Act, adding another checkbox to his long-standing anti-choice record. I could go on and on about how Cuellar’s record is completely out of step with the values of our district. And now his true intentions are called into question. **Just a couple of months ago, the FBI raided Cuellar’s home and campaign office and failed to be transparent with our district about why he’s being investigated.** It’s simply too risky to re-elect him right now. How does someone like this keep getting re-elected, Peter? The answer is that Rep. Cuellar is heavily bankrolled by giant corporate PACs and wealthy Republican donors who know he’s a reliable vote for their interests in Congress. In 2020, we came within just a few percentage points of defeating Henry Cuellar. Despite being outspent by $700,000 and opposed by the Koch network and major corporate PACs, we nearly pulled off a massive upset. After nearly losing to us last year and a devastating pandemic, I thought Rep. Cuellar might wake up to the problems that South Texans face. But he hasn’t changed the way he votes! He’s still serving his Republican corporate donors. So, we’re back to finish what we started. The good news is that we’re not a first-time candidate anymore, so many voters already know who we are. The bad news is that Henry Cuellar had been anticipating this rematch, and he banked more than $2 million for his campaign, which gave him a massive lead in fundraising. That’s why I’m emailing today, to ask you to make the best possible donation you can to our campaign. We only came within a tiny margin of winning the primary, so I’m confident that we can come out on top in the runoff. [**_But to win, I need each and every grassroots supporter to contribute any amount possible to keep competing with Henry Cuellar’s fundraising chest. So please, will you contribute anything you can afford today to help our campaign cover the resources we need to bring it home?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCYll2jM_yz0u-TnCsNGSvLnwcy0_q_hRBuDSh4X-6_4ZLcbKowBYiBYx-HlWbd9FZlhOa5iLx0BOTp0TgFeU0aNb9G-v5E6DC7m8JqdB8DP9Uh2JLLNG_yjY2ikSHNyS2R7X_PGjhxboTOS0SwMMTEt7c1QdC-qg4blp88AaZNSgIGc1tgbjEbp08K0GFOcHtJiQJDwDgJKlHredO5V2k-rs2vZQi6nTk3e3AzbE2yRxZOv_TZkxb6sp3BDi5dIy3/3k2/iQ44fvsnT3a7rQtdbPM7OA/h3/6xxU7yJ-E1XlfsYZdJnLSq--_ObAKMNecL-l8qdyRVM) [Contribute now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCYll2jM_yz0u-TnCsNGSvLnwcy0_q_hRBuDSh4X-6_4bGbILsDejAm7eYA3rXJqbBrBC6dIuKIjbD2N1lBdSO8DDGJHohtjmvLA9GqM_6g0gkN9yEUKINTxFwrwNwkjoqDaJaJUag1PNXPlOmzaF7ERLIQMmgYDzSp3hhdGDqu-2kIjw29KVrdIIFjSWeWyxWqLimkSw-DdGStpCLSfpbVJMZdoi_Q89GryzhmiYSMhsw0i1XaVpHY8oCFj1CP8J1/3k2/iQ44fvsnT3a7rQtdbPM7OA/h4/grgFiLnqPTVx8QuLJNPav25m4F00t51p8YM0q_eHVKU) Thank you so much for considering making a donation today. It means the world to me to have your support. Let’s finish the fight off strong. — Jessica Cisneros

[Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LTuikQc-3vpkvxb8jn5WCNl0r4xNWbWAicnVwRmHnQXARXWfYuXPA1CZp3p7B9e-JWObDClQqyXiIAweAB-HHKMTKO9FaiBkNaJVtca_BY5Vmx_4RIBCnPjXsA94cCMSe0lwklvVFNxQqP2WaP3eP77LBWd-5AFnKTpNReGyXWBYGgsD0VfWW8FTJur5iVimFowXgWfLDPqYjk9v8bwRRPhsPxw-vU8Qan4-si7X1tMiW_jXIaa7TBcnpIRbM80d10kVnhQ71vXrgteQuYXfAZQ/3k2/iQ44fvsnT3a7rQtdbPM7OA/h5/lC80J9pt-GJcID4HFSApzirZe7v2PrFTWt54WAJHmGg) | To give by check:
PO Box 660
Laredo, TX 78042
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

We rely on grassroots donations from supporters like you, and most of those donations come from emails like this one. If you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

[Receive fewer emails](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnIL3-AJEzo1jgZUdRlsaTKCPL6rTtNe-YiOrQgJmyIp71R3v0dyGq9Ih9JSdusqa-UuxdnwcOWBrLJ9BnRAKcZZHCpFzau2qspLtYhUXHeSSDSE_7xHyJcOfYF4IRv1sygPwS2jFPMz1R7SmPrEgT_45oWBPFeJMvIk682Glwux82djfVLeCyvz25afZ5mRbpJDbB9yR5b5OoTtiuWs5nCvJNMG0n_OIvcAtbrOEeIXsEirjwYG9LRXLyLXQ6Ai3NCXOo8u74uQhCV2iWlE-ZN/3k2/iQ44fvsnT3a7rQtdbPM7OA/h6/qvGCZ2Fva4wCFy1qmoCtiCsSDeCB5bIeWmcIGmcw-ps)
[Update your information](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnE8cVr9WSuKL5-mxDzRxV29ND7eR5St9dkGwSEKbIOWUXkm8HSRcoGBpf61boPQBJ-86NFWWM7Hans0Eb_JJ3RSss5OBTAuxJLS6CT3fOTzg6P6UPhm7AwMkGXSn_HVezgfTRHVFJ_7KyNFX6lU4TR3mVp9YFVPIJezdKJrh-fxDKRBcsJ1FQw_fkSu4xuzHK5JFAS-EXIIWL634G-QyOQEonKu6iT0ZDgXDQ4-vq2E6c-E2NYMWWGFUWPC7kha3ALvWvMg8i7rJLfkXL-ANTK/3k2/iQ44fvsnT3a7rQtdbPM7OA/h7/h-HXnrxO0el0P3SjUMDiwM1EuaKWc9mJ5b1ag2H-P8U)

It’s simply too risky to re-elect him right now. How does someone like this keep getting re-elected, Peter? The answer is that Rep. Cuellar is heavily bankrolled by giant corporate PACs and wealthy Republican donors who know he’s a reliable vote for their interests in Congress. In 2020, we came within just a few percentage points of defeating Henry Cuellar. Despite being outspent by $700,000 and opposed by the Koch network and major corporate PACs, we nearly pulled off a massive upset. After nearly losing to us last year and a devastating pandemic, I thought Rep. Cuellar might wake up to the problems that South Texans face. But he hasn’t changed the way he votes! He’s still serving his Republican corporate donors. So, we’re back to finish what we started. The good news is that we’re not a first-time candidate anymore, so many voters already know who we are. The bad news is that Henry Cuellar had been anticipating this rematch, and he banked more than $2 million for his campaign, which gave him a massive lead in fundraising. That’s why I’m emailing today, to ask you to make the best possible donation you can to our campaign. We only came within a tiny margin of winning the primary, so I’m confident that we can come out on top in the runoff. Thank you so much for considering making a donation today. It means the world to me to have your support. Let’s finish the fight off strong. — Jessica Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
It’s worse than I thought. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9654%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=yxhoIQ%2bXOzyGTwpF1Sm5sQ&sysid=1)
It’s worse than I thought.

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25645%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yYIHBmzx7TIjndZpZY6aYw&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022\.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **
| | [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $500 DONATION](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25646%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9eZYVBJjQ2hAV1sQbdtIyQ&sysid=1)

---
| [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $50 DONATION](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25649%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CZ%2fTElQmew38xdY60RBs2A&sysid=1)
---
| [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $25 DONATION](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25640%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tT0RRMa%2b99job5ojAM5jKA&sysid=1)

Thank you for your help. Thank you for your encouragement. Thank you for having my back.

God Bless you and your generosity,

Senator John Kennedy

name: John James
subject: The spin of the century
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of John James for Congress, Inc
body:
I just couldn’t let what Joe Biden said at the State of the Union go unchecked... Joe Biden’s plan to fix supply chain issue
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaa188ggve1c86td3gtanr48odmiiadb4uq22fe0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbo66djgmjg6bctl69h60pjmm9ob6ctge1ob9o74eeobdc5m69iecsrme9p3ep3gcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6pj3ap5jchjr4sb66jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5hm2p30sdi64oh5u)
** 🇺🇸 HELP JOHN JAMES FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM 🇺🇸** _Americans are fed up with our current leadership._ [**FUEL OUR FIGHT >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuqmb418shvrbpp3u1levi2r81u9l1mncgv99gv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i61or4c9h2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuo0elmm38unpdrjh7p5elge86pd6ttuf0kvs11o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i61or4c9h2bs) Hi Co-Pilot, I just couldn’t let what Joe Biden said at the State of the Union go unchecked... [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb0hsut5ateg9dbe5a29f7v0copum6rehqvhhe9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i61or4c9h2bs) [**STOP BIDEN’S STATE OF CRISIS**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6fjs0uht7ue6qm3otgk5r8epqqh73qgpa2f5lso_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i61or4c9h2bs) Joe Biden’s plan to fix _supply chain issues_ , _inflation_ , _healthcare_ : _ “Just lower costs!” - _Joe Biden Sounds nice... **But anyone with a basic understanding of the economy knows that these are just the same hollow words that Americans have been fed from career politicians for generations. ** Joe Biden has no intention of easing the burden of the American people. Otherwise, he would’ve prioritized them instead of every progressive policy he pushed last year.
**This State of the Union was nothing more than a desperate move from a desperate party hellbent on holding onto power, and this November is our moment to finally hold them accountable** ー[**Co-Pilot,**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmpu21mbh2pb4t1d7njr0p9n6uekakot3ka3ql50_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i61or4c9h2bs)[** will you help ensure they’re held accountable? **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj5o2kusr88mqbcbuj2u1tosv3eldmvb7731i1lo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i61or4c9h2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr02qkk7jrj5itnuja3pgpurnfq3joulcqotk320_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i61or4c9h2bs) I've always been guided by these core principles: _faith in God and country_ , _a strong united family_ , and _service before self_. And that’s what American leadership is lacking these days--we have a lot of people in government who either talk a good game about helping the American people or are the career politicians who are getting things done. But real leaders can do both. Leadership is more than just listening to people’s concerns, it’s sacrificing your own needs behind someone else's and not accepting failure as an option. We need a leader who can restore faith in the American system, be a champion for American families, and serve and fulfill the interests of the American public. [**I know I can be that leader for Michigan and beyondーI’m asking for your trust and support to help me get there >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhtgjv896nnklibviqth5ule6jiv0uce3pg1j6no_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i61or4c9h2bs) [**FUEL OUR FIGHT >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi6rsnpt76v46o8m69lt6dcatpsp44an5esdg840_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i61or4c9h2bs) Co-Pilot, a lot of people know of me, but they don't know how I got here or why they should put their faith in me to lead. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi122dmvhig6fkho8gi5v8sap3vgmhehl3hvdavo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i61or4c9h2bs) After 8 years of service as a U.S. Army Apache pilot, I returned home to my community to run the company that my dad started - an automotive supply-chain company. I worked hard, created good-paying American jobs, met the love of my life — my wife Liz — and started a family. But I couldn’t remain on the sidelines. Even though my military career was over, I felt like I had more to give. I wanted to continue to serve the country and my community in any way that I could. _Co-Pilot, I never envisioned myself as a politician._ [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrei34e3o4g5tk8ccof49otfb92l5de7o38dftv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i61or4c9h2bs) | |
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhvjituja937otbpv0vhivm4rrd1je8endhv4vl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i61or4c9h2bs)
But after watching Washington fail to deliver on promises for decades, I decided that I had to take action. I couldn’t let hardworking Michigan families be held back while career politicians fought for their own careers instead of their communities.

I want to grow our economies back home, not continue growing Washington's.

It’s time to get our tax dollars out of the hands of Washington politicians and back in our communities where they can make the biggest impact.

I hope you choose to become an OFFICIAL supporter of my campaign by making an immediate donation now: **[https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-michigan/action-3807219/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm5utrin2knfa7i56nlpdj2j4j9lpjsihn5a2iso_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i61or4c9h2bs)**
[**FUEL OUR FIGHT >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgok62qn78ha5dkasmlejebeotk7mqjut6tgoihg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5i61or4c9h2bs)
Thank you for your time, Co-Pilot.

John James
---
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf7hhisc4jtpr0n7eg9hd40s6nqjbf8qjlu44o0o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1cdgm8o73chh649fg)

name: Mia McLeod
subject: [RESPONSE REQUESTED] Understanding where you stand on raising the minimum wage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIA FOR SOUTH CAROLINA
body:
It’s important for me to hear from the people of SC. You’ve been selected to take part in a campaign survey on minimum wage → I hope you will take a minute to fill it out. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl-vRswUTt0wSRsVUTolC16p8eZkS16Bwe6WVsTffBM_tM0J-TBMIOTalV5LO02-9jewsxBAPFzlUcA_UNCfdW7ZUhIPKyxCCwd8CvSJBM4z0cxT5utGzGKH_uM5SFgFDlMi6NjL9AbVNi9pGZxRDtBd8e4miPq4YqlrgImtlXRNa1wTOIZTCCIWEDqY0L_wWKaZcaZwByTIh-VJ1dlco5DliIS-exCLwSOTxv0HECWs9XmBQXhEi0KoXYrn8eAv0eaFC6sjrkzfHlplvAezRY0lOXwgdZM2rTJMJizyESAAx0-FwPKKoB8R8h2jpH7ZPWgJ6weqip2PKz7_3ZAY_QG66PXk5RF4SAO0KjiidLYxA/3k2/-4DR81o0TFWLFZsS5L8Fbw/h0/YxtkYvQK684eiD9ETce_2I8aLUmRCUNwjOjhTdx540I)
---
Dear Friend -
---
Here in South Carolina, our minimum wage hasn't gone up since 2008 and still sits at $7.25 an hour. Anybody who thinks $7.25 an hour is a living wage is clearly out of touch with the realities South Carolina families face every day. They haven't had to sit at the kitchen table and wonder how they're going to pay for their kids to go to college, afford this month's groceries, keep the lights on, save for retirement, or even pay for the gas that will get them to work.
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl-vRswUTt0wSRsVUTolC16p8eZkS16Bwe6WVsTffBM_tM0J-TBMIOTalV5LO02-9jewsxBAPFzlUcA_UNCfdW7aKV1x980rrVNen4ClORk5xuKzOj1hiof1zX5TBLh5T7BxdjXlT0Iwj3PKfdKH7bZViw4YJ3qt9mOzZtdzu7Czjpl-VdVmnRwBpickTB_GfCDdm2HHGJbioq0v3nSFsroY0-_hL0OvOqKEMwkwX9WbohvqIHsrnjV3BKtu5TNNqhuz8O9DTla_64t9kOW5guMWB6DRvxSgNEhWavV0qM6jQFJM721TBfieLwqOjN3aZVL9u3jYBsJcNZCFH4UPI9cA-fUIPCvgHKPnCiP7nOKUw/3k2/-4DR81o0TFWLFZsS5L8Fbw/h1/RyxN6UQCYu_LDmMG5F6C5hQM6lyJlkLHlYDe-si2S3o)
---
As a single mom, I raised my boys on my own. It wasn't always easy. I know the struggles that come with caring for a family are only magnified in times like these. In South Carolina, 2/3rds of women are single or co-breadwinners for their families. There's no doubt that raising the minimum wage raises South Carolina families.
---
Raising the minimum wage is the single biggest lever we can pull to elevate the income floor for people who are paid the least, reduce poverty (especially for families and children), and restore dignity for South Carolina workers. But I'm the only candidate in this race, Democrat or Republican, who supports raising the minimum wage to at least $15 an hour.
---

clean_body: It’s important for me to hear from the people of SC. You’ve been selected to take part in a campaign survey on minimum wage → I hope you will take a minute to fill it out. | | Dear Friend - Here in South Carolina, our minimum wage hasn't gone up since 2008 and still sits at $7.25 an hour. Anybody who thinks $7.25 an hour is a living wage is clearly out of touch with the realities South Carolina families face every day. They haven't had to sit at the kitchen table and wonder how they're going to pay for their kids to go to college, afford this month's groceries, keep the lights on, save for retirement, or even pay for the gas that will get them to work. | As a single mom, I raised my boys on my own. It wasn't always easy. I know the struggles that come with caring for a family are only magnified in times like these. In South Carolina, 2/3rds of women are single or co-breadwinners for their families. There's no doubt that raising the minimum wage raises South Carolina families. Raising the minimum wage is the single biggest lever we can pull to elevate the income floor for people who are paid the least, reduce poverty (especially for families and children), and restore dignity for South Carolina workers. But I'm the only candidate in this race, Democrat or Republican, who supports raising the minimum wage to at least $15 an hour. It's past time we take steps to support South Carolina workers by raising the minimum wage, and I'm excited to have you on board. With gratitude, Mia About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. She is a former State Representative, current State Senator representing District 22, and is running as a Democratic candidate for Governor. | | | PAID FOR BY MIA FOR SOUTH CAROLINA | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mia for South Carolina, please .

| | The League of Conservation Voters just released their annual scorecard. I earned a score of 96% for my legislative record on climate issues. I could not be more proud of this recognition of my long record fighting for solutions to climate change. **If we are going to fight climate change we have to face reality and tackle the problem head on.** Climate change is real, and climate change is man-made. We can only survive the worst effects of climate change if we change our own behavior. We must act now to save our planet. We need: ✅ A greener economy. ✅ A commitment to clean air and clean water. ✅ A transition to renewable energy. I am committed to fight for these solutions and more. [**Chip in $6 today to join me in the fight against climate change.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42572658/333466397/1596212816?refcode=2022-03-04-lcvscore&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=bc9ca31f-ec9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzljYTMxZi1lYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FzzbWInhBZz8njTVYPa15Yx-hbaZEnBp3WW1okKmtvQ=) We have already seen the devastating impacts of climate change, as thousands of people die each year from climate-related disasters. Just last summer, hundreds of our neighbors in the Pacific Northwest lost their lives during the record-shattering heat wave. And earlier this year we witnessed devastating floods in Whatcom County that will take years to recover from. What we as a nation do (or worse, don't do), will impact life on Earth. And not in some distant future. Now. Our nation's leaders need to find the courage to act. clean_body: | | | The League of Conservation Voters just released their annual scorecard. I earned a score of 96% for my legislative record on climate issues. I could not be more proud of this recognition of my long record fighting for solutions to climate change. If we are going to fight climate change we have to face reality and tackle the problem head on. Climate change is real, and climate change is man-made. We can only survive the worst effects of climate change if we change our own behavior. We must act now to save our planet. We need: ✅ A greener economy. ✅ A commitment to clean air and clean water. ✅ A transition to renewable energy. I am committed to fight for these solutions and more. = We have already seen the devastating impacts of climate change, as thousands of people die each year from climate-related disasters. Just last summer, hundreds of our neighbors in the Pacific Northwest lost their lives during the record-shattering heat wave. And earlier this year we witnessed devastating floods in Whatcom County that will take years to recover from. What we as a nation do (or worse, don't do), will impact life on Earth. And not in some distant future. Now. Our nation's leaders need to find the courage to act. = Rick Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. ---|--- | This email was sent by . body:
As we celebrate Women’s History Month, I wanted to invite you to join us for a special event and talk about a few of the Maryland women who inspire me.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42572734/333466788/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220304-b1_evt_full-MSK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220304-b1_evt_full-MSK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220304&&&&utm_content=b1_evt_full&&&&utm_term=MSK_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=e63f8097-ec9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjNmODA5Ny1lYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MAieyEv23mddzVA5PMQT08gdCfN7dKihCzHfXz8iyAs=)
---
| Peter, I have been fortunate enough to be surrounded by incredible female role models my entire life. From my mom, to my grandmothers, to some of my favorite teachers and incredible mentors, I have always felt assured that the sky is the limit and that **my gender is an asset to be celebrated, not something that should ever hold me back or limit my potential. ** As we celebrate Women’s History Month this year, I wanted to invite you to join Michelle Siri and me in a virtual fireside chat as we discuss our experiences, what we’ve learned from the strong women in our lives, and what her and John’s plans are to create a more equitable Maryland for all of us. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42572735/333466789/35157582?source=email-ngp-20220304-b1_evt_full-MSK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220304-b1_evt_full-MSK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220304&&&&utm_content=b1_evt_full&&&&utm_term=MSK_S2_C1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjNmODA5Ny1lYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MAieyEv23mddzVA5PMQT08gdCfN7dKihCzHfXz8iyAs=&emci=0c2c51cb-eb9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e63f8097-ec9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24635484)
---
| [RSVP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42572736/333466790/35157582?source=email-ngp-20220304-b1_evt_full-MSK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220304-b1_evt_full-MSK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220304&&&&utm_content=b1_evt_full&&&&utm_term=MSK_S2_C1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjNmODA5Ny1lYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MAieyEv23mddzVA5PMQT08gdCfN7dKihCzHfXz8iyAs=&emci=0c2c51cb-eb9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e63f8097-ec9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24635484)
---
I also wanted to take a moment to talk about a few of the Maryland women who inspire me. I am inspired by the resilience and bravery of **Harriet Tubman** , who escaped slavery and returned to free over 300 enslaved people here in Maryland and went on to be a freedom fighter as a spy and a nurse in the Civil War. I am moved by the compassion and caring nature of **Clara Barton** , the Civil War nurse who founded the American Red Cross, which is saving countless lives to this day. I am energized and uplifted by the spirit and voice of **Billie Holiday** , one of the greatest jazz singers ever, who overcame immense adversity to pioneer new forms of jazz and pop music and wasn’t afraid to speak out against violence against Black Americans. I am moved by the moxie and commitment of **Rachel Carson** , the writer and environmentalist, who alerted the world to just how powerful, and often harmful, human impact is on our environment back in 1962 with “Silent Spring.” These are just a few of the incredible Maryland women who I admire, and there are so many more. This Women’s History Month, I invite you to reflect on the women who came before us — who paved the way and broke barriers to advance our rights and make the world a better place. **And if you are able, I hope to see you at our virtual fundraiser on March 8th.** | [RSVP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42572737/333466791/35157582?source=email-ngp-20220304-b1_evt_full-MSK_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220304-b1_evt_full-MSK_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220304&&&&utm_content=b1_evt_full&&&&utm_term=MSK_S2_C1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjNmODA5Ny1lYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MAieyEv23mddzVA5PMQT08gdCfN7dKihCzHfXz8iyAs=&emci=0c2c51cb-eb9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e63f8097-ec9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=24635484)
---
Thank you,
Melissa King

“I am pleased to endorse Jeanine Lawson to be our next representative in Congress. Jeanine has a proven record of winning against strong Democrat | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/163cd6a589e3/endorsed-by-senator-dick-black?e=fc83fb200d)

---
| Dear ,

This morning I am excited to announce the endorsement of conservative leader Senator Dick Black!

Senator Black has been a strong defender of our conservative principles for decades, and I am honored to have his support.

**Read Senator Dick Black's full endorsement here:** “I am pleased to endorse Jeanine Lawson to be our next representative in Congress. Jeanine has a proven record of winning against strong Democrat opposition while never wavering from her conservative beliefs. In Congress, Jeanine will be a fighter for conservative values and will put an end to the destructive agenda of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the rest of the radical left.”
---
|
---
| I am honored to receive Senator Black's endorsement, and I pledge to never compromise on our conservative values in Congress.

[Will you consider making a small donation to my campaign to help me defeat Jennifer Wexton and restore commonsense, conservative leadership to Congress?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=82901c00a6&e=fc83fb200d)

body:
The Left’s Destructive Agenda Puts New Jersey Livelihoods at Stake | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jerseyrizzo/record-breaking-failures?e=f7e301a8ae)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

This week, [Congressman Madison Cawthorn endorsed our campaign](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=98fd44f65d&e=f7e301a8ae). He recognizes that I will never stop fighting for New Jerseyans. I’m not a spineless establishment politician, and I’m building a winning campaign that’s going to roll over the Leftists, Kean, Malinowski, and their vision of a less free, less prosperous, more woke America.

Biden and Malinoswki’s radical, progressive agenda has put everything that makes America an exceptional nation—freedom, opportunity, justice, and safety—under fire. In the last year, their unchecked, reckless spending and COVID mandates have obliterated Americans’ livelihoods and stomped on our liberty.
---
| [I’M FIGHTING FOR NEW JERSEY. JOIN ME, VOLUNTEER TODAY](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=e239ebd630&e=f7e301a8ae "I’M FIGHTING FOR NEW JERSEY. JOIN ME, VOLUNTEER TODAY")
---
| Leftist leaders shuttered New Jersey’s businesses, kept our children out of the classroom, and imposed tyrannical mandates on the people. It was disgustingly shortsighted and has done untold damage.
---
| [EVERYTHING WE HOLD DEAR IS AT STAKE, HELP ME RESTORE ](https://jerseyrizzo.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd3dc6ed376f0f719418a36c3&id=a1ed546fd8&e=f7e301a8ae "EVERYTHING WE HOLD DEAR IS AT STAKE, HELP ME RESTORE ")
---
| I’m running to fight for everyday New Jerseyans— _relentlessly_. Biden’s failed immigration policies have broken our borders and hard drugs flood into our streets. I’m fighting for the security and safety of our communities, keeping narcotics off of our streets and enforcing the rule of law. Under Biden, we’re suffering under record-breaking inflation and most New Jerseyeans are struggling to make ends meet.

For so many years, New Jersey has been completely devoid of strong leadership of the people, by the people, and for the people. For too long, establishment RINOs have lied to New Jerseyans. When they were supposed to have our back, the establishment turned around and sold us out. I’m running for Congress because, like so many New Jerseyans, I’m sick of it and we’re calling their shameful actions out, declaring “enough is enough.”
---

name: Tim Ryan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42572976/333468563/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220304_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjYwNmQ0YS1lZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1r01IWjh5PeezF8ty9a5d6GncsFxsZpP1_1Ue_jhZ60=&emci=75c1a853-0b99-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d6606d4a-ed9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=252045)
---
Folks—I’m about to ask you to chip in $5 toward my grassroots campaign. But first, I want to tell you why I’m confident we can prove the skeptics wrong and win this battleground race.
1. **Republican Senator Rob Portman is retiring, leaving Ohio’s Senate seat wide open.** Republicans are fighting it out in a messy and expensive primary—giving us a stronger chance of flipping this seat blue.
2. **Ohio already has a Democratic Senator.** Sherrod Brown has proven that Ohioans want to elect a Senator who puts workers first.
3. **A recent poll has me within single digits of my Republican opponents.** It’s still early in the race, and the more we get our message out, the more voters we’ll win over.
4. **Working people are fed up and ready for change.** I’ve been traveling all over the state, and Ohioans are sick of handouts for big corporations and billionaires—they want good-paying jobs, health care they can afford, and a fair shot for their kids to succeed.
5. **We have grassroots momentum.** While my rich Republican opponents are propping up their campaigns with millions of their own dollars, we’re powered by folks who chip in $5, $25, or $100 at a time.

So, folks, we have a real path to winning this race—but it will take everything we have to pull it off. **[Here’s my ask: Will you split $5 or more to help my campaign in Ohio and Martin Heinrich’s campaign in New Mexico keep up our grassroots energy and hit our fundraising goals?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42572978/333468565/-982516153?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220304_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjYwNmQ0YS1lZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1r01IWjh5PeezF8ty9a5d6GncsFxsZpP1_1Ue_jhZ60=)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Tim Ryan and Martin Heinrich:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42572980/333468569/-982516153?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220304_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjYwNmQ0YS1lZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1r01IWjh5PeezF8ty9a5d6GncsFxsZpP1_1Ue_jhZ60=)

clean_body: Folks—I’m about to ask you to chip in $5 toward my grassroots campaign. But first, I want to tell you why I’m confident we can prove the skeptics wrong and win this battleground race. 1. Republican Senator Rob Portman is retiring, leaving Ohio’s Senate seat wide open. Republicans are fighting it out in a messy and expensive primary—giving us a stronger chance of flipping this seat blue. 2. Ohio already has a Democratic Senator. Sherrod Brown has proven that Ohioans want to elect a Senator who puts workers first. 3. A recent poll has me within single digits of my Republican opponents. It’s still early in the race, and the more we get our message out, the more voters we’ll win over. 4. Working people are fed up and ready for change. I’ve been traveling all over the state, and Ohioans are sick of handouts for big corporations and billionaires—they want good-paying jobs, health care they can afford, and a fair shot for their kids to succeed. 5. We have grassroots momentum. While my rich Republican opponents are propping up their campaigns with millions of their own dollars, we’re powered by folks who chip in $5, $25, or $100 at a time. So, folks, we have a real path to winning this race—but it will take everything we have to pull it off. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Tim Ryan and Martin Heinrich: | | = = | = = | = = Together, I know we can get this done. —Tim | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6720%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ZydOPa%2frLaW7jn5rdDfOQQ&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up--that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69208%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lFZ%2b7bvla2GistZj%2fANTRw&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69209%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YEjWZ1B7pwUfvQuyJZ1nhg&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69200%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fauhkwoGzcQHoxFy8soN8Q&sysid=1) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69201%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7JSrMUMmc8QNLCCxFGWw3g&sysid=1) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

| _Copyright(C) 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._
---

name: Christy Smith
subject: Our hearts are with Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42573125/333468829/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDYwNmQ0YS1lZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngS4uuCyUpRMg2xvZE94OLlZrwW2OIw_ARPJ3EtyNuI=&emci=28303c30-329b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e0606d4a-ed9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

The ongoing tragedy in Ukraine due to Russia’s unprovoked and unconscionable invasion is heart-wrenching.

Over one million Ukrainians have been forced to flee their homes, leaving behind communities toppled to the ground by Russian missiles and tanks. More horrifically, the siege has now entered residential zones, killing hundreds of civilians, including children.

Left in the wake of this senseless act of violence, are thousands of Ukrainian refugees in desperate need of food, shelter, and humanitarian aid.

**That's why today I'm asking for your support for two organizations working on the frontlines of this humanitarian crisis – World Central Kitchen and UNICEF.** World Central Kitchen is providing desperately needed warm meals to refugees fleeing violence, and UNICEF is one of the leading organizations helping displaced Ukrainian children and families. Both organizations are doing amazing work directly on the ground in Ukraine and could use your generous support.

[**Donate $5 or more to split a donation between World Central Kitchen and UNICEF now >>> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42573126/333468833/1429415985?refcode=em22_220304_ukraine&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDYwNmQ0YS1lZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngS4uuCyUpRMg2xvZE94OLlZrwW2OIw_ARPJ3EtyNuI=)****

In times like these, it can be easy to retreat into anger and despair, but we cannot.**Right now, it matters more than ever that we come together and offer our support to the Ukrainian people.**

We must stand in solidarity with Ukrainian people, our Eastern European allies, the hundreds of thousands of refugees, and the brave Russian citizens protesting Putin’s dictatorship. We cannot let history repeat itself.

Thank you for your generous support.

Our thoughts are with the brave people of Ukraine,

Christy

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/28303c30-329b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/e0606d4a-ed9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDYwNmQ0YS1lZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngS4uuCyUpRMg2xvZE94OLlZrwW2OIw_ARPJ3EtyNuI=&id=113000550). Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
PO BOX 301 24307
Magic Mountain Pkwy
Valencia, CA 91355
United States

Sometimes it feels like we are still fighting for things that should have been settled a long time ago. For example, the gender pay gap. **[When Ken gets to Congress, equality and equity are at the top of his to-do list. Will you help him get to work and donate to his campaign?](http://links.kenrussellforfloridaemail.com/u/click?_t=cee06b13e3c1411baa566b417c320e45&_m=38cacb93c95a4f1c9f899ba75e98f6f4&_e=si7rWBm-vcXAM58JhFKMyGjQsfGe4pN8Ui35ioJAdunBtMV6BF5NMihE3NYwVBlUsKUWxrCEAToq4ZN5yo_Ef0bSo5tw-xdNw8pJxBRNhsiwM16XtEc00AY9Mgft0Kwc-B6j25u75HQJ5xEoZTDKVlsGqKN0vicGz0Q_kKpc5mrCN7uw3sGo_w7LMYrXtT04PjUz2ejRUe0MoNieWcBlEKpYp3Vsx_r5hl_L-PBF6jOsVEZ_q2UGtbEokJlHbtYD3fDg5m-67oH3oX8OTaFAE193jSsCz9iKU5Xcb25_CGYuH29ePHAhyPEnqONhhDo9wXrCt7TFZuo9f1IUVG5fkxQztJLlPT6abGEafUJ0XccFj-Cc9EHnLstuJ_WF094E9iGM7ul3ma3VuieAQ7320p7QNaKw39iH0dyTDri1OnAbB95KcNWJd9COKRmkMs_flVsFKpEes6Hyt3a3Lv6cGmWBhhz8EhX3rJ5QMYG42-BdfUgYb2PsjONoDS-ym4k0)** A few things are obvious if you ask us:
1. Women deserve to be paid the same wages as men, regardless of race or ethnicity.
2. Leadership knows no gender, and management positions are still not offered at the same rate to women as they are to men.
3. It is PAST TIME we fix this problem.

Enough is enough, this issue should not be up for debate at all, and we can’t think of any reason something has not been done. **[Marco Rubio once called equal pay a ‘waste of time’. Join our team, and fight for a fairer world.](http://links.kenrussellforfloridaemail.com/u/click?_t=cee06b13e3c1411baa566b417c320e45&_m=38cacb93c95a4f1c9f899ba75e98f6f4&_e=si7rWBm-vcXAM58JhFKMyGjQsfGe4pN8Ui35ioJAdunBtMV6BF5NMihE3NYwVBlUsKUWxrCEAToq4ZN5yo_Ef0bSo5tw-xdNw8pJxBRNhsiwM16XtEc00AY9Mgft0Kwc-B6j25u75HQJ5xEoZTDKVlsGqKN0vicGz0Q_kKpc5mrCN7uw3sGo_w7LMYrXtT04PjUz2ejRUe0MoNieWcBlEKpYp3Vsx_r5hl_L-PBF6jOsVEZ_q2UGtbEokJlHbtYD3fDg5m-67oH3oX8OTaFAE193jSsCz9iKU5Xcb25_CGakoLCT5ociuELUxoDaw6M4J0_E2ZFxYsRQIPMI1fCH8l7PMAeWJU_Z9FbPx4HjHIQn6KMtxm-Sa9_mKSlpPSlubJMYpMTdAry2lsPzKYoJ44QhoZM-7Jtg3UQOV2GX9VPCQ5jN80RzAi_OqpaemytZdLOzAidvmW_76KBjUnIAt0eDqKCvLmYmESZ3HxF9E33BpbvpdRFD0VU5v8Wfarr_)** clean_body: March is Women’s History Month, and now is the perfect time to talk about it. Sometimes it feels like we are still fighting for things that should hav | | | March is Women’s History Month, and now is the perfect time to talk about it. Sometimes it feels like we are still fighting for things that should have been settled a long time ago. For example, the gender pay gap. A few things are obvious if you ask us: 1. Women deserve to be paid the same wages as men, regardless of race or ethnicity. 2. Leadership knows no gender, and management positions are still not offered at the same rate to women as they are to men. 3. It is PAST TIME we fix this problem. Enough is enough, this issue should not be up for debate at all, and we can’t think of any reason something has not been done. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | At this point, it is hard to know what the right even believes in, and in 2022, there is NO justification for the failure to act on this. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1g3qh0udtdi1ae5b6d7cqithrt1qj8jk9c9rn70_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2usp6asrgs9q3dc3nmdi71dljc5obccrlchrrcd32c8r76o5gegq6bd3gc3i70o37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchmcoqm1cr0cup32phkc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cdgm4o31chg649fg)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z51pc6imvh2sdcft0bat0a0e4d697j5cml3mjq5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5h60ob4c1h2bs) [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7ok5i4ajk98u8oabb5s8du3qj9qn7v7fnhe4fo8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5h60ob4c1h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze6gsu8il3lugsjs53vdoj7uqa0h7e0e7n71a1q0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5h60ob4c1h2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z10m5pd26tp61sh8u7qv6kif5usqdbno1fm9h2u8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5h60ob4c1h2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---

body:
BREAKING: Judge dismisses Rep. Swalwell's charges against me!
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59738456:J1IlK5EzN:m:1:3298722022:4BBFEE3940C66435650CC77A8469B686:r)
---
Peter,
---
Thanks to your support, we just had a victory in court!
---
**_A judge just DISMISSED charges filed against me by Eric Swalwell - the House Democrat who has been accused of sleeping with a Chinese spy named Fang Fang. _**
---
_I know I ask for your support quite a bit, so I wanted to be sure to share this great news with you, Peter._
---
Truth be told, there simply haven't been many victories to celebrate...
---
...It's been a rough year since the FBI first raided my apartment and I'm still facing a mountain of legal battles, which is why I'm hoping you'll donate on the heels of this victory.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice - and with your support, I know I will win. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59738456:J1IlK5EzN:m:1:3298722022:4BBFEE3940C66435650CC77A8469B686:r)

---
---
You may be a bit shocked to hear this part...
---
...The judge who dismissed the charges against me was appointed by __Barack Obama.__
---
**_That 's how you can be certain that this lawsuit was downright frivolous! _**
---
But it also shows you how desperate the swamp is to take me down.
---
From the moment they launched their dawn raid on my apartment last year, I knew the Deep State had put a gigantic bull's eye on my back and would try everything they could to take me down.
---
Yet here I am - still standing - thanking patriots like you for my freedom.
---
But the battle isn't over. The Deep State still has a list of ways to try and take me down, which is why I have to ask for your sustained support.

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: RNC’s first time ever in CT (and it’s in our district!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
Can you hear me now? I’ve been telling you this year was going to be different. Republicans are desperate to retake power in Congress and believe they have an opportunity to pick up a seat here in CT-05. They started signaling a ramp-up of their interest in our race from the earliest days of this election cycle. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42573856/333471949/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjMyZGM0NC1lZTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xg83keFA8o0T3qZqiVGHc3umvRTmBHgMTNPIVytbuSw=&emci=316e6e8e-d79b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6f32dc44-ee9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=15529135) | Can you hear me now? I’ve been telling you this year was going to be different. _Republicans are desperate to retake power in Congress and believe they have an opportunity to pick up a seat here in CT-05. They started signaling a ramp-up of their interest in our race from the earliest days of this election cycle._ **Well, it’s happening. For the first time EVER, the Republican National Committee (RNC) has set up a headquarters in Connecticut, right in CT-05. **Two days ago, Ronna McDaniel, the Chairwoman of the RNC, kicked off the grand opening, SETTING UP SHOP right in our front yard! Their new headquarters is in New Britain, Connecticut – the second largest city in our district. The headlines below tell you all you need to know about the national GOP’s focus on CT-05. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42573857/333471950/-718305685?refcode=E14358-20220304-GOPinCT-graphic-GOP-RegTemplate-Opponent-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjMyZGM0NC1lZTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xg83keFA8o0T3qZqiVGHc3umvRTmBHgMTNPIVytbuSw=) Couple that with the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) adding CT-05 to their “Young Guns” top races, and it is official. They are zeroed in on us this year. [**This is what we have been preparing for. CT-05 is getting national Republican attention – and with it will come national Republican money. If you can, please step up NOW to help us send them packing, early and definitively. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Study the Roman Republic
body:
Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6akv3r52e0i20ep94lspbphu705acgr925ugsto_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboe3chks5gn0plm6tgb6cji62onfd3leaqjco5j6pr79ppjm9h3at73edqn2ojnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6pj3ao5jc1jr4cb662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5hm2oj0c5i68oh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqpmlvujd7bu2qnmg10kaq01fle42ohkf3kbo9l8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5h60ob4chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today wouldn’t recognize these names, our Founding Fathers admired and studied these heroes of the Roman Republic. If you’ve ever read _The Federalist Papers_ or visited Cincinnati, Ohio, they may ring a bell.
---
| | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z67j1kr67340u48ruronql340d691olh0s9fu2j0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5h60ob4chh2bs)
---
| | That’s because many of our Founders looked at the heroes of the Roman Republic as models of civic virtue to emulate. Likewise, they viewed the descent of Rome into tyranny and discord as a cautionary tale their new republican form of government was designed to address. These are a few of the reasons we’re releasing our newest free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** next month. Our Founders knew that the Roman Republic provided an essential study for every person interested in free government, military strategy, political theory, and the perennial questions of human nature. ** **Now you can learn these same lessons with Hillsdale College...for free!** Remember, courses like **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** are free and supported entirely by the generosity of friends like you. We rely on the generous funding provided by so many. I want you to know that a donation is NOT required to experience the full course—it’s truly free and open to all who wish to learn as part of the College’s mission. **So please, pre-register today, even if you can’t make a gift to support the course or our other educational outreach.** [_**You can watch the trailer and pre-register now for “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” at this secure page »**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl7bgibert24fji05ed04hlhv62qpuedoo7uo6uo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5h60ob4chh2bs) __ Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Gov. Steve Sisolak
subject: Preparing for a big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
I will be making it official

Team, These last three years, Nevadans overcame a lot together. Despite the barrage of GOP attacks we’re facing almost every day, I’m very proud of everything we’ve accomplished — from fighting for voting rights and defending labor rights, to expanding affordable health care access, to increasing funding for our public schools. That’s why I’ll be running for re-election proudly on my record as governor. And because you’re such an important member of our team, I wanted to let you know that soon, _**I will be making it official by filing for re-election and launching this campaign.**_ _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42574133/333473194/-1382373466?refcode=email_030422_preparingforabigannouncement&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTY1YjI0OS1lZjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0KjMdGO5pLclJr7GYwYnmLf1zO0FzlwKtkBT1rYuZMQ=)

---
Peter,

It's becoming clearer by the day that this Senate race in Georgia is going to be THE race that will decide control of the Senate.

But don't take our word for it. Recently our opponent sent out an email to let his supporters know CNN had named him the _**" MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION." **_

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59738023:6VQXd5ENj:m:1:3317145305:F8336492B046ED93271C4CF7B9C2C32A:r)
There you have it ... straight from our opponent's campaign. When we tell you how critical this race is, we really mean it.

According to recent polling, the race is too close to call. **[A Quinnipiac survey from last month had our campaign leading our Democrat opponent by ONE POINT- a statistical tie.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59738023:6VQXd5ENj:m:1:3317145305:F8336492B046ED93271C4CF7B9C2C32A:r)**

Peter, $7 or more today really would go a long way in helping us:
1. Register thousands of new voters across the Peach State
2. Reach persuadable voters who will be crucial to victory in November
3. Pay for airtime in expensive Georgia TV markets

In a race as close as the one we're facing, every dollar is make or break.

**[Please let us know we can count on you for your support today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59738023:6VQXd5ENj:m:1:3317145305:F8336492B046ED93271C4CF7B9C2C32A:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59738023:6VQXd5ENj:m:1:3317145305:F8336492B046ED93271C4CF7B9C2C32A:r)

Republican Candidate for Senate

clean_body: "MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION." | Peter, It's becoming clearer by the day that this Senate race in Georgia is going to be THE race that will decide control of the Senate. But don't take our word for it. Recently our opponent sent out an email to let his supporters know CNN had named him the " MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION." There you have it ... straight from our opponent's campaign. When we tell you how critical this race is, we really mean it. According to recent polling, the race is too close to call. Peter, $7 or more today really would go a long way in helping us: 1. Register thousands of new voters across the Peach State 2. Reach persuadable voters who will be crucial to victory in November 3. Pay for airtime in expensive Georgia TV markets In a race as close as the one we're facing, every dollar is make or break. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but {{unsubscribeUrl}}. name: Rick Scott
subject: Put America FIRST!
body:
Peter,
America should be dependent on NO other country.

We must stop trade that takes away jobs or displaces American workers.

_And above all, we MUST stop giving financial support to nations who OPPOSE us in the United Nations and want to watch America fail._

**After the weak Biden Administration, it’s time to start putting AMERICA FIRST again.**

I put together an 11-point plan to **Rescue America** , and putting America FIRST is a critical part of our plan.

I want to see if patriots like you stand with me, so I put together a survey to find out if YOU’RE ready to put America first again.

[**Please take our “America First” survey TODAY and let us know if YOU want to put America FIRST again. **](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=56687d87cb234c39b72cd0ca685d93a8&_e=2w1vTNI0idmPqix_CU6fUQRnxF5ywruh0UpFEZK5xgMqjf8RTZAHK0HsVqwr3yUifJGxoy1i5966Tp_Q7dfIO5A2uUnr2KYGTxkByosdMsdkDuOC_hB4K2qBqze2onX8jJgLyxWBM8sFvw_BXmzp9T0-6Aqyh95JxcalAZCiwn34yFUZHvZzvpfT97Q467JDOaNeIgY2xAbbKuAol-9MzdFckrL3gA2IfiQXA7jb1-FOU36Z3u1BVmEuyOuZ8ojoM2mL0doQhMY0eXvLwMYi8ZQxB8VQsKXw6vCrV9aAUhc0lp-gK73pjcZ0gPkaxodlM6Tpc0TklkmJRyqDlifbWIQ1JiyM0wYDoF6Chq-96eQzRPJZRipzQaBGcKbU5lXIPxY9oZkBcp2u8ISaw-4X6hQ0xsDvXrHB9mbxEGNE6ic%3D)

Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. In 2020, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 118 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

For a long time, it worked. But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. It comes down to Democrats on May 24 to nominate the best lawyer who will attract broad support so that Texas can finally be rid of Mr. Paxton. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13604542?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=d11e74c720&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | ,
Ken Paxton and George P. Bush are in a runoff. They will wage ugly and abusive campaigns, playing on voters’ fears, and Paxton will win.

Despite Mr. Paxton’s three-count criminal indictment, multiple investigations by the FBI and others, and his arrogant attitude that he is above the law – as reflected in the State Bar of Texas ethics complaint against him - the Texas GOP base will not clean house.

It will be a masterpiece of shame. So, it comes down to Democrats on May 24 to nominate the best lawyer who will attract broad support in November so that Texas can finally be rid of Mr. Paxton.

The Democratic primary was a great exhibition of substance and civility. Ms. Garza, Mr. Merritt, Judge Fields, and Mr. Raynor have earned my respect. **Now, Ms. Garza and I are in a runoff.** It’s a new race, and once again I’m going to show voters the positive and hopeful side of politics, just as I have done all my career as a consequential Galveston Mayor and a third-generation Texas lawyer who for three decades has made a difference in the lives of tens of thousands of families in our great State. I will proudly and positively campaign with Ms. Garza to inspire voters of every kind to choose the better candidate who can and will defeat Mr. Paxton in the fall.

**Electing a Democrat to the office of Texas Attorney General is critical to saving Texas. **

That’s what my campaign is about. Electing a Democrat to replace Ken Paxton is all that matters now.

I’m asking voters to run with me to make that happen.
[**Will you donate to my campaign so we can win the runoff and defeat Ken Paxton in November?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=1999867b05&e=5d8d80652b)

— Joe

name: Team Benson
subject: Partisan Republicans want to make it harder to vote
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

Voting by mail is safe and secure. In fact, people have been casting absentee ballots for decades, many of whom are senior citizens and elected officials whose names you would know.

In 2018, Michigan voters thought everyone should have the right to vote by mail so they voted to enshrine the right to vote by absentee ballot in the Michigan Constitution. Thanks to Jocelyn, many of those first time absentee voters accessed applications for an absentee ballot online. The end result? In the 2020 pandemic more people cast ballots in the November general election than at any time in Michigan history.
The attraction was not unique to 2020. Just this week, up to 80 percent of Michigan voters who cast ballots in special elections did so by absentee ballot.

So why are some state lawmakers trying to make it harder to vote? Those partisans are telling Jocelyn Benson to adopt measures that would make it harder to obtain an application for an absentee ballot? If they have their way, there would be no online applications for absentee ballots and it would be easier for ballots to be thrown away before they are counted.

Jocelyn has forcefully called out those legislators and the partisan lies that are motivating them.

“I will not let a small group of partisan legislators restrict those rights to spread and codify long debunked conspiracy theories and lies.”
Friend, this is just another example of partisans trying to undermine the will of the voters and the sanctity of our election process. But once again, Jocelyn is standing in their way. Thanks to her leadership, the voter-approved constitutional right to vote from home will not be thwarted.While Jocelyn is committed to winning this fight, the war on democracy and our election process won’t end anytime soon. If you want Jocelyn’s continued leadership and protection over our democracy, donate to her re-election campaign today.

Donate >> secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=030422]T

eam Benson

body:
What are they so happy about? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066209?e=eda539b26b)

| | Fellow Patriot:

Last night, the **illegitimate senile puppet** who calls himself the President gave his first State of the Union speech.

**__The most disgusting thing about the charade was seeing REPUBLICANS give the Fake President a STANDING OVATION!__**

_What were those RINOs clapping for?_

Was it for our soaring hyperinflation?

Was it for the gas that now costs up to $5 a gallon?

Was it for the empty shelves at the market?

Was it for pushing Russia into the arms of China and creating a deadly alliance through the malicious mismanagement of our foreign policy?

Was it for the prospect of nuclear war?

Was it for skyrocketing crime in our absolutely Third World cities?

Was it for the one million Americans killed by drug overdoses in the last 20 years?

Was it for the controlled demolition of the Dollar and our economy?

Was it for the DESTRUCTION of our Southern Border and the aiding and abetting of an INVASION of millions of criminals into our country?

Was it for the deadly COVID injections or the other tyrannical COVID mandates?

**The REAL State of our Union is horrific.**

__We are losing our country, and the Republicans who are supposed to fighting the Left for us are instead CHEERING for Biden and Pelosi, COLLABORATING with the Enemy!__

They’re all clapping and patting each other on the back, laughing at the same sick joke.

_And we’re the punchline. You and me, We the People._

**It’s time for a new Republican Party.

A REAL Republican Party.**

Wisconsin's Supreme Court sided with the voters of this state and enacted Gov. Evers' redistricting proposal. This decision is an absolute game-changer – **we just became one of the most competitive districts in the entire country overnight.**

It's a huge boost for this campaign, but it means nothing unless we capitalize on this moment. So before I go any further, I've got to ask – [**can you rush a contribution of $5 or more to help me flip this freshly-drawn district blue? >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42575723/333482124/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220304_mapsRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2IxYTIxZC1mNjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1TFU7IZBppOJ_DPohvvljKGqFpCmjWKFVLQIrZnwLPU=)

Republicans in our state legislature tried desperately to cling to their majority, submitting only maps that would benefit them for the next decade or more, just like they did in 2010. They called in every favor and tried using every legal loophole to maintain their legislative control. **Thankfully, the court saw through their deception and chose to side with what matters most in elections — the voters.**

**Let me be clear, this is not a victory lap or celebration for our campaign.** These new maps were drawn to make our elections fair, and ensure each district is representative of its people.

All that's changed in this race is this: **we went from a long-shot in a gerrymandered district to a true contender in a fairly drawn one.** But our work is far from over. Bryan Steil and his special interest funders won't go down without a fight, and they'll bring out every dirty trick they can to hang on to this seat.

Now – **right now** – is when I need your help to reach voters and fight back against the attacks that are headed my way.

**[I am confident that I'm the best candidate to represent this district — but I know that my work is cut out for me. Please, pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help me capitalize on this momentum, and be the representative this district deserves.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42575730/333482131/-1845067772?refcode=em22_220304_mapsRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2IxYTIxZC1mNjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1TFU7IZBppOJ_DPohvvljKGqFpCmjWKFVLQIrZnwLPU=)**

The battle over redistricting may be over, but it shows just how far Republicans are willing to go to stay in power. They'll continue to put up a fight, **but I'm ready for the challenge.**

We need a voice of reason in Congress, and I will be that voice. My top priority will always be you, the people of Wisconsin's 1st Congressional District.

Let's get to work.

– Ann Roe

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hello,
In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my reelection campaign and Mark Kelly’s. But I hope you’ll take a minute to let me explain why your support matters so much, especially right now.
As you may know, my 2016 Senate election was one of the closest in history. I won by 1,017 votes and unseated a Republican incumbent in the most expensive Senate race New Hampshire had ever seen.
Mitch McConnell and his allies have spent over $7.5 million attacking me – more than any other Senate Democrat on the ballot next year. They’re backed by dark money, far-right billionaires, and super PACs with bottomless war chests. If we’re going to stand up to their attacks and win this race, it’s going to take an army of grassroots supporters.
That's why my team set an emergency goal of $10,000. We can’t match the Republican mega-donors and their million-dollar checks, but we can show the strength of our campaign with people like you chipping in $3 or more whenever you can.
[**Please, can you split $3 between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s before midnight tonight? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself, and I could really use your support.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-mar22?refcode=em220304-1-15&t=1&refcode2=2260_6688874_gveOUv&akid=2260%2E6688874%2EgveOUv)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-mar22?refcode=em220304-1-15&t=2&refcode2=2260_6688874_gveOUv&akid=2260%2E6688874%2EgveOUv)**
I first got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that children like my son Ben, who experiences severe disabilities, would be fully included in their communities and have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children. I ran for office to make a difference for as many people who needed my help as I could and to ensure all Americans have the opportunity to succeed.
I still remember the long night in 2017 when Senate Republicans tried to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and they failed by one vote. I realized that night that if it weren’t for 1,017 votes in New Hampshire, a Republican would have been in my seat – and millions of Americans would have lost their health care coverage.
That’s why I’m so grateful for grassroots supporters like you, my friend. Your support got us those 1,017 votes we needed to flip this seat in 2016. Your enthusiasm helped us flip the Senate and win the White House in 2020. And with you on our team, we are going to take on the tough fight ahead and keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue this November.
[**Please contribute $3 or whatever you can to my campaign and Mark Kelly’s today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-mar22?refcode=em220304-1-15&t=3&refcode2=2260_6688874_gveOUv&akid=2260%2E6688874%2EgveOUv)
Thank you for being with me.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-mar22?refcode=em220304-1-15&t=4&refcode2=2260_6688874_gveOUv&akid=2260%2E6688874%2EgveOUv)

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=2260%2E6688874%2EgveOUv).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
clean_body: Hello, In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my reelection campaign and Mark Kelly’s. But I hope you’ll take a minute to let me explain why your support matters so much, especially right now. As you may know, my 2016 Senate election was one of the closest in history. I won by 1,017 votes and unseated a Republican incumbent in the most expensive Senate race New Hampshire had ever seen. Mitch McConnell and his allies have spent over $7.5 million attacking me – more than any other Senate Democrat on the ballot next year. They’re backed by dark money, far-right billionaires, and super PACs with bottomless war chests. If we’re going to stand up to their attacks and win this race, it’s going to take an army of grassroots supporters. That's why my team set an emergency goal of $10,000. We can’t match the Republican mega-donors and their million-dollar checks, but we can show the strength of our campaign with people like you chipping in $3 or more whenever you can. I first got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that children like my son Ben, who experiences severe disabilities, would be fully included in their communities and have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children. I ran for office to make a difference for as many people who needed my help as I could and to ensure all Americans have the opportunity to succeed. I still remember the long night in 2017 when Senate Republicans tried to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and they failed by one vote. I realized that night that if it weren’t for 1,017 votes in New Hampshire, a Republican would have been in my seat – and millions of Americans would have lost their health care coverage. That’s why I’m so grateful for grassroots supporters like you, my friend. Your support got us those 1,017 votes we needed to flip this seat in 2016. Your enthusiasm helped us flip the Senate and win the White House in 2020. And with you on our team, we are going to take on the tough fight ahead and keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue this November. Thank you for being with me. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
