name: Ronny Jackson
subject: Lost my Primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
Patriot, this isn't how I thought today would go... Instead of coming to you with the good news that I was nominated to represent the most MAGA-strong district in the nation, I'm coming to you with this terrible news: **AOC, BERNIE SANDERS, AND OTHER RADICAL LEFT-WING POLITICIANS PROMISE TO FLIP TEXAS AND AMERICA BLUE** Reading this headline made my stomach churn. I barely made it to election day before my campaign funds went dry. Fighting off Beto in 2021 nearly ran me into the ground... And now, I have nothing left in the tank to beat the uber-wealthy socialists AOC and Bernie Sanders. The thought of losing to them makes me physically ill. They'll destroy this country. **The only thing that 's allowed me to remain President Trump's #1 Ally in Congress has been the support of America-loving Patriots like you. ** But I won't last 1 day against these Socialists... I have to reach each and every one of my fundraising goals. Thankfully, President Trump has authorized ONE MORE DAY for me to do that. Please, I'm humbly asking you: [**Can you chip in $25, $100, or even $250 before midnight to GUARANTEE a crucial early victory for President Trump and the GOP?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59736461:6Lxoh5E3N:m:1:3299561967:5C8FCCB5FB8F332DBA013DF21A21A39F:r) [**RUSH $25 BEFORE DEADLINE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59736461:6Lxoh5E3N:m:1:3299561967:5C8FCCB5FB8F332DBA013DF21A21A39F:r) [**RUSH $100 BEFORE DEADLINE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59736461:6Lxoh5E3N:m:1:3299561967:5C8FCCB5FB8F332DBA013DF21A21A39F:r) [**RUSH $250 BEFORE DEADLINE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59736461:6Lxoh5E3N:m:1:3299561967:5C8FCCB5FB8F332DBA013DF21A21A39F:r) [**RUSH ANY AMOUNT BEFORE DEADLINE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59736461:6Lxoh5E3N:m:1:3299561967:5C8FCCB5FB8F332DBA013DF21A21A39F:r) AOC and Bernie think they have me in the bag... What they don't know is that I have the support of Pro-Trump Conservatives like you, Patriot. Our Republican Majority is in serious danger of being lost. Nancy Pelosi knows that THIS RACE is the only thing keeping our hopes alive. If we can hit this fundraising goal by midnight tonight, me, Donald Trump, and the ENTIRE MAGA MOVEMENT will be grateful. Please, Trump needs me in office. He needs me to win this race. [**Will you make sure I have the resources to do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59736461:6Lxoh5E3N:m:1:3299561967:5C8FCCB5FB8F332DBA013DF21A21A39F:r) Thank you for your support, Ronny Jackson | Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson

We’re THRILLED – Biden’s HISTORIC nominee, Judge Jackson, will FINALLY fight back against Trump’s far-right cronies on the Supreme Court!

Peter,

Last week, President Joe Biden made history by nominating the first Black woman to the United States Supreme Court. Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson is highly-qualified to succeed Justice Stephen Breyer and will carry on his legacy of fighting for equal rights and justice for all.

President Biden's nomination is a critical symbol of progress and hope for all Americans, and particularly for millions of young Black women who will see themselves represented in the highest court of the land. Our institutions should look like the people they serve, and I commend President Biden for this historic nomination.

Now that President Biden has named a qualified and experienced nominee, we need the Senate to do their job and commit to a fair confirmation process without delay.

Fellow Patriot,

The American Truckers Freedom Convoy is UNDERWAY! Two of our convoys have launched and more are set to get rolling in the coming days.

Our grassroots movement has been building for two weeks and now it’s go time. The amazing support from patriots all across the country has allowed us to get this far, **[but we urgently need more gas sponsors to get our Truckers across the country.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpkiro8muk8caurohk41g096lgq5ass6en33gb58_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5h62o34c1h2bs "but we urgently need more gas sponsors to get our Truckers across the country.")**
**_[FILL A GAS TANK](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlrf802tqavm2sr4rjlh809v7mvoa4tj6daukeu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5h62o34c1h2bs "FILL A GAS TANK")_**
This movement is critical in the face of the politicians quietly trying to sweep COVID under the rug while they maintain their emergency powers. **Our message is clear: End every mandate. End every restriction. End the Emergency.**

**[We’re humbly asking you to help us get every truck that wants to join the convoy to our freedom rally in Virginia by chipping in today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsfrut7892g18msopkbomukl5h6cegcllc4m3928_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5h62o34c1h2bs "We’re humbly asking you to help us get every truck that wants to join the convoy to our freedom rally in Virginia by chipping in today.")**

The more trucks we get to the Freedom Rally, the more the politicians in DC will listen to our leadership delegation when they go meet with lawmakers.

In Freedom,

American Truckers Freedom Convoy

| [**_I have an incredible opportunity to win my race in just 74 days and be the Democratic leader that PA-12 deserves. But I’m still $2,836 short of my weekly goal, so I’m asking you to rush $15 to close the gap >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42576688/333487435/-2096412469?refcode=20220304_em_fr_b1_peoplelike_realopens&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2QzZGNkYy1mOTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PWBDCByLA4B0Csm7Pa0HD54EYbE6-h8myRpOC7det5U=) Listen, I’m running because I’ve seen first hand the people in my life suffer at the hands of the GOP. We cannot wait to fix the broken systems that set up everyone, but the very wealthy, to struggle, not thrive. [**People like my parents.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42576689/333487436/-2096412469?refcode=20220304_em_fr_b1_peoplelike_realopens&amount=21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2QzZGNkYy1mOTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PWBDCByLA4B0Csm7Pa0HD54EYbE6-h8myRpOC7det5U=) My mom suffered a stroke and my dad was diagnosed with cancer. The crippling weight of healthcare costs almost destroyed our family. It is horrifying to watch Republicans in Congress continue to push for less access to healthcare at the expense of American families. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42576690/333487437/-2096412469?refcode=20220304_em_fr_b1_peoplelike_realopens&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2QzZGNkYy1mOTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PWBDCByLA4B0Csm7Pa0HD54EYbE6-h8myRpOC7det5U=)

name: Ronny Jackson
subject: I lost my primary, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
Peter, this isn't how I thought today would go... Instead of coming to you with the good news that I was nominated to represent the most MAGA-strong district in the nation, I'm coming to you with this terrible news: **AOC, BERNIE SANDERS, AND OTHER RADICAL LEFT-WING POLITICIANS PROMISE TO FLIP TEXAS AND AMERICA BLUE** Reading this headline made my stomach churn. I barely made it to election day before my campaign funds went dry. Fighting off Beto in 2021 nearly ran me into the ground... And now, I have nothing left in the tank to beat the uber-wealthy socialists AOC and Bernie Sanders. The thought of losing to them makes me physically ill. They'll destroy this country. **The only thing that 's allowed me to remain President Trump's #1 Ally in Congress has been the support of America-loving Patriots like you. ** But I won't last 1 day against these Socialists... I have to reach each and every one of my fundraising goals. Thankfully, President Trump has authorized ONE MORE DAY for me to do that. I barely made it to election day before my campaign funds went dry. Fighting off Beto in 2021 nearly ran me into the ground... And now, I have nothing left in the tank to beat the uber-wealthy socialists AOC and Bernie Sanders. The thought of losing to them makes me physically ill. They'll destroy this country. The only thing that 's allowed me to remain President Trump's #1 Ally in Congress has been the support of America-loving Patriots like you. But I won't last 1 day against these Socialists... name: Nikki Fried
subject: Tell Ron DeSantis to VETO the abortion ban
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter —

Last night, the GOP finally did what they’ve been trying to do for decades. They banned abortion in Florida after 15 weeks, with no exception for rape, incest, or human trafficking.

We need to fight back, Peter.

So today, I’m asking everyone in Florida who supports women’s rights to stand with us and tell DeSantis to VETO HB 5 and stop the assault on our freedom. Click here to add your name now, and I’ll personally deliver it to Governor DeSantis. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7X6aP39SVE2oi3cm5QGwFg2]

Sign Our Petition [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7X6aP39SVE2oi3cm5QGwFg2]

We’re not going to let up — and if DeSantis refuses to veto this bill, we’re going to keep fighting until we vote him out on November 8th.

Thank you for standing with me.

— Nikki

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=304followup]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Rogers?=
subject: We got endorsed by Sen. Josh Becker, but need your help telling the community!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,
**Team Mullin has some big news and big new endorsers to report! **

But first, we will be out in Burlingame this week for a big day of action! We will be knocking doors and need your support! Email Brian Rogers, our campaign manager, to RSVP at [Brian@KevinMullinforCongress.com](mailto:Brian@KevinMullinforCongress.com).

Now for the news: earlier this week, Kevin was endorsed by Senator Josh Becker, a leading climate advocate in the California Senate. This is huge! Check out more on this and the latest from the campaign trail below.

[Click here if you're interested in volunteering for Kevin's campaign.](mailto:brian@kevinmullinforcongress.com?subject=Volunteer%20for%20Kevin's%20Campaign%20for%20Congress!)

**Proudly Endorsed by Sen. Josh Becker.** We’re excited to announce that earlier this week, Sen. Josh Becker came out in support of our campaign, stating that Kevin has the “courage and focus it takes to deliver strong, meaningful action on climate change and protect our environment for future generations." Sen. Becker will also volunteer to serve as the chief climate advisor to Kevin’s campaign and will be instrumental in helping shape and implement our climate policy agenda in Congress. We’ll be holding a joint campaign event with Sen. Becker focused on climate priorities in the coming months. Stay tuned!

**We won the California Democratic Party (CDP) pre-endorsement recommendation with 75% of the vote.** We can’t overstate the magnitude of this vote and are thrilled to join the CDP at the 2022 state convention this weekend.
---
| [VOLUNTEER TODAY!](mailto:brian@kevinmullinforcongress.com?subject=Volunteer%20for%20Kevin's%20Campaign%20for%20Congress! "VOLUNTEER TODAY!")
---
| **Backed by District 11 San Francisco Supervisor Ahsha Safaí.** Supervisor Safaí, came out in full support of our campaign, calling Kevin a fighter for families and seniors. We already landed the endorsement of another SF Supervisor, Connie Chan!

**Kevin was named a REACH Ally.** We were that Kevin was named a REACH Coalition Ally! REACH Coalition is a group of local elected officials and community-based organizations of color who are steadfast in dismantling systemic bias and long-standing barriers to access across our county.

**Mull-mentum Is Building: We Need Your Help More Than Ever.** Here’s How You Can Join Our Team! We’re just over three months out from primary day—and we need all hands on deck! If you can spare a few hours in the upcoming weeks to make calls or knock on doors with Kevin, let us know. We'll be holding a join campaign event with Sen. Becker focused on climate priorities in the coming weeks. **Tell Your Friends: Reasons to Support Kevin for Congress **
1. In the Assembly, Kevin has passed a staggering 60 bills into law.
2. Kevin has earned the support of more than 100 current and former leaders from around the district, including U.S. Reps. Jackie Speier and Anna Eshoo, and former State Senator Jerry Hill.
3. Kevin won the first vote-by-mail law in California that led to record turnout, banned dark money in our state elections, secured the largest climate resiliency investment in California history to protect the Bayshore, and fought to increase funding for transportation, education, and affordable housing.
4. In Congress, Kevin will fight to build an economy that works for all of us, advocate for resources and investments in transportation, housing for all, and universal, affordable childcare.

---
| [DONATE](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=c83e68b034&e=292fde286a "DONATE")

name: DASS Action Request
subject: Sign the petition: fix the Electoral Count Act! (DETAILS BELOW)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Team,
Here at DASS, our mission is to elect and re-elect Democratic Secretaries of State. We’re focused on the state level. But saving democracy will require reform at every level of government! [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/fix-eca]
If we hope to stop the far-right and prevent another January 6th, Congress must first reform the broken election certification system. [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/fix-eca]
Most of the problem lies with the Electoral Count Act – an 1887 law that an expert told the New York Times was “one of the most confusing pieces of legislation I’ve ever read” [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/fix-eca] .
We put together a petition to demand Congress revise this crucial legislation and fix our election certification, and we need your signature. Help DASS protect democracy on every level – add your name to the petition today! >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/fix-eca]
ADD MY NAME >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/fix-eca]

subject: What Delivering Results Means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indgop/what-delivering-results-means?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_What Delivering Results Means_**
---
|
---
_**Chairman Kyle Hupfer** speaks on a panel at the 2022 Congress of Counties about what's on the horizon for the Indiana General Assembly. He was joined by **Speaker of the Indiana House of Representatives Todd Huston** and **Senate Majority Floor Lead Mark Messmer**. _
| Last weekend we hosted over 400 registered attendees from all across the state at the historic French Lick Resort in French Lick, Ind., for our 2022 Congress of Counties. And thanks to you, our presenters, panelists, vendors, special guests, and staff, it was another **huge success**!

There is nothing better than gathering with a group of fired-up Hoosier Republicans who are ready to put in the work to win this November—it's events like this that bring us our successes and keep us the **dominant** force in Indiana politics.

But this is only possible because we deliver results. Indeed, it's strong Republican leadership that has put Indiana in the successful position that it is today—whether it's in regard to our economy, our infrastructure, or our state's finances. And it's strong Republican leadership that has again brought us to a moment where we can cut taxes for hardworking Hoosiers and businesses.

Yesterday, **Governor Holcomb** released an op-ed putting his full support behind major income and business tax cuts. I encourage you to read it in its entirety, which you can do [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c72899a835&e=1acd9bb3d6), but there is one section specifically I want to highlight:
_"Since 2005, Indiana has demonstrated strong stewardship of taxpayer dollars while constantly finding ways to responsibly return those dollars to the people and businesses that have helped our state grow—proving that cutting taxes can increase revenue. During that period, we have cut taxes at least 10 times and paid down billions of dollars in debt."_
Thanks again for making the 2022 Congress of Counties a huge success and for your dedication to a party that is focused on delivering results. We can't do this without you.

Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend.

Best,

Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| **_Standing with the People of Ukraine_**
---
|
---
| On Monday, **Governor Holcomb** signed an executive order in response to Putin’s all-out attack on the people of Ukraine.

The executive order takes the following actions, among others:
* The Indiana Department of Administration will review all state contracts that involve Russian-owned or Russian-affiliated companies.
* The Indiana Office of Technology will continue to strengthen our critical state infrastructure to protect the system from Russian cyber-attacks and the Governor encourages private businesses to do the same.
* The Commission for Higher Education will request that public colleges and universities report all Russian funding received for programs, research, and grants and report its findings to the governor’s office.
* The state of Indiana will standby to assist Ukrainian refugees should a federal policy, program, or initiative be implemented requiring access to appropriate locations across the country.

You can click **[here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4b6dce1500&e=1acd9bb3d6)** to see the full executive order.
---
|
---
| _**ICYMI: Holcomb throws support behind major tax cuts for Hoosiers, businesses**_
---
| INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Indiana Gov. Eric Holcomb threw his full support Thursday behind major state tax cuts, saying tax collections were strong enough to overcome his previous reluctance. Holcomb released a statement endorsing much of a plan for broad business and individual tax cuts pushed by Indiana House Republicans that has been opposed by Senate Republican leaders. Holcomb has for several months sided with those Senate Republicans, citing uncertainty in the economy, until signaling a shift in his opinion last week.

Read more [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=002af46668&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
| **_Rep. Victoria Spartz on the Russian Invasion of Ukraine_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9200de5513&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Last Tuesday, **Rep. Victoria Spartz** spoke at the House Republicans leadership news conference on Russia's invasion of Ukraine. "This is not a war. This is genocide of the Ukrainian people by a crazy man," stated **Rep. Spartz**.

She also criticized President Biden for his initial soft approach to Russia’s invasion of Ukraine. “We have a president that talks ... and doesn’t do things,” **Rep. Spartz** said. “What is he going to do, wait until millions die? Then he’s going to do more? I mean, we have not just a moral duty, we are the leaders of the free world.”
---
|
---
| **_Chairman Kyle Hupfer on Biden's First State of the Union Address_**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Celebrating Women's History Month_**
---
|
---
| This Women's History Month, we at the Indiana Republican Party are celebrating the contributions and achievements of the Hoosier women who work every day to deliver results for our great state.

Peter – We know it's a Friday so we'll keep this short. **These are the top three reasons why Abby needs you to make a donation before 11:59 p.m. tonight so we can defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA):**
1.) Nearly two-thirds of likely voters in Iowa don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley to an EIGHTH term. This is our best opportunity in _decades_ to flip this Senate seat blue.

2.) The Senate GOP campaign arm, however, is sitting on a war chest of $39 MILLION to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley, defeat Democratic challengers like Abby and retake the Senate majority – putting Mitch McConnell and his allies back in charge.

3.) Iowa is ready for new leadership, and The Hill is reporting Sen. Grassley faces a "tough race" against Abby, the youngest woman in American history to flip a House seat from red to blue.
**The path to expanding our Senate majority runs straight through Iowa – but Abby will need powerful grassroots fundraising to compete with GOP resources and defeat Sen. Grassley. Flipping this seat starts with you, Peter.**

clean_body: These are the top three reasons why Abby needs you to make a donation before 11:59 p.m. tonight. | | | Peter – We know it's a Friday so we'll keep this short. These are the top three reasons why Abby needs you to make a donation before 11:59 p.m. tonight so we can defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA): 1.) Nearly two-thirds of likely voters in Iowa don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley to an EIGHTH term. This is our best opportunity in decades to flip this Senate seat blue. 2.) The Senate GOP campaign arm, however, is sitting on a war chest of $39 MILLION to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley, defeat Democratic challengers like Abby and retake the Senate majority – putting Mitch McConnell and his allies back in charge. 3.) Iowa is ready for new leadership, and The Hill is reporting Sen. Grassley faces a "tough race" against Abby, the youngest woman in American history to flip a House seat from red to blue. The path to expanding our Senate majority runs straight through Iowa – but Abby will need powerful grassroots fundraising to compete with GOP resources and defeat Sen. Grassley. Flipping this seat starts with you, Peter. To keep pace with GOP resources, Abby needs to raise another $15,000 before midnight tonight. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: I’m running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. Can I count on your help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
|
---
[](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUkNptnKAl3EcH8CLpTUYl_aFRHXP-CI5fxSw9g5Y-uIo&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220304_launch&n=1) Friend, **My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common-sense to our political discourse.** As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase patriotism to serve their own vile beliefs. **I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.** Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- **and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.** [**I hope to earn your support on this next mission, and there's no time to waste. Will you help me win this race by donating to my campaign today?**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUkNptnKAl3EcH8CLpTUYl_aFRHXP-CI5fxSw9g5Y-uIo&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220304_launch&n=2) | [](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUnyPRFECPFpzcthatk_4Wfab-8MmjAxFmA9m5fxGViYw&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220304_launch&n=3 "DONATE NOW >> ") [DONATE NOW >> ](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUnyPRFECPFpzcthatk_4Wfab-8MmjAxFmA9m5fxGViYw&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220304_launch&n=4)
---
**Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene isn't going to be easy.** She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused.
[**If you believe that Greene is unfit to serve and that Georgia deserves better -- chip in now to help us start this campaign off on the right foot.**](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUkNptnKAl3EcH8CLpTUYl_aFRHXP-CI5fxSw9g5Y-uIo&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220304_launch&n=5)
Together we can accomplish great things,
Marcus Flowers
Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
PO Box 532 Rome, GA 30162 United States
[](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUkNptnKAl3EcH8CLpTUYl_aFRHXP-CI5fxSw9g5Y-uIo&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220304_launch&n=6 "DONATE NOW >> ") [DONATE NOW >> ](https://www.marcusforgeorgia.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsn0D366fuE1hyM8nYo_dxUkNptnKAl3EcH8CLpTUYl_aFRHXP-CI5fxSw9g5Y-uIo&e=3c0efca69a2e76c4868c82f23dff8b2a&utm_source=marcusflowers&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=220304_launch&n=7)

This week, Conor was endorsed by the **National Organization for Women (NOW)** – the largest organization of feminist grassroots activists in the United states. The NOW PAC has worked since 1977 to elect uncompromising feminists to the White House and Congress, and we could not be prouder to receive this endorsement.

With more than 13,000 contributing members in the NOW chapter right here in Pennsylvania, this adds to our growing momentum to get Conor to the Senate.

**[May 17th is just around the corner, so will you join our coalition to elect Conor Lamb to the Senate by helping him win this election?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42579086/333497068/-993140480?refcode=em22_220304_endorsement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjU1ZGY0NC0wMTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PupAOj3ctrj_UgzcQDPXP4x-DZz9lTtMO0i8lR4AsI=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42579087/333497069/-993140480?refcode=em22_220304_endorsement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjU1ZGY0NC0wMTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PupAOj3ctrj_UgzcQDPXP4x-DZz9lTtMO0i8lR4AsI=)
Just this week, the Senate GOP and Sen. Manchin blocked the **Women's Health Protection Act** , the bill that would codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law and guarantee a woman's right to choose. **Nina Ahmad, Chair of the PA Chapter of the NOW PAC knows “women's right to choose is seriously at risk” and “Congressman Conor Lamb's record is evidence of his strong support for women's rights.”**

This is why so many people across the country are counting on us to win this race – to end the filibuster, to protect a woman's right to choose, and to help make the Women’s Health Protection Act into law.

This latest endorsement is just one part of the coalition we are building to get there – one that stands for workers and unions, for children and families, and for true equality. That's why we are also proud and honored to be endorsed by the **Steel City Stonewall Democrats** and together we will pass the **Equality Act** in the Senate to guarantee full and equal rights under the law for all LGBTQ+ Americans.

**[We know what it takes to win in November, because we have the diverse support we need behind us, but we need the fundraising support to power this movement – without dark money and corporate PACs. Can you chip in to push our coalition all the way to the Senate?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42579088/333497070/-993140480?refcode=em22_220304_endorsement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjU1ZGY0NC0wMTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PupAOj3ctrj_UgzcQDPXP4x-DZz9lTtMO0i8lR4AsI=)**

clean_body: | = | = This week, Conor was endorsed by the National Organization for Women (NOW) – the largest organization of feminist grassroots activists in the United states. The NOW PAC has worked since 1977 to elect uncompromising feminists to the White House and Congress, and we could not be prouder to receive this endorsement. With more than 13,000 contributing members in the NOW chapter right here in Pennsylvania, this adds to our growing momentum to get Conor to the Senate. = = Just this week, the Senate GOP and Sen. Manchin blocked the Women's Health Protection Act , the bill that would codify Roe v. Wade into law and guarantee a woman's right to choose. Nina Ahmad, Chair of the PA Chapter of the NOW PAC knows “women's right to choose is seriously at risk” and “Congressman Conor Lamb's record is evidence of his strong support for women's rights.” This is why so many people across the country are counting on us to win this race – to end the filibuster, to protect a woman's right to choose, and to help make the Women’s Health Protection Act into law. This latest endorsement is just one part of the coalition we are building to get there – one that stands for workers and unions, for children and families, and for true equality. That's why we are also proud and honored to be endorsed by the Steel City Stonewall Democrats and together we will pass the Equality Act in the Senate to guarantee full and equal rights under the law for all LGBTQ+ Americans. = = Thank you for standing with Conor and our movement. – Team Lamb = = *

body:
To win back control of Congress in November's elections, it's going to take an army of conservative warriors. We all must do our part. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=19c90639f3d946f689e926a2842f1513&_e=vq68vLOC55aTLE9mQy1jxnII-EEw6zvklx7FeUYSp4aqOw-16ljF7iyvwV6GMXO_pf8n3j8uGobEv7DIhu3dWkNVqlpp5jWlIavefnL2xPbu17fkTV_6JZAZao8r56Pwd5Nq1HEU8QnBwHZ9tqWYbNd9nphMGa1ZK5Jjfpv-TwfMdWEqsaLWjc58i1gYToOnY6FU3WZAj0UAXujhWP9msoBofZC8G-CQ-cwJM_2URLvZAehNlgSBOfgFlr5uTl9isb5Uw9qINuz_q-EKUW8PkV3DsFO3nOlvWqi2rN0Pt1ASSr2boi7CaR9bVcj2Gza_lxamYSD3OB33RhEEpBVl0Kix0rwJWr_Jd3zkWAsbYyZmuXkQYxgYOazKAv5NNoiOrpYF878fG0E6WSo5ADMkKC96U60zLgRqJ4hN1OF7wDbzpD5pWtLQNAW1lvJr6lel2qO00hWU5zhJUthBaEPO-QSxDflgh0v9BgbDORZLtUc%3D)

Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. In 2020, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 118 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=19c90639f3d946f689e926a2842f1513&_e=vq68vLOC55aTLE9mQy1jxnII-EEw6zvklx7FeUYSp4aqOw-16ljF7iyvwV6GMXO_pf8n3j8uGobEv7DIhu3dWkNVqlpp5jWlIavefnL2xPbu17fkTV_6JZAZao8r56Pwd5Nq1HEU8QnBwHZ9tqWYbNd9nphMGa1ZK5Jjfpv-TwfMdWEqsaLWjc58i1gYToOnY6FU3WZAj0UAXujhWP9msoBofZC8G-CQ-cwJM_2URLvZAehNlgSBOfgFlr5uTl9isb5Uw9qINuz_q-EKUW8PkZljfLqkIbJtCvbYxbnIRa6qqQijNNPDKpSGbUwDz4LaYRSH6xSRmULj0dEwWub6xZk7nJPSwvprFZuFOt6WwX0r-yMce35ToxXbKy4scfah1rWx0yurUAAKX0y1b6gzSCpQfusvOpQj-Ok6D6cTrWFL64d2ECj_HxLjcqLCXtiZK7WmN6IHXnjjRWaCIlRFDAEfFhabYyHOhZkIHclfCtE%3D)

clean_body: To win back control of Congress in November's elections, it's going to take an army of conservative warriors. We all must do our part. | Fellow patriot, Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked. But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better. Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs. Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. In 2020, Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 118 years. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas. Will you please to help me end 118 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat she's currently running for? I encouraged Monica to try again – a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. . Monica has set a personal goal of raising $15,000 before March 15th, and I’ve pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas. We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community. Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica’s race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED! subject: the UN’s latest climate report is scary

body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lLfW8DaBIhwp73GWm6DNfA_H_6TYzHARO665_yHwalY=/_6XJk7BvSYu8dwvg4dA3aLmi2-efzzDdKWZtLAdXI6s=) | Peter, Did you see the UN's latest climate report? It predicts that climate change is rapidly getting worse, and will cause devastating human suffering, unless we take immediate action. This won't be a shock to people here in the Central Valley - we're already feeling the disastrous effects with warming temperatures, longer droughts and deadly wildfires. Josh knows that climate change is an existential threat unless we get ahead of the crisis. **That 's why he introduced a landmark piece of climate legislation (the FARM Act) to get every community involved in fighting back.** [**Will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of this legislation to help us fight back against climate change?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lLfW8DaBIhwp73GWm6DNfA_H_6TYzHARO665_yHwalY=/_6XJk7BvSYu8dwvg4dA3aLmi2-efzzDdKWZtLAdXI6s=) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/lLfW8DaBIhwp73GWm6DNfA_H_6TYzHARO665_yHwalY=/_6XJk7BvSYu8dwvg4dA3aLmi2-efzzDdKWZtLAdXI6s=) If we don't get our act together now, the UN predicts we will see "unavoidable" consequences including deadly heat, more fires, worse floods, and severe drought. Many of these effects will be "irreversible" but they can still be prevented or mitigated with immediate action. Josh's climate bill will mean real action by providing our farmers with the critical funding they need to alleviate the impacts of climate change. **By making sure farmers have the resources they need to reduce greenhouse gas emissions, improve air, water, and soil quality, and enact more sustainable farming practices, we can make a real difference right here at home in the fight to save our planet.** [**Will you add your name today as a citizen co-sponsor of the FARM Act?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lLfW8DaBIhwp73GWm6DNfA_H_6TYzHARO665_yHwalY=/_6XJk7BvSYu8dwvg4dA3aLmi2-efzzDdKWZtLAdXI6s=) The solution we need is to act! \- Team Harder

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3mcj0--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children’s future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn’t good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama’s extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama’s administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife’s—we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats’ complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government’s failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans’ lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address—unifying and healing America—it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else’s fight, this is our fight, and it’s a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I’d like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don’t feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing—truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don’t want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn’t your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven’t made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don’t expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Fellow Conservative, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mcj0-21iub-4qqlpo7/ "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mcj0-21iuc-4qqlpo8/)
---
| Fellow Conservative, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mcj0-21iud-4qqlpo9/ "Please click here to donate now")**
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3mcj0-21iue-4qqlpo0/ "SAVE THE SENATE")
---

| Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc.

name: Eric Gash
subject: The end of our campaign, not the end of our fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Gash for Congress
body:
|
#
Friend, **Earlier today, with a heavy heart, I announced that I am withdrawing from the race for U.S. Congress in Western North Carolina.** Last week, my family experienced a life-changing medical crisis. If you’ve met me, you’ve likely heard me say that my mom is the strongest person I know. She’s always been there through my and Sam’s darkest days. The next few months will be critical for her care, so now it’s my chance to be strong for her. I got into this race because I saw an overwhelming absence of leadership in our community. I’m truly grateful for the wisdom, guidance, and encouragement I’ve received this past year from Democrats and Republicans alike eager for a return to accountable, responsive leadership in Western North Carolina. It will take unprecedented focus, cooperation, and organizing to reignite the competitive political resolve of a long-gerrymandered, formerly Democratic-leaning district. Still, I have faith that we can do it. The stakes are too high to fail. I look forward to supporting whichever well-qualified Democrat the voters nominate in the primary. I'll be working my way through along list of calls in the coming days and weeks, but in the meantime please know how grateful I am to every supporter for believing in this campaign, and every dissenter who introduced me to new ways of thinking about the issues. Our work here in these mountains will continue! Not many things could have pulled me away from this mission, but family must always come first and a win in this district will require no less than 110%. My family and I will keep fighting, organizing, and showing up wherever and whenever we can to give this district the bright future it deserves. Thank you from the bottom of my heart. Onward, Eric Gash
---

clean_body: | Friend, Earlier today, with a heavy heart, I announced that I am withdrawing from the race for U.S. Congress in Western North Carolina. Last week, my family experienced a life-changing medical crisis. If you’ve met me, you’ve likely heard me say that my mom is the strongest person I know. She’s always been there through my and Sam’s darkest days. The next few months will be critical for her care, so now it’s my chance to be strong for her. I got into this race because I saw an overwhelming absence of leadership in our community. I’m truly grateful for the wisdom, guidance, and encouragement I’ve received this past year from Democrats and Republicans alike eager for a return to accountable, responsive leadership in Western North Carolina. It will take unprecedented focus, cooperation, and organizing to reignite the competitive political resolve of a long-gerrymandered, formerly Democratic-leaning district. Still, I have faith that we can do it. The stakes are too high to fail. I look forward to supporting whichever well-qualified Democrat the voters nominate in the primary. I'll be working my way through along list of calls in the coming days and weeks, but in the meantime please know how grateful I am to every supporter for believing in this campaign, and every dissenter who introduced me to new ways of thinking about the issues. Our work here in these mountains will continue! Not many things could have pulled me away from this mission, but family must always come first and a win in this district will require no less than 110%. My family and I will keep fighting, organizing, and showing up wherever and whenever we can to give this district the bright future it deserves. Thank you from the bottom of my heart. Onward, Eric Gash | = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Eric Gash for Congress PO BOX 543 Hendersonville, NC 28793 United States | Paid for by Eric Gash for Congress

name: Gwen Moore
subject: Before the weekend begins
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
My Sisters and Brothers,

It’s been a busy week, but I wanted to make sure you know how much I really appreciate you for helping us end February on such a strong note! You truly are the wind beneath my wings.

As our hearts break for Ukrainians, it is important to point out the progress we are making here at home. During his first State of the Union, President Biden noted a number of measures we’ve taken to improve the lives of families across the nation, from the American Rescue Plan to the Bi-partisan Infrastructure Law, and that’s just the beginning.

As we kick off Women’s History Month, I was personally moved to see, for the first time in American history, two women sitting behind him as he delivered his speech, the first woman of color to serve as Vice President, Kamala Harris, and the powerhouse that is the Speaker of the House, Nancy Pelosi.

Thank you again, and have a wonderful weekend.

Together #WeRepresent

-Gwen Moore
Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, when Marjorie Taylor Greene got elected in 2020, the circumstances were bleak.
Marge was ramping up her hateful rhetoric and the only democrat in the race was forced to drop out weeks before the election. This left Marjorie Taylor Greene with a wide open lane to the Halls of Congress. However, the democratic challenger still got 25% of the vote despite no longer running.
Let’s be honest folks, GA-14 democrats were scared and had nowhere to turn in 2020. That won’t be the case in 2022. If a candidate who dropped out got 25% of the vote, imagine what our campaign is capable of.
GA-14 cannot have a repeat of 2020. The same folks who voted for Marge were since abandoned and left in the dust. The atmosphere has shifted and we’re going into 2022 ready to fight.
Team Holly knows this won’t be easy by any means. That’s why we have launched the biggest voter registration program GA-14 has ever seen. The ground work we’ve been doing to flip moderates, outreach voters, and register democrats is how we’re going to win this race. | | Friends,

Gas prices are rising, and Missouri will receive $7 billion in federal funding for infrastructure over the next 5 years. Yet last year, the legislature increased Missouri’s gas tax.

Now is NOT the time to ask Missourians to pay more.

That’s why I am sponsoring a bill to repeal the gas tax increase. My bill has passed committees and is now on its way to House floor.

**Join me at the Rally to Repeal the 2021 Gas Tax Increase** , so we can send a powerful message to our legislature: NO to tax increases!

**WHO: **Sara Walsh and other conservatives
**WHAT: **Rally to Repeal the 2021 Gas Tax Increase
**WHEN:** 3:00 PM, Wednesday, March 9, 2022
**WHERE:** Missouri Capitol Rotunda, First Floor

I hope to see you there!
Sara Walsh

name: Val Hoyle
subject: A record I’m proud of
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42579527/333499335/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODM2ZGM3YS0wNDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=235FQLhqcO_hVLc_J_dMd-F6CXW5YIAq6g-hobN_gFQ=&emci=c696db6d-009c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=a836dc7a-049c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter, I was raised in a proud union household. My dad was the president of his local firefighter's union, and I was walking picket lines before I was old enough to vote. For me, **fighting for working families is in my blood.** I carried those values with me when I served in the state legislature, where I led successful efforts to raise Oregon's minimum wage and provide sick leave for Oregon workers. And I've continued that fight as your Labor Commissioner, heading the agency that is responsible for making sure that workers are protected on the jobsite and receive the pay and benefits they've earned. I'm proud of what we've been able to accomplish since I was elected in 2018. Here are just a few examples:
* Battled wage theft by focusing on the most egregious bad actors, doubling the number of claims from workers and getting them the money they were owed.
* Strictly enforced sick-leave protections during the pandemic to ensure workers had the time they needed to care for themselves and their loved ones.
* Placed a renewed emphasis on pursuing civil rights violations, more than doubling settlement dollars for victims.
* Pushed legislation in Salem to allow workers to earn some part-time money and still retain their UI benefits.
* Improved transparency in the agency by hiring the first ever dedicated public records manager, and eliminating public records fees for the public and the media.

Peter, I'm proud of my record. My opponents have been lobbing untruthful attacks at me and trying to distort my record, but I stand by my accomplishments. I've never backed down when it comes to fighting for the needs of working families and I look forward to taking that fight to Congress on your behalf. That's why I need your help getting the word out about my record supporting working families. **[Donate today to help us fund a grassroots campaign that will fight every single day for working families in Oregon and across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42579528/333499336/-1599294071?refcode=2022-03-04-record&recurring=0&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a836dc7a-049c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODM2ZGM3YS0wNDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=235FQLhqcO_hVLc_J_dMd-F6CXW5YIAq6g-hobN_gFQ=)** With corporate profits and Wall Street gains at all-time highs, we need representatives in Congress who are committed to helping working families. clean_body: | | | Peter, I was raised in a proud union household. My dad was the president of his local firefighter's union, and I was walking picket lines before I was old enough to vote. For me, fighting for working families is in my blood. I carried those values with me when I served in the state legislature, where I led successful efforts to raise Oregon's minimum wage and provide sick leave for Oregon workers. And I've continued that fight as your Labor Commissioner, heading the agency that is responsible for making sure that workers are protected on the jobsite and receive the pay and benefits they've earned. I'm proud of what we've been able to accomplish since I was elected in 2018. Here are just a few examples: Battled wage theft by focusing on the most egregious bad actors, doubling the number of claims from workers and getting them the money they were owed. Strictly enforced sick-leave protections during the pandemic to ensure workers had the time they needed to care for themselves and their loved ones. Placed a renewed emphasis on pursuing civil rights violations, more than doubling settlement dollars for victims. Pushed legislation in Salem to allow workers to earn some part-time money and still retain their UI benefits. Improved transparency in the agency by hiring the first ever dedicated public records manager, and eliminating public records fees for the public and the media. Peter, I'm proud of my record. My opponents have been lobbing untruthful attacks at me and trying to distort my record, but I stand by my accomplishments. I've never backed down when it comes to fighting for the needs of working families and I look forward to taking that fight to Congress on your behalf. That's why I need your help getting the word out about my record supporting working families. = With corporate profits and Wall Street gains at all-time highs, we need representatives in Congress who are committed to helping working families. I made that commitment from my youngest years, and I've stayed true to it ever since. = Val Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by ** Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. subject: Kent Campaign: Heidi Ducks Debate, Hides Behind Lies… Again

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/joekentforcongress/joe-kent-condemns-wa-state-legislature-6181261?e=00856e661d)
---
|
---
|
---
| | **Kent Campaign: Heidi Ducks Debate, Hides Behind Lies... Again**
---
| **DATE: March 4, 2022
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**Contact: Ozzie Gonzalez
Cell: 951.442.0680
[ozzie@joekentforcongress.com](mailto:ozzie@joekentforcongress.com)**
---
| Today, Joe Kent’s campaign manager Ozzie Gonzalez made the following statement:
---
| On yesterday’s Lars Larson show, Heidi St. John turned down a chance to debate Joe Kent on Lars’ program with the bizarre excuse that she’d only debate in person and not over the phone, a requirement of Lars’ Portland-based radio station.

But in early February, she refused the Skamania GOP’s offer of an in-person debate, in her words, “if Joe Kent showed up.”

She said back in November that’s she’d debate in January, and that has also turned out to be a lie.

She demonstrates again and again that she’s not a serious candidate. She broke her promise to drop out of the election if Trump endorsed someone else and blamed that on “not being fully informed.”

She’s far behind in all three independent polls of the race and while Joe’s on the road holding public events in every county in the district, she hides behind attack ads and lies.

It’s becoming apparent to even her most dedicated supporters that she’s not a serious candidate and that it’s time to consolidate behind the conservative who can retire Jaime Herrera Beutler, Joe Kent.
---
| Joe Kent is available for interviews. If interested, please email Ozzie Gonzalez at [ozzie@joekentforcongress.com](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=bd0cccc232&e=00856e661d) or via cell at 951.442.0680. ###

name: Jessica Cisneros
subject: Runoff
body:
#
Peter, this is a big moment.
We’re headed to a runoff election against Henry Cuellar on May 24th, and I need your help as we gear up for another race against the 17-year incumbent.
Right now is crucial — every dollar we bring in today, will help jump-start our campaign to defeat Cuellar in the runoff.
[I need you to step up right now to help me defeat Henry Cuellar on May 24th in the runoff election. Please split a $3 contribution between my campaign and Justice Democrats right now – we need all hands on deck.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97044?refcode=em20220304-22259&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=22259%2E1203867%2EFPzdvC)
**[Contribute now »](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97044?refcode=em20220304-22259&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=22259%2E1203867%2EFPzdvC)**
This fight was about South Texans proving that our dreams could take on their corporate money and that a daughter of immigrants could bring working class leadership back to the community that raised her.
We proved just how powerful our movement is and are ready to keep fighting for the future we deserve. Together, we will take control back from Big Oil, private prisons, and Wall Street, and put it back where it belongs: with the people.
We can defeat Henry Cuellar on May 24th but we need a major influx of grassroots contributions to go up against the support Cuellar receives from corporate PACs, the private prison industry, and the Koch Network. And remember, Henry Cuellar is under FBI investigation.
The people of South Texas deserve a representative who will fight for their interests every step of the way.
[Peter, please split a contribution of any amount that you can afford to jump-start our fundraising for this runoff.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97044?refcode=em20220304-22259&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=22259%2E1203867%2EFPzdvC)
Thank you so much for your support,
Jessica Cisneros

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=22259%2E1203867%2EFPzdvC) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=22259%2E1203867%2EFPzdvC) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220304-22259-footer&t=24&refcode2=22259_1203867_FPzdvC&akid=22259%2E1203867%2EFPzdvC)**
---

JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: VOTING RIGHTS ALERT
subject: Can you believe the Supreme Court allowed this?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42566754/333442061/265476937?code=jtk349-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmJlZDIxYi1kYjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uxnk6BnGbgqRq1Cp5DwWYOaTsh14NY1z8njIIABmfBA=)
---
**_“Supreme Court lets GOP-drawn Alabama congressional map that critics say dilutes power of Black voters stay in place”_**
– CNN
Sign our petition to defend the right to vote for EVERY American
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42566755/333442062/-470528966?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk349-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmJlZDIxYi1kYjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uxnk6BnGbgqRq1Cp5DwWYOaTsh14NY1z8njIIABmfBA=&emci=12b81a7b-9c94-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=9bbed21b-db9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, did you see the disheartening news that came out of the Supreme Court last month?

**The increasingly conservative Supreme Court gave Alabama the green light to employ a congressional map that will severely dilute the voting power of Black voters. **
This alarming racial gerrymandering is accomplished by packing the majority of Black Alabamians (who make up _**27%**_ of the state’s population) into just ONE congressional district. **It gets worse: the Supreme Court has refused to stop this shameless violation of Alabamians voting rights. **

body:
After 13 terms and over 60 years, Iowa needs a new leader who understands and represents the people of Iowa of the 21st century.

| | | **US Senator Chuck Grassley will run for reelection, seeking 8th term: “I hope the people of Iowa will be happy”**

_-Des Moines Register_
---
Peter,

We think Chuck Grassley’s time in Congress is up. Check out just how long he’s been in office:

**1959:** At 26 years old, Chuck Grassley started serving in the Iowa House of Representatives for **three** terms.

**1975:** Grassley served**three** terms in the U.S. House of Representatives.

**1981:** He joined the U.S. Senate for **seven** terms.

**2022:** Chuck Grassley is running for reelection for his **eighth** Senate term at 88 years old.

After **13 terms** and over **60 years** , Iowa needs a new leader who understands and represents the people of Iowa of the 21st century. subject: Peter, Let's Flip Michigan! 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I’m a Marine Corps veteran, Captain with the Michigan State Police and a conservative Republican for Governor. We can win Michigan with your help. | | | |
---
| | | Peter,

The number one Governor's race in the country is in Michigan. We have a real opportunity to flip the state, but I need your help today.

**My name is Michael Brown. I’m a Marine Corps veteran, Captain with the Michigan State Police and a conservative Republican candidate for Governor.**

For the last three years, Gretchen Whitmer has pushed a radical agenda on Michigan's citizens. As a result, her popularity has plummeted and we have an historic opportunity.

Whitmer _devastated small businesses_ with her prolonged lockdown.

She forced Covid patients into nursing homes _needlessly increasing deaths_.

She closed schools and _forced masks on kids_.

She _ordered the shut down of a critical oil pipeline_ in Michigan.

She marched in a “ _defund the police_ ” rally and publicly stated her support for the “spirit of the defund the police” movement.

On issue after issue, Whitmer has shown she is out of touch with everyday Americans.

We can defeat Gretchen Whitmer and flip Michigan back to the red column, and _I need your help today_.

**Will you join me by making a contribution to my campaign? A donation of $25 or $50 will go a long way in defeating the radical left Michigan.**
---
| [DONATE $25 TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=3266770384&e=0636b97700 "DONATE $25 TODAY")
---
| [DONATE $50 TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=3c062a2933&e=0636b97700 "DONATE $50 TODAY")
---
| This campaign requires a hard-working candidate who can take our message to all corners of the state. That’s what I bring to the table.

I have a 34-year career in law enforcement in Michigan. I’ve excelled at putting together high-performing teams to solve challenging problems.

In addition, I am the _only candidate_ who has actually won elective office before — having twice been elected a county commissioner.

That’s why I’ve built a steady stream of _endorsements from Sheriffs, Prosecutors, Legislators, and business leaders_.

Rocker Ted Nugent was an early supporter saying, “With Mike as the Governor at the helm of Michigan it can once again be the greatest state in the nation. Right now under Gretchen Whitmer’s failed leadership, Michigan is the laughing stock of America.”
---
|
---
| Peter, Michigan is the key swing state in the 2024 Presidential election. It was pivotal in both 2016 and 2020, and it will be all the more critical in 2024.

_It’s important we sweep the state with an America-first patriot_ so we can turn this state red once again. I’ve put everything into this campaign – all of my chips are on the table to stop Michigan's despotic Governor.

**Will you join me in this campaign? Let’s flip Michigan and send Gretchen Whitmer packing.**

Please make a generous donation today. Let’s stand together as we Fix Michigan and rebuild our nation.

Sincerely,

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
| [HELP FLIP MICHIGAN. MAKE A DONATION TODAY.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=bdbeac8ad8&e=0636b97700 "HELP FLIP MICHIGAN. MAKE A DONATION TODAY.")

Friend, My name is Kenny and I'm a fellow with Canning for Congress! I'm supporting Doyle Canning because climate action can't wait for me and my generation. Doyle is the only candidate who I trust to fight for solutions we need now and who has a proven track record on climate and the environment. That's why I am going to be knocking doors for Doyle**this weekend and every weekend till Election Day** to help spread the word and get out the vote. And that is why I am asking you to join me this **Saturday March 5th 11 am at Tugman Park** for our first canvass in Eugene. Can I count on you? Let me know you are coming by signing up today!

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42567194/333444719/-1092009436?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTcxYzg4NS1kYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pbIS1Yz-vab8Rx3EWrOOPsvWpfgr1nZx6PwQ9ow1eig=&emci=e06df77e-389b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9171c885-dc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=29183203)

| | Whether it’s supporting right-wing extremists, voting to overturn the 2020 election, or committing campaign finance fraud, David Schweikert has proven that he doesn’t put the interests of working Arizonans first. It’s time that the people of Arizona’s 1st Congressional District have a leader that will prioritize the issues they face on a daily basis — like inflation, Arizona's environmental crisis, or the cost of prescription drugs. However, we can’t make that happen without your grassroots support. You can help me unseat David Schweikert this November by chipping in a few dollars to my campaign every month — whether that’s $5, $15, or $25, _anything helps._ All you need to do is make sure to check the “Yes, count me in!” box on my donation page. [**So friend, can I count on you to make a monthly donation starting today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42567195/333444722/-1057619663?refcode=X_030422_RecurringPitch&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTcxYzg4NS1kYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pbIS1Yz-vab8Rx3EWrOOPsvWpfgr1nZx6PwQ9ow1eig=)

It’s time that the people of Arizona’s 1st Congressional District have a leader that will prioritize the issues they face on a daily basis — like inflation, Arizona's environmental crisis, or the cost of prescription drugs. However, we can’t make that happen without your grassroots support. You can help me unseat David Schweikert this November by chipping in a few dollars to my campaign every month — whether that’s $5, $15, or $25, anything helps. Peter,

Last week, President Joe Biden nominated Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to serve on the Supreme Court.

This is a historic nomination. If confirmed by the Senate, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson would be the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court and would bring the Court a step closer to reflecting our country's diversity.

Throughout her career as a public defender and federal judge, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson has shown a strong commitment to equal justice under the law and she is eminently qualified to be a Supreme Court justice. Kim applauds this historic nomination, but she wants to know what you think:

**[Do you agree that Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson deserves a fair confirmation process in the Senate?
