name: INDEMS
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
###
**\- INDems Statement on President Biden’s State of the Union Address - ** “President Joe Biden promised Americans from the start of his presidency that he would tell it straight and provide an opportunity for families to have a brighter future than they once had. And true to his word, President Biden was honest about this truth about the state of our nation: Families across our country have been struggling. The battle against COVID-19 has led to once-in-a-lifetime challenges for people of all ages, businesses, and schools in our communities. The American Rescue Plan and The Jobs Act are providing pathways to get us through these tough times, and the President - as well as Democrats - are committed to doing the work that’s necessary to create this better future. Indiana Democrats have been championing this approach across the state. Thanks to the American Rescue Plan, cities like Indianapolis are ‘super-funding’ efforts to combat crime. Democrats are creating jobs, fully-funding the state’s regional economic development programs, revitalizing critical infrastructure systems, expanding broadband internet access, providing educators with pay raises, and funding public schools at levels not seen in over a decade. Democrats are delivering on the kitchen-table issues that matter most to people, and Democrats are ready to solve further challenges facing Hoosier families in all 92 counties in the months and years ahead. Now is the time to solve critical issues like inflation, and Democrats are set to answer this challenge once more. More than 56 economists have confirmed the Build Back Better Act and the COMPETES Act would combat inflation and drive down high costs for Hoosiers. Democrats are crisscrossing Indiana to sell this strong economic agenda, because while challenges still exist, Hoosiers families should have faith there are brighter, more prosperous days ahead – thanks to the work accomplished by President Joe Biden and Democrats.” **_\- Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the Indiana Democratic Party_**
**\- American Rescue Plan Delivers Mental Health Services for Hoosiers in Evansville - ** Indiana Democrats continued to celebrate the brighter future the American Rescue Plan is STILL creating for the City of Evansville. On Monday, the Evansville City Council unanimously approved a $300,000 investment to open The Crisis Care Center. The facility will focus on providing Hoosiers services for mental health emergencies as well as services to fight substance abuse. This program will save Evansville about $4.5 million in hospital or jail care costs \- and it’s all because of the American Rescue Plan. The Crisis Care Center will help solve some of today’s toughest problems facing Hoosiers, and it was Indiana Democrats who delivered it. The same cannot be said for U.S. Congressman Larry Bucshon and Indiana Republicans who flat out voted “NO” on this investment. In fact, Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer called these projects “[socialism](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580186/333502450/-1180238315?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2E4YTI3MS0wNjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k1hUdJEECaPAQ_lUQwph-jwCHxLIHIeD-MQLk7nPzlY=&emci=df6f9e4d-e59b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=57a8a271-069c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535)” and claimed their opposition to jobs was a “[great campaign to run on](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580188/333502451/178131055?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2E4YTI3MS0wNjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k1hUdJEECaPAQ_lUQwph-jwCHxLIHIeD-MQLk7nPzlY=&emci=df6f9e4d-e59b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=57a8a271-069c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535)”. Democrats - including Ray McCormick (Democratic nominee for Indiana’s Eighth District) will highlight Congressman Bucshon’s “NO” record throughout the 2022 campaign year. Voters will learn that while Democrats delivered Indiana’s bright economic future, Republicans like Bucshon divided communities with their senseless and divisive culture wars.
**\- Mike Schmuhl: Governor Holcomb, Please Veto House Bill 1041 and Save Our Children’s Lives - ** “The moment the Indiana High School Athletic Association admitted there was no unfair advantage occurring in women’s sports, it became clear House Bill 1041 was more about fulfilling a made up culture war than actually creating a better future for Hoosier children. Indiana Republicans even admitted their goal was more about abiding by national politics than solving today’s problems facing kids - and it’s why they partnered with a national hate group to pass House Bill 1041. The 2022 legislative session will be remembered as the time when elected Republicans used the power of their offices to bully innocent minors who simply want to play the sports they enjoy with their friends. Unfortunately, House Bill 1041 will set a dark precedent for children that being transgender means something is wrong with them. It must be said that nothing is wrong and being transgender is exactly how God created you and is exactly who you are born to be. Indiana Democrats value the state’s transgender community, and they have a place in our state and future just as everyone else. It’s become quite clear the Indiana GOP is now the Culture War Party that views misinformation and conspiracy theories as their guiding lights. This agenda is divisive, will prevent good jobs from entering the state, and it simply has no place in Indiana. Governor Eric Holcomb should not make the mistake Mike Pence made in 2015 with the Religious Freedom Restoration Act. The Indiana Democratic Party asks Holcomb to veto this legislation the moment it hits his desk.” **_\- Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the Indiana Democratic Party_**
**\- Voice Your Opinion, INDems Platform Process Continues -** It’s an election year across the state, and the Indiana Democratic Party is ready to travel to all 92 counties to help elect community leaders who will deliver on an economic agenda that includes creating jobs, supplying investments in broadband, improving roads/bridges, water, and other infrastructure needs, and securing a better future for the communities we call home. To do that, Indiana Democrats is continuing its biennial tradition of approving a party platform that includes all voices across the state. Hearing dates and locations are available below. Please take a look at a draft of the Indiana Democratic Party’s 2022 Platform, “[The Hoosier Promise](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580191/333502454/-1920848487?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2E4YTI3MS0wNjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k1hUdJEECaPAQ_lUQwph-jwCHxLIHIeD-MQLk7nPzlY=&emci=df6f9e4d-e59b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=57a8a271-069c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535)” and consider submitting your suggestions online. Your ideas are valued and important and we’d like to craft a strong platform – with your help – and spread the news across the state during this critical election year.
**\- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring -** **War Room Director** The Indiana Democratic Party seeks a War Room Director to build an innovative program to hold the Indiana Republican Party accountable and inform and educate Hoosier voters year in and year out. A mix between rapid response and lead researcher, the director will work with the IDP team to push back against misinformation, disinformation, and conspiracy theories so all Hoosiers have the freedom to make better and informed decisions on the issues facing our state and country. **Voter File Administrator** The Indiana Democratic Party seeks a Voter File Administrator (VFA) to work on our data team to better serve candidates, committees, and local parties as we seek to build a stronger Democratic Party in the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategy, technology, and voter targeting and contact. IDP is making strides on this front and we want to add to our team with this important role. **Regional Organizing Directors** The Indiana Democratic Party is hiring Regional Organizing Directors to to build a stronger party in the field throughout the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategic planning, and voter targeting and contact. These are important roles to building back a fair and equitable two party system of government in Indiana. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at [https://www.indems.org/jobs/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580193/333502456/1076440731?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2E4YTI3MS0wNjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k1hUdJEECaPAQ_lUQwph-jwCHxLIHIeD-MQLk7nPzlY=&emci=df6f9e4d-e59b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=57a8a271-069c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535) **Spring and Summer Interns** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.
#### Benefits
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

####
Intern Duties
Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

####
Qualifications
Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

#### How to Apply
Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at [lauren@indems.org](mailto:lauren@indems.org).
**\- Opportunities -** **\- INDems: "The Hoosier Promise" Platform Hearing - Statewide Virtual #2 -** [Monday, March 21](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580194/333502457/-1986106239?refcode=idp-em-220225-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2E4YTI3MS0wNjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k1hUdJEECaPAQ_lUQwph-jwCHxLIHIeD-MQLk7nPzlY=&emci=df6f9e4d-e59b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=57a8a271-069c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), 6 - 7:30 PM EST **\- INDems: “The 2022 Crossroads Summit” for county parties and candidates -**

clean_body: | \- INDems Statement on President Biden’s State of the Union Address - “President Joe Biden promised Americans from the start of his presidency that he would tell it straight and provide an opportunity for families to have a brighter future than they once had. And true to his word, President Biden was honest about this truth about the state of our nation: Families across our country have been struggling. The battle against COVID-19 has led to once-in-a-lifetime challenges for people of all ages, businesses, and schools in our communities. The American Rescue Plan and The Jobs Act are providing pathways to get us through these tough times, and the President - as well as Democrats - are committed to doing the work that’s necessary to create this better future. Indiana Democrats have been championing this approach across the state. Thanks to the American Rescue Plan, cities like Indianapolis are ‘super-funding’ efforts to combat crime. Democrats are creating jobs, fully-funding the state’s regional economic development programs, revitalizing critical infrastructure systems, expanding broadband internet access, providing educators with pay raises, and funding public schools at levels not seen in over a decade. Democrats are delivering on the kitchen-table issues that matter most to people, and Democrats are ready to solve further challenges facing Hoosier families in all 92 counties in the months and years ahead. Now is the time to solve critical issues like inflation, and Democrats are set to answer this challenge once more. More than 56 economists have confirmed the Build Back Better Act and the COMPETES Act would combat inflation and drive down high costs for Hoosiers. Democrats are crisscrossing Indiana to sell this strong economic agenda, because while challenges still exist, Hoosiers families should have faith there are brighter, more prosperous days ahead – thanks to the work accomplished by President Joe Biden and Democrats.” \- Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the Indiana Democratic Party \- American Rescue Plan Delivers Mental Health Services for Hoosiers in Evansville - Indiana Democrats continued to celebrate the brighter future the American Rescue Plan is STILL creating for the City of Evansville. On Monday, the Evansville City Council unanimously approved a $300,000 investment to open The Crisis Care Center. The facility will focus on providing Hoosiers services for mental health emergencies as well as services to fight substance abuse. This program will save Evansville about $4.5 million in hospital or jail care costs \- and it’s all because of the American Rescue Plan. The Crisis Care Center will help solve some of today’s toughest problems facing Hoosiers, and it was Indiana Democrats who delivered it. The same cannot be said for U.S. Congressman Larry Bucshon and Indiana Republicans who flat out voted “NO” on this investment. In fact, Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer called these projects “” and claimed their opposition to jobs was a “”. Democrats - including Ray McCormick (Democratic nominee for Indiana’s Eighth District) will highlight Congressman Bucshon’s “NO” record throughout the 2022 campaign year. Voters will learn that while Democrats delivered Indiana’s bright economic future, Republicans like Bucshon divided communities with their senseless and divisive culture wars. \- Mike Schmuhl: Governor Holcomb, Please Veto House Bill 1041 and Save Our Children’s Lives - “The moment the Indiana High School Athletic Association admitted there was no unfair advantage occurring in women’s sports, it became clear House Bill 1041 was more about fulfilling a made up culture war than actually creating a better future for Hoosier children. Indiana Republicans even admitted their goal was more about abiding by national politics than solving today’s problems facing kids - and it’s why they partnered with a national hate group to pass House Bill 1041. The 2022 legislative session will be remembered as the time when elected Republicans used the power of their offices to bully innocent minors who simply want to play the sports they enjoy with their friends. Unfortunately, House Bill 1041 will set a dark precedent for children that being transgender means something is wrong with them. It must be said that nothing is wrong and being transgender is exactly how God created you and is exactly who you are born to be. Indiana Democrats value the state’s transgender community, and they have a place in our state and future just as everyone else. It’s become quite clear the Indiana GOP is now the Culture War Party that views misinformation and conspiracy theories as their guiding lights. This agenda is divisive, will prevent good jobs from entering the state, and it simply has no place in Indiana. Governor Eric Holcomb should not make the mistake Mike Pence made in 2015 with the Religious Freedom Restoration Act. The Indiana Democratic Party asks Holcomb to veto this legislation the moment it hits his desk.” \- Mike Schmuhl, Chairman of the Indiana Democratic Party \- Voice Your Opinion, INDems Platform Process Continues - It’s an election year across the state, and the Indiana Democratic Party is ready to travel to all 92 counties to help elect community leaders who will deliver on an economic agenda that includes creating jobs, supplying investments in broadband, improving roads/bridges, water, and other infrastructure needs, and securing a better future for the communities we call home. body:
A dear friend of mine is running for Congress in one of the most competitive races in the nation and she needs our help to achieve victory | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=3c7c38b3800048818ea773bbdcb04a7e&_e=-_rYlYt-VW1s_1wehYMGmSivN59eSzfZM3sMnIdEebhvlV8qvZhK9qQSN5ZUz_e_bh-MUNVLU9VQ1IhHiG3fqwmkK5P1nnxaykQp58RimkRC0tkjrdY_h6kqRHVHN8bzsoDwF4BM3gY0hNXnmsyrOQjKeUes9RJXDjXJ_xUFom2ryT126sWbWZIT889Ah9RYY6ETVLXRcx-0I8099sEzRU34zXwW3O7rESkzLpXtcDCb8CO0Qzb6fm4GPFlYIPFjNxOVWg_Cid_x1jttymJI-2kqeCg6uyICxY0cOVhR4PJVbn_Al8YDO2lgSyFs9ZrtNn19qva6PjilOK2UzsZiuR59z55NvlQsa67Jg3P9tx7Xu5Eo1L9NtV_pQT0L1ndo7Twxx4neogLR_zNTHNS3F3IsGJQ4iNB_yLrorleX42AfUBhqVqDt9dL7qus2dIu6N2jkR7_UD42X8Ho0JvNuX0YxFSQ6jSYYZK3KCwvQBEs%3D)

Fellow patriot,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. In 2020, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 118 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

For a long time, it worked. But now, conservatives know the Left’s game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better. Now, we’re seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what’s on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs. Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz knows that, too. In 2020, Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 118 years. subject: David Curry Launches First Television Ad
body:
|
---
| |

| |

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: Kasey Dearden – Kasey@DavidCurryforCongress.com **David Curry Launches First Television Ad** **McDonough, GA** – March 4, 2022 – Today, David Curry announced that he is launching his first television campaign. The ad, titled American Dream, details David’s journey through life and the realization of the American Dream. The ad can be viewed by clicking [here](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=01149a552d&e=598f6aa24c).

“America needs to return to common sense, conservative values and that starts right here in Georgia’s Tenth Congressional District,” said Curry. “Joe Biden has failed and Americans are paying the price. The American Dream was once attainable for everyone, but rising inflation, runaway government spending, and out of control illegal immigration threaten that for our children and grandchildren.”

David Curry is Georgia born and raised. Together, with his wife Nicole, they have raised four children. David is a graduate of Mercer University and received his Master’s degree from Georgia State University. David started his career at 18 years old in a Ford factory before eventually opening several successful small businesses. The Curry’s currently reside in McDonough.

A copy of the script can be found below:

David Curry:
_When I was young, my father lost his job, and soon after, we lost our home to a fire.

But even through these tough times, I never lost hope in the American Dream.

Now, Joe Biden’s reckless agenda is putting this dream in serious jeopardy.

Sure, I was knocked down early in life, but I’ve stood up, fought back, raised an amazing family, opened several successful businesses, and now I’m running for Congress to put that same American Dream back into YOUR hands._ ###

---

| | Peter, I have exciting news I wanted to tell you personally: I’m endorsing my friend and colleague Andy Levin in his reelection campaign for Michigan’s new Eleventh District. I’ll explain why in a minute, but first, [_**can you join me in supporting him by chipping into his campaign right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42568200/333448428/882283677?refcode=em_20220304_f_s_waters&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODA4YjU3ZS1kZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dM-ivNzEWCKROnU5726MZmYeAS8ax0qkhtf388WZBGU=) Working in close partnership with Andy in the Congressional Progressive Caucus and the U.S. House, I’ve seen firsthand his commitment to fighting for human rights, workers’ rights and racial justice. In this moment, progressives need their voices heard, and he’s the right person for the job. Andy has _always_ walked the walk. We’ve seen him help health care workers to organize with the SEIU, and in the House, he continues to be an anti-racism co-conspirator — fighting for housing justice, economic justice, and so much more. clean_body: I’m proud to support my friend Andy’s reelection campaign. Will you join me? | | | | | Peter, I have exciting news I wanted to tell you personally: I’m endorsing my friend and colleague Andy Levin in his reelection campaign for Michigan’s new Eleventh District. I’ll explain why in a minute, but first, = Working in close partnership with Andy in the Congressional Progressive Caucus and the U.S. House, I’ve seen firsthand his commitment to fighting for human rights, workers’ rights and racial justice. In this moment, progressives need their voices heard, and he’s the right person for the job. Andy has always walked the walk. We’ve seen him help health care workers to organize with the SEIU, and in the House, he continues to be an anti-racism co-conspirator — fighting for housing justice, economic justice, and so much more. = To put it simply, we need bold leadership from individuals like Andy in the room where decisions are made. He is ready to roll up his sleeves and do the hard work necessary to make differences in the lives of American families — he uses his platform to uplift his community and bring light to the issues that impact working people every day. = Thank you for your support, Chairwoman Maxine Waters | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress | Andy Levin For Congress P.O. Donald J. Trump March 4th, 2022
ICYMI: Statement by Donald J. Trump on the Unselect Committee
The actual conspiracy to defraud the United States was the Democrats rigging the Election, and the Fake News Media and the Unselect Committee covering it up. Few things could be more fraudulent, or met with more irregularities, than the Presidential Election of 2020. They refuse to cover the facts, such as just this week the special counsel in Wisconsin called for the decertification of the 2020 Election because of massive illegality, including election bribery, and the preying on the elderly for votes, which resulted in fraud of “95-100 percent turnout,” an impossibility, in at least 91 nursing homes. This is true with many other states, especially swing states. In Arizona, 204,430 mail-in ballots had mismatched signatures that were never sent to review, and 740,000 mail-in ballots had broken chain of custody, all far more necessary than the votes needed, 10,457, for “President Trump to win.” In Georgia, over 240 ballot harvesters have been identified in an illegal operation spanning multiple swing states, all caught on video.

The evidence is monumental but the Unselect Committee of politically partisan hacks, and someone who had a steaming hot affair with a Chinese spy, hides the facts. Judges and even justices of the United States Supreme Court, are afraid to even look, as was the Attorney General of the United States, who was so petrified of being held in contempt or being impeached by the Democrats, which they were constantly threatening him with, that he was virtually a broken man who allowed for the systemic violation of election laws and other things to take place.

The reason for January 6th was that millions of people in our Country know the Election was Rigged and Stolen, and Nancy Pelosi refused to put the requested 10,000+ troops in the Capitol three days earlier, as strongly recommended by me. She didn’t like “the look.”

The Unselect Committee’s sole goal is to try to prevent President Trump, who is leading by large margins in every poll, from running again for president, if I so choose. By so doing they are destroying democracy as we know it. Their lies and Marxist tactics against political opponents will not stop the truth, or the biggest political movement, Make America Great Again/America First, in the history of our Country. And now we have a war waging in Ukraine that would have never happened, record-setting inflation, an embarrassingly poorly executed withdrawal from Afghanistan, and an economy that is teetering, at best. All because of a corrupt Election result.

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump March 4th, 2022 ICYMI: Statement by Donald J. Trump on the Unselect Committee The actual conspiracy to defraud the United States was the Democrats rigging the Election, and the Fake News Media and the Unselect Committee covering it up. Few things could be more fraudulent, or met with more irregularities, than the Presidential Election of 2020. They refuse to cover the facts, such as just this week the special counsel in Wisconsin called for the decertification of the 2020 Election because of massive illegality, including election bribery, and the preying on the elderly for votes, which resulted in fraud of “95-100 percent turnout,” an impossibility, in at least 91 nursing homes. This is true with many other states, especially swing states. In Arizona, 204,430 mail-in ballots had mismatched signatures that were never sent to review, and 740,000 mail-in ballots had broken chain of custody, all far more necessary than the votes needed, 10,457, for “President Trump to win.” In Georgia, over 240 ballot harvesters have been identified in an illegal operation spanning multiple swing states, all caught on video. The evidence is monumental but the Unselect Committee of politically partisan hacks, and someone who had a steaming hot affair with a Chinese spy, hides the facts. Judges and even justices of the United States Supreme Court, are afraid to even look, as was the Attorney General of the United States, who was so petrified of being held in contempt or being impeached by the Democrats, which they were constantly threatening him with, that he was virtually a broken man who allowed for the systemic violation of election laws and other things to take place. The reason for January 6th was that millions of people in our Country know the Election was Rigged and Stolen, and Nancy Pelosi refused to put the requested 10,000+ troops in the Capitol three days earlier, as strongly recommended by me. By so doing they are destroying democracy as we know it. name: Team Tom
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, March 6th for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
#

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, March 6th, 2022**
Peter,
On Monday, Latino Victory Fund announced their full endorsement of Tom Perez for Governor of Maryland. We are so proud to be building a multi-racial, multi-ethnic, and diverse coalition of Marylanders who believe in our vision of a Maryland that works for everyone and we are so honored to have their support.
Tom was proud to join Lin-Manuel Miranda and other leaders from the Latino community for an event with Latino Victory Fund this week.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580932/333505450/1335154520?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTljZGMyZC0wOTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Bak8m2o8O33nJDj1CAINJG8Y6Cirftvqb7OFWY301I=&emci=d337f357-ed9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e19cdc2d-099c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)**
As we continue to build our powerful grassroots movement, we understand that we would not be where we are without supporters like you. We look forward to keeping in touch.
Many Thanks,
Team Tom
* * *
**ENDORSEMENTS ALERT!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580933/333505457/-325460002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTljZGMyZC0wOTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Bak8m2o8O33nJDj1CAINJG8Y6Cirftvqb7OFWY301I=&emci=d337f357-ed9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e19cdc2d-099c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580934/333505465/-1658992040?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTljZGMyZC0wOTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Bak8m2o8O33nJDj1CAINJG8Y6Cirftvqb7OFWY301I=&emci=d337f357-ed9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e19cdc2d-099c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580935/333505473/-1549301336?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTljZGMyZC0wOTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Bak8m2o8O33nJDj1CAINJG8Y6Cirftvqb7OFWY301I=&emci=d337f357-ed9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e19cdc2d-099c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580936/333505480/431134362?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTljZGMyZC0wOTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Bak8m2o8O33nJDj1CAINJG8Y6Cirftvqb7OFWY301I=&emci=d337f357-ed9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e19cdc2d-099c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580937/333505482/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTljZGMyZC0wOTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Bak8m2o8O33nJDj1CAINJG8Y6Cirftvqb7OFWY301I=&emci=d337f357-ed9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e19cdc2d-099c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
As the CIAA basketball tournament came to a close, Shannon was honored to attend the President’s reception alongside our friend Rita Crews, the President of the Belair-Edison Community Association. Shannon had the opportunity to meet and speak with Mayor Vi Lyles of Charlotte, North Carolina and Dr. Aminta H. Breaux, President of Bowie State University.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580938/333505483/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTljZGMyZC0wOTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Bak8m2o8O33nJDj1CAINJG8Y6Cirftvqb7OFWY301I=&emci=d337f357-ed9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e19cdc2d-099c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Team Tom kicked off last weekend in Montgomery County knocking doors, listening to folk and sharing Tom and Shannon’s vision to bring jobs, justice and opportunity to all Marylanders.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580939/333505484/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTljZGMyZC0wOTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Bak8m2o8O33nJDj1CAINJG8Y6Cirftvqb7OFWY301I=&emci=d337f357-ed9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e19cdc2d-099c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Shannon was honored to join local activist Diana Conway at her home with other Montgomery County leaders for a meet and greet with leading women activists in Potomac.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580941/333505485/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTljZGMyZC0wOTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Bak8m2o8O33nJDj1CAINJG8Y6Cirftvqb7OFWY301I=&emci=d337f357-ed9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e19cdc2d-099c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Tom and Shannon spent their Sunday afternoon with Montgomery County Council Vice President Evan Glass for a walking tour of Silver Spring.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580949/333505491/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTljZGMyZC0wOTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Bak8m2o8O33nJDj1CAINJG8Y6Cirftvqb7OFWY301I=&emci=d337f357-ed9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e19cdc2d-099c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
They had a great time stopping by small businesses including Loyalty Bookstores, United Therapeutics, the AFI Silver Theatre, and more! Small businesses are the backbone of our state and these businesses are just a handful that help to create a thriving community in Silver Spring.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42580950/333505497/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTljZGMyZC0wOTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Bak8m2o8O33nJDj1CAINJG8Y6Cirftvqb7OFWY301I=&emci=d337f357-ed9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e19cdc2d-099c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Tom and Shannon ended their weekend with supporters and friends at Denizens Brewing Co. where they continued to spread the word of Tom Perez and Shannon Sneed for Maryland.

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, March 6th, 2022 Peter, On Monday, Latino Victory Fund announced their full endorsement of Tom Perez for Governor of Maryland. We are so proud to be building a multi-racial, multi-ethnic, and diverse coalition of Marylanders who believe in our vision of a Maryland that works for everyone and we are so honored to have their support. Tom was proud to join Lin-Manuel Miranda and other leaders from the Latino community for an event with Latino Victory Fund this week. As we continue to build our powerful grassroots movement, we understand that we would not be where we are without supporters like you. We look forward to keeping in touch. Many Thanks, Team Tom ENDORSEMENTS ALERT! On the Campaign Trail As the CIAA basketball tournament came to a close, Shannon was honored to attend the President’s reception alongside our friend Rita Crews, the President of the Belair-Edison Community Association. Shannon had the opportunity to meet and speak with Mayor Vi Lyles of Charlotte, North Carolina and Dr. Aminta H. Breaux, President of Bowie State University. Team Tom kicked off last weekend in Montgomery County knocking doors, listening to folk and sharing Tom and Shannon’s vision to bring jobs, justice and opportunity to all Marylanders. Shannon was honored to join local activist Diana Conway at her home with other Montgomery County leaders for a meet and greet with leading women activists in Potomac. Tom and Shannon spent their Sunday afternoon with Montgomery County Council Vice President Evan Glass for a walking tour of Silver Spring. They had a great time stopping by small businesses including Loyalty Bookstores, United Therapeutics, the AFI Silver Theatre, and more! Small businesses are the backbone of our state and these businesses are just a handful that help to create a thriving community in Silver Spring. Tom and Shannon ended their weekend with supporters and friends at Denizens Brewing Co. where they continued to spread the word of Tom Perez and Shannon Sneed for Maryland. On Tuesday, Tom and Shannon headed to Annapolis where they officially filed for office! We are so excited to continue sharing our vision of fighting for all Marylanders. Shannon celebrated Read Across America Day this week with 5th Graders at Leith Walk Elementary/Middle School in Baltimore. Thank you Dr. T and Mr. Miller for allowing Shannon to share her love for reading with your class! Tom was honored to spend Thursday evening with the talented Lin Manuel Miranda and other Latino leaders from across the country at an event hosted by Latino Victory Fund. ICYMI In the News “We’re thrilled to support Tom Perez for Maryland governor. He’s a force for good who has fought tooth and nail to improve the lives of every constituency he has served while in public office,” said Nathalie Rayes, Latino Victory Fund president and CEO. Hey Peter, I hate to bother you on your Friday afternoon, but with March being the last month of the fundraising quarter, I had to reach out.

**But I’ll make this quick:**[ In order to stay competitive against the GOP’s money machine, we need to raise $20,000 this month. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42568970/333451302/573003782?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220304caucus_YC_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjkwNmU4MS1kZjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBLPu7mTpRFsJF_uFGekvvmUcN8mcgMvYz6G9_a4ojk=)

Hey Peter. This weekend’s event is a really important one: The precinct caucuses. In these (mostly virtual) caucuses, voters in local precincts will gather to discuss candidates and platforms, and start the process of selecting delegates to send to the Congressional nominating assembly in April. **For our campaign, it’s a crucial opportunity to have in-depth conversations, build relationships, and start to assemble the winning coalition we’ll need to defeat the extreme GOP opponent in November.** [**Will you chip in $15 — or whatever you’re able — to show that you’re with me ahead of this weekend’s caucuses?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42568971/333451303/573003782?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220304caucus_YC_allop_xx_l1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjkwNmU4MS1kZjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBLPu7mTpRFsJF_uFGekvvmUcN8mcgMvYz6G9_a4ojk=) | [Give $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42568972/333451304/573003782?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220304caucus_YC_allop_xx_btn&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjkwNmU4MS1kZjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBLPu7mTpRFsJF_uFGekvvmUcN8mcgMvYz6G9_a4ojk=)
---
As one of the most competitive races in the country this year, CO-08 could decide control of the House of Representatives. **That means _everything_ is on the line.**
If you’re worried about your kids — the effects of pollution made worse by wildfires, senseless and preventable gun violence, providing them with a good pre-K education, or protecting the planet they’ll grow up to inherit — our campaign is for you.
If you or someone you care about is paying too much for healthcare, life-saving insulin, hearing devices, or prescription drugs, our campaign is for you.
If the state of our democracy keeps you up at night (like it does for me) because of Republicans across the country openly supporting anti-democratic attempts at voter suppression and intimidation, our campaign is for you.
**Those are the messages I’ll be taking to the caucuses this weekend to kick our movement-building into high gear.[If you’re able, make a contribution TODAY to help us raise the money we need to put that coalition into action and win in November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42568973/333451305/573003782?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220304caucus_YC_allop_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjkwNmU4MS1kZjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rBLPu7mTpRFsJF_uFGekvvmUcN8mcgMvYz6G9_a4ojk=)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thank you for your support,
Dr. Yadira Caraveo

| Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests.

Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. clean_body: | = Hey Peter. This weekend’s event is a really important one: The precinct caucuses. In these (mostly virtual) caucuses, voters in local precincts will gather to discuss candidates and platforms, and start the process of selecting delegates to send to the Congressional nominating assembly in April. For our campaign, it’s a crucial opportunity to have in-depth conversations, build relationships, and start to assemble the winning coalition we’ll need to defeat the extreme GOP opponent in November. = | = As one of the most competitive races in the country this year, CO-08 could decide control of the House of Representatives. That means everything is on the line. If you’re worried about your kids — the effects of pollution made worse by wildfires, senseless and preventable gun violence, providing them with a good pre-K education, or protecting the planet they’ll grow up to inherit — our campaign is for you. If you or someone you care about is paying too much for healthcare, life-saving insulin, hearing devices, or prescription drugs, our campaign is for you. If the state of our democracy keeps you up at night (like it does for me) because of Republicans across the country openly supporting anti-democratic attempts at voter suppression and intimidation, our campaign is for you. Those are the messages I’ll be taking to the caucuses this weekend to kick our movement-building into high gear.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for your support, Dr. Yadira Caraveo | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Team Barletta
subject: Team Barletta Campaign Update

body: | | | | Updates from the trail --- --- Peter Willis, It's been a busy couple days on the campaign trail. _**In the last 10 days alone we have driven 1,622 miles across PA and hit 12 different counties along the way: Philadelphia, Lackawanna, Berks, Montgomery, Luzerne, Lehigh, Susquehanna, Clinton, Lycoming, Cumberland, Dauphin, and Delaware.**_ That's like driving from Hazleton to Denver! The response on the ground has been tremendous. We couldn't be in a better spot right now, but we're not taking our foot off the gas - there is too much on the line and we remain laser-focused on defeating Josh Shapiro and restoring Liberty and Freedom here in the Keystone State. Meanwhile, [_new polling shows_](https://u21878114.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=QtzNBLELhLe7xI3pbs-2B5El6Yc5uYoLywimOYibySIbrvmy2Y5K8wnBbkDXR13jYBZVUsUmQ8Ev6M5vSqm0WlkHrxqEOLddEXW286yLRdWCaJN0Qdm1FkjchRvtarKP3-2FTGtS7UVl5eoQgO-2FzYtXrt73W2dAB9BPUUzNxMOAGxt4-3DkNMQ_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6ehgQophv-2BNSJu785TOZc8OQ8-2ByuKyAAF9Kdw-2FIXMh2YENkS-2FlNo9bztcpeWaeT1SjspGH8GfZ3n4glrWRSumWK7pt1QtBFOe6XVCDXYza-2B7F3TR-2BoF3Fxswn9ooQRhjTJSUM-2FlMtcNEeh1Lnd67cjf3oSRFaxf3LCbICKFy9wCAjXxyBONUX81yQIqel-2B08V-2FKifygQeOEZD-2FJ4GuIVL-2BMpjfzbffWvoqPttUwSKO7UaFo8kZmxX2JWAZDkBUQHw1MBTSKjkzRHZtfx3qfinU9Kj4wskHsKTeegF-2FSXlKV7v1Zkp-2BX16RFP4KvsUh3TJ12VTQTst0GnADnZ5FLprZWG-2BHeimz2hW93duyvaZ9hcse9j1hlUpqeVZ5a2ELw5FNvaIjWoZoFdbrwjJmNCg-2FsSEi8UuZ7QR6nMUkugAJ1vy8SLDW2DNgi2T1tn8FSlzMhFgYTBRoT6eIoR2yNVz09IxSclIIVriPLiswGaKjNgEkw4PBWBkDUYUlxZRz7W8SpjR9-2FoDbfhoFm0BJ7acyc9QTsNtspVhoYRjMKb3wQH6Yc-2F2nUOPPj44l8vDXq4lNWk5QKMjObguEnu2B-2FKdxoPfFUcLg0pPM2CPtQ1q2N6F-2F2fmlVq0vTuYmdvVTrD4VkeLVFPKGhWd7HNFZReMhLIWQ-2FutAhHP7q3cYJn1gOay6d8usSdsznHtmFm0Puexbu9MZDCvYYNnauq3JaShTbv91Y9ZDPsINXpU9YD8RJEPaMi-2B2AMiKs-2BId1B0mL8cm0AM0YGOuLcdq1q1oqJjyJhV4WTWTOxbj4GC4hRi9KklfXAmMKozqHHoJ02RDUxWzOCtYRfGTgh4niagh8hHbQ-3D-3D) Joe Biden with an abysmal 30% approval rating in his "home state" of Pennsylvania. clean_body: | | | | Updates from the trail Peter Willis, It's been a busy couple days on the campaign trail. In the last 10 days alone we have driven 1,622 miles across PA and hit 12 different counties along the way: Philadelphia, Lackawanna, Berks, Montgomery, Luzerne, Lehigh, Susquehanna, Clinton, Lycoming, Cumberland, Dauphin, and Delaware. That's like driving from Hazleton to Denver! The response on the ground has been tremendous. We couldn't be in a better spot right now, but we're not taking our foot off the gas - there is too much on the line and we remain laser-focused on defeating Josh Shapiro and restoring Liberty and Freedom here in the Keystone State. Meanwhile, Joe Biden with an abysmal 30% approval rating in his "home state" of Pennsylvania. Biden has been such a disaster that even Democrats are starting to abandon him - including an astounding who have chosen not to seek re-election. Forget the Red Wave - with numbers that bad there is a Red Tsunami coming to Pennsylvania in 2022! Game on, Josh Shapiro... LOU IN THE NEWS NBC News: City & State: " " Standard-Speaker: " " ABC-27 (Harrisburg): " " Lewistown Sentinel: Barletta Campaign: " " Penn Live: " " HIGHLIGHTS FROM THE TRAIL Lou's grandson Christopher gets it! Vote for Lou Barletta! Lou was honored to be awarded a 100% Pro-Life rating from the Pennsylvania Pro-Life Federation - their highest rating. Every life is a precious gift from God and Lou will never waver when it comes to protecting the unborn and fighting for the Right for Life. Great response from the grassroots in Delco for Lou's grassroots meet & greet and petition signing party! Thanks to Joe & Stephanie Watkins for putting together a great dinner in Philly with business and evangelical leaders in SEPA! PACKED HOUSE in Wilkes-Barre Township! Awesome time talking guns and freedom at the Blair County 2A coalition meeting in Altoona and meeting with small business owners! Lou is at his best when he is out in the community and amongst We The People. Another busy day with the grassroots in Scranton! Cumberland County Lincoln Day Dinner was a huge success! Team Barletta is off to the races with petitions across PA! No other candidate is working the grassroots like Lou! HELP LOU DEFEAT THE HARRISBURG MACHINE! The Harrisburg machine is out in force to try to tear Lou down because Lou isn't bought and paid for by special interest lobbyist money. Help Lou fight back by chipping in $25, $50, $100 or more TODAY! CHECK OUT THE LATEST LOU BARLETTA MERCH! For Liberty, Team Barletta | | | | ==

name: Gary Black
subject: Here's Something Good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/a39c25e09e856df0c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Friend, Happy Friday! It's been another B.I.G. week for Team ’22 across Georgia, and the best is yet to come. [**Next week, I'll officially qualify to appear on the ballot. Ahead of then, I hope you'll consider contributing here to help fuel our effort down the homestretch.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/d3a5b13041021c0ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_Coming To A Yard Near You_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/acce51f7f7255cfbc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
|
---
Thank you to the grassroots army that showed up at the barn to put together signs earlier this week! 3,000 more strong, coming to yards across Georgia very soon. [**If you haven't ordered your signs yet, you can do so here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/58243ea09a9a1693c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_9th District Debate_**
---
As I've said before, I'm ready to debate anytime, anyplace. This week, we were the first campaign to accept an invitation to a debate hosted by the 9th District Republican Party on April 9th. Herschel Walker still hasn't accepted the invitation, or even publicly acknowledged receiving it. Fellow Republicans, I urge each of you to join me in calling for a real debate NOW, before the primary in May. Too much is at stake for anything less than a full, serious discussion of the issues. [**SIGN the petition telling Herschel to debate here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/9a1c2f3ee2e99bacc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_Across ALL of Georgia_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/cc5fb487955c2e0ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
From Rome to Perry — we had another great week traveling across Georgia, meeting voters, and hearing what's on their hearts. I love this state. It's been an honor to serve as your Agriculture Commissioner, and I'm asking for your vote to be your next U.S. Senator.
---
---
# **_GA2A_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/94fc64107ce75dd3c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Glad to join GA2A this week at their March for the 2nd Amendment rally at the State Capitol! These patriots are holding the line in defense of our Constitutional rights, and they'll have no greater champion than me when I'm in the U.S. Senate.
---
---
# **_Qualifying Day!_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/bbee286cb3ead66ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
I'm officially qualifying to appear on the ballot this coming MONDAY, March 7th. That evening, we're having an open house and celebration at our campaign headquarters. This is going to be a great event, we may even have some special guests in attendance, and I hope you can make it. **[Claim your spot here!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/850148f43533024ac3d6b838967d376c/37793) **
---
---
# **_Join Us On March 10th!_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/4240a15480b1cfdfc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
March 10th is right around the corner, and I hope you'll join us in Tate for our 515 BBQ and Rally! Our Team ’22 leaders have gone above and beyond in making this a B.I.G. event and you don't want to miss it. Tickets are $25. [**Claim yours here!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/787b37ebd89ef12cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/a98048dfdfa26c6bc3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/59590471e048c945c3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/debf07af33780653c3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! We're qualifying on Monday, and the end of this month marks our final quarterly fundraising deadline before the May Republican primary. If you haven't contributed yet, now's the time. **[Resources are essential to sharing our message, and I hope you'll pitch in here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/de533877316e7bcdc3d6b838967d376c/37793) ** Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/bf2e217ed77b43a0c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/619e675517af5aa5c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/8d35cc06b93241e3c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/4c8aff78370e4744/96c2a6504769b160c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=4c8aff78370e4744&d=4c184bd00747a3bfc3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=4c8aff78370e4744).
---

Athens, GA 30604

# _Redistricting Update_
The Ohio Redistricting Commission has passed a new set of Congressional maps. _**IF**_ these maps are approved by the Ohio Supreme Court, I will be running in Ohio's 7th District which now represents:
\- 100% of Medina County
\- 100% of Wayne County
\- Northern Holmes County
\- Cuyahoga County: Bay Village, Bedford, Bedford Hts., Berea, Brecksville, Broadview Hts., Brooklyn, Brook Park, Fairview Park, Independence, Middleburg Hts., North Olmsted, North Royalton, Oakwood, Olmsted Falls, Olmsted Township, Parma, Parma Hts., Rocky River, Seven Hills, Solon, Strongsville, Valley View, Walton Hills, Westlake.
Let’s finish what we started 13 months ago and send a true Constitutional-Conservative to Congress!
If you live in any of these areas and would like a Schulz for Congress yard sign, would like to place a large 4x4 sign in a high traffic area or want to volunteer, simply reply to this email.
---
|
---
| We need you to MOBILIZE with us over the coming months and help me win this Republican primary. This primary season will dictate the future of our country. We must send working class outsiders to DC who will uphold our Constitution and restore our God-given rights.
I am prepared to give all of my time, energy and talent to win this primary in May and general election in November. I have already attended 250+ events, our team has knocked 30,000+ doors and we are seeing grassroots energy that is unmatched.
It’s time to win. Join me
---
|
# _Jonah's Official Statement_

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: At the White House yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We said clearly and decisively that we believe them and that they deserve to pursue justice for themselves.
#
Peter,
Yesterday, I was with President Biden at the White House as he signed the bill I co-led into law — a piece of legislation to end forced arbitration, empower survivors of sexual assault and harassment to seek justice, and hold perpetrators of sexual violence accountable.
It was a historic day for survivors of sexual assault. We said clearly and decisively that we believe them and that they deserve to pursue justice for themselves.
The Ending Forced Arbitration of Sexual Assault and Sexual Harassment Act empowers sexual assault survivors to choose how they want to seek justice for abusive treatment, and allows them to have their day in court.
Forced arbitration clauses are buried in the fine print of everything from employment agreements and ubiquitous terms and conditions to everyday digital click-through "agreements." This legislation voids forced arbitration provisions as they apply to sexual assault and harassment survivors, allowing survivors to seek justice, discuss their cases publicly, and eliminate institutional protections for harassers.
Forced arbitration has for far too long silenced survivors and I’m happy to see this predatory practice banned for good. I’m grateful to President Biden for signing the bill into law.
I was so proud to be the lead cosponsor in the committee of jurisdiction, the House Judiciary Committee, and to win these important rights for sexual assault survivors. There’s a lot of work left to do to protect people from assault and harassment in the workplace and all across society. [**If you’re able to donate to my continued advocacy on these issues, please consider contributing to my campaign today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10871?refcode=em20220304-1076&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1076%2E420207%2ENbMTiO)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10871?refcode=em20220304-1076&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1076%2E420207%2ENbMTiO)**
Thanks for being a part of this movement.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220304-1076-footer&t=3&refcode2=1076_420207_NbMTiO&akid=1076%2E420207%2ENbMTiO)**

name: Tony Vargas
subject: this isn’t about politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
This race isn’t just about politics, it’s personal.

|
---

| | [**_I know it’s almost the weekend, but I want to explain why this race is so important to me \-- and why grassroots supporters like you make all the difference between a win and a loss. It would mean so much if you read this entire message, but if you’re short on time, could you chip in $10 before you log off? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42569507/333453586/1129282168?refcode=20220304_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI2ZTZkNS1lMTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGYbPbu3lHHqTo6nuzb0mqB6FClQD52ih224oSDxbE0=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42569508/333453587/1129282168?refcode=20220304_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI2ZTZkNS1lMTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGYbPbu3lHHqTo6nuzb0mqB6FClQD52ih224oSDxbE0=)
_Discussing important issues with voters!_ I don't come from money. Growing up, my two brothers and I were raised in a one bedroom apartment. My family often lived paycheck to paycheck. But we never lost hope in the American Dream. And eventually, my family went from living in poverty to a life in the middle class.
[**_That’s why when Republican Congressman Don Bacon voted to cut taxes for billionaires instead of working families, I knew I had to step up. But I don't have special interest friends like Bacon does, so will you chip in $10 before midnight to help me win this race for everyday Americans? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42569509/333453588/1129282168?refcode=20220304_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI2ZTZkNS1lMTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGYbPbu3lHHqTo6nuzb0mqB6FClQD52ih224oSDxbE0=) I want to be clear: running for Congress isn’t just about politics for me.
**[It’s deeply personal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42569510/333453589/1129282168?refcode=20220304_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI2ZTZkNS1lMTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qGYbPbu3lHHqTo6nuzb0mqB6FClQD52ih224oSDxbE0=)**

It’s rooted in my experience growing up in poverty and fighting to defy the odds. It’s rooted in the lessons I learned as a public school teacher, working with kids like me. And it’s rooted in my desire to leave the world a better place for my kids, Ava and Luca. [**_But I’m going to need all the help I can get to unseat Bacon and prioritize working families like mine in Washington. If you believe in my campaign and making the American Dream a reality for all families, will you chip in $10 before midnight? clean_body: This race isn’t just about politics, it’s personal. | | | = = Discussing important issues with voters! I don't come from money. Growing up, my two brothers and I were raised in a one bedroom apartment. My family often lived paycheck to paycheck. But we never lost hope in the American Dream. And eventually, my family went from living in poverty to a life in the middle class. = I want to be clear: running for Congress isn’t just about politics for me. = It’s rooted in my experience growing up in poverty and fighting to defy the odds. It’s rooted in the lessons I learned as a public school teacher, working with kids like me. And it’s rooted in my desire to leave the world a better place for my kids, Ava and Luca. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for all you do, Tony | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. name: Self Reliance Central
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zf29aui4oo45s2a0q071en7lqvqvhjc44mpqega8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr6cpll6mojcoj4epqn6pbm65gr6spi68on1djk6ip78cljc3jb0opjempb4cln6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lgbbcj0eapmcd30mdijfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5hm2pj6c1h6eoh5u)
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2znfr4adq8nj6gntf5khahckr9kqkloh9171slrto_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5j6co32cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zcbe9pqg8p1ebe8b05r6qarlj4rbjes40durj0n0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5j6co32cth2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z49vlhokljnf2irik01nfa390enam4tl39gjri78_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5j6co32cth2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, [please use this preferences page](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/prefs/9z2zghdnigshfva9f603a0ql9mmcmjq8bj7gocl0gl0).
1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zk30ktci4ggarit3rjktu3i5b4tpruljees4n7j8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5j6co32cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Rebecca Kleefisch
subject: Despicable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca
body:
Tony Evers used millions of dollars of Wisconsin’s COVID aid to fund abortions.
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=0e2bdfe67eb242e08763284f82bcc3af&_e=MeZFQubsk42N63XqAUkZcio-aT4vHCjB-xn7AkPc9DheQtwB7wGczUsEO01Pm5p0rqKcdoRROXv8yso4QwxWMM_jFzFUCwp0k_lABYuoNAgnk5WkPocyjNsWqGSB1o8Os-9SFKVK8u-BZWIvuqY8XUYFQPupbqCRazbvxz_sB21H2Vwr8O0GNHqA5HSIpwx0ySJ9Ra_FvhZWkUUwnKVOPYbdqRnPWmiZSqT02xNaoP1fsXUBO7P2fGbWpB66vPIbzC5nQ6_zOXfa6G99KsJc55QFCIvRzvcBruv0ySDjIRNCDHplCMciXvIE7m2hYwGnrt_b_uukCoxWPPUHCArILfk_y6jitkt2B8X4enzLVDXv9OKPNY-0UW1hPJADN2vdFWk-xbgD2FXD05rnwxrqrfTg0FRYeOnWQhcTQ3y4FNXWm4MsJUCfiZASr6Wq_XZD2w60o65X8rsPh8FTzCSNB3iaF_z2dtpSvQxmIFZaoGT1UkAgV8x36vlr9jeTYoyF8xH4kL2OZsfGfhxPr-sYWw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
As someone with an unwavering commitment to protect life, this makes me sick to my stomach...
---
**Tony Evers was caught giving $2.4 MILLION of our state’s federal COVID relief funds in grants to Planned Parenthood affiliates throughout Wisconsin. **
---
_In fact, Evers’ Department of Administration relegated _more than half of Wisconsin’s total COVID aid_ from 2020-2021 to BAIL OUT Planned Parenthood and fund abortions._
---

clean_body: Tony Evers used millions of dollars of Wisconsin’s COVID aid to fund abortions. | Friend, As someone with an unwavering commitment to protect life, this makes me sick to my stomach... Tony Evers was caught giving $2.4 MILLION of our state’s federal COVID relief funds in grants to Planned Parenthood affiliates throughout Wisconsin. In fact, Evers’ Department of Administration relegated more than half of Wisconsin’s total COVID aid from 2020-2021 to BAIL OUT Planned Parenthood and fund abortions. Now, I’m counting on your help to FIRE Evers and hold him accountable for his betrayal of the people of Wisconsin. Evers' decision to bail out Planned Parenthood before helping the very people of his state tells you all you need to know about him as a governor. He’s not a governor for the people of Wisconsin, he’s a governor for special interests, the "woke" progressive agenda, and liberal unions. To hold Evers accountable, we MUST take back our state in 2022 – but I can’t do it without your support, Friend. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

Team, Today I held a press conference with Ohio Democratic Party Chair Elizabeth Walters to hold Sec. Frank LaRose accountable for failing to do his job. He has shirked his responsibility to create fair maps by passing illegal, gerrymandered maps and placing partisanship over his responsibility to Ohioans. This action is not only unconstitotional, it's costly–both in money and in trust in our elections. Sec. LaRose has created chaos around the Primary Election by caving to his party and leaving Ohioans to pay the price--literally! He ordered our county boards of elections to start the process of preparing ballots without maps being approved. This is a logistical nightmare that could end up costing Ohioans millions of dollars for his mistake. Even worse, it creates so much confusion that it could disenfranchise voters. I have no intention of letting Sec. LaRose get away with this. Our press conference is just the beginning. I am going to go to every corner of the state to make sure Ohioans know that they have a choice in this eleciton. There is the current Secretary of State who wants to do whatever will help his party. Or, we can tear down every wall between eligible voters and the ballot box. There is the current Secretary of State who wants to make sure his friends in Columbus are taken care of. Or, we can build Ohio businesses by connecting them to the resources needed to succeed–resources I wish I knew about when I started my business. There is a real choice. But we must get that message out. Sec. Frank LaRose has spent years raising money so he can try to decieve Ohio about his record. [We have the truth on our side–which is a lot–but we need you too. Please help fund our efforts to tell Ohioians the truth about Sec. LaRose and his misdeeds.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42569826/333454626/1967714237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzY5ZGFmYi1lMjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JKwI9SwHsInNMSWJAw9YDNgtwIm2xscXRRvTrsBMfyU=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will process automatically.

clean_body: Fair elections are on the ballot.| | | = | | Team, Today I held a press conference with Ohio Democratic Party Chair Elizabeth Walters to hold Sec. Frank LaRose accountable for failing to do his job. He has shirked his responsibility to create fair maps by passing illegal, gerrymandered maps and placing partisanship over his responsibility to Ohioans. This action is not only unconstitotional, it's costly–both in money and in trust in our elections. Sec. LaRose has created chaos around the Primary Election by caving to his party and leaving Ohioans to pay the price--literally! He ordered our county boards of elections to start the process of preparing ballots without maps being approved. This is a logistical nightmare that could end up costing Ohioans millions of dollars for his mistake. Even worse, it creates so much confusion that it could disenfranchise voters. I have no intention of letting Sec. LaRose get away with this. Our press conference is just the beginning. I am going to go to every corner of the state to make sure Ohioans know that they have a choice in this eleciton. There is the current Secretary of State who wants to do whatever will help his party. Or, we can tear down every wall between eligible voters and the ballot box. There is the current Secretary of State who wants to make sure his friends in Columbus are taken care of. Or, we can build Ohio businesses by connecting them to the resources needed to succeed–resources I wish I knew about when I started my business. There is a real choice. But we must get that message out. Sec. Frank LaRose has spent years raising money so he can try to decieve Ohio about his record. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will process automatically. = = = = I know if we are together we will win. Thank you for your support, Chelsea | = Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure. name: =?utf-8?Q?Attorney=20General=20Daniel=20Cameron?=
subject: BREAKING: Pro-Life Supreme Court Victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ATTORNEYS GENERAL ASSOCIATION
body:
I will always stand tall for life. | | | [ ](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=c33e0f6102&e=edf8a4d16d)
---
| Friend -

This is Kentucky Attorney General Daniel Cameron.

**Yesterday, the****United States Supreme Court ruled in favor****of my pro-life defense of Kentucky's ban on dismemberment abortions.**

[An overwhelming 8-1 majority affirmed the right of Attorneys General](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=d841458972&e=edf8a4d16d) to defend commonsense pro-life legislation that protects the God-given right to life of our most vulnerable.

**I will never back down from my duty to defend the right to life.**
---
| Kentucky's 'Human Rights of Unborn Children Act' was passed with a large bipartisan majority in 2018, prohibiting the barbaric practice of live-dismemberment abortion.

_Far-left activists, liberal judges and the abortion industry were not happy_ \- they've fought for years to overturn our pro-life law. This ruling is a blow to the pro-abortion left and **a major victory for life.**

Across the nation, Republican Attorneys General are standing tall for life and refusing to cower to D.C. Democrats' extreme abortion agenda. We need your support to continue defending the right to life and combat liberal attacks - [can you contribute $50, $25 or just $10 to back Republican Attorneys General today?](https://republicanags.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a0af7b31298ac68022275a138&id=d6c6d19c16&e=edf8a4d16d)
