name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: The road to the state convention
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42570027/333455457/-280334095?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220304convention_gv_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGZjOGExYS1lNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y1Fzl-cPiW_TnRxJJ_NifJYksm4EaycRYCEV1L3lt_Q=)
---
Friend, We’ve come a long way since I first announced my campaign for Congress in New Mexico’s 2nd District last September, and tomorrow is a major milestone: it’s the New Mexico Democratic Party’s Pre-Primary Convention! **This event will bring delegates from all over New Mexico together to vote, and determines what our position on the primary ballot is.** Over the past few months, I’ve had the pleasure to travel thousands of miles to attend county Democratic Party conventions, meeting with New Mexico voters and local leaders across the district, from Hobbs to Lordsburg, from Albuquerque to Sunland Park, and many communities in between. **I’ve shown up, I’ve put in the work, I’ve listened, and I’m ready to beat Yvette Herrell. But I need your help.** Tomorrow, delegates will begin to vote for their preferred candidate to take on Herrell in the general election, and we’ll learn the results on March 13. [**Will you show you have my back in this critical toss-up race and fuel us to the primary by donating $10 or more ahead of tomorrow’s Pre-Primary Convention?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42570028/333455458/-280334095?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220304convention_gv_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGZjOGExYS1lNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y1Fzl-cPiW_TnRxJJ_NifJYksm4EaycRYCEV1L3lt_Q=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Friend, We’ve come a long way since I first announced my campaign for Congress in New Mexico’s 2nd District last September, and tomorrow is a major milestone: it’s the New Mexico Democratic Party’s Pre-Primary Convention! This event will bring delegates from all over New Mexico together to vote, and determines what our position on the primary ballot is. Over the past few months, I’ve had the pleasure to travel thousands of miles to attend county Democratic Party conventions, meeting with New Mexico voters and local leaders across the district, from Hobbs to Lordsburg, from Albuquerque to Sunland Park, and many communities in between. I’ve shown up, I’ve put in the work, I’ve listened, and I’m ready to beat Yvette Herrell. But I need your help. Tomorrow, delegates will begin to vote for their preferred candidate to take on Herrell in the general election, and we’ll learn the results on March 13. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Together, I know we’ll flip NM-02 blue and give this district a representative who truly represents our values. Si se puede! — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

**Our Revolution ("The Bernie PAC") endorsed**Melanie for NY-03**!**

Working people cannot afford more bought-and-paid-for politicians — from _both_ parties — in Congress. If we continue to let billionaires and lobbyists fund corrupt campaigns and dictate the policies that shape our lives, we will never see Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, protection for reproductive rights, the end of gun violence, or any other common sense progressive policy come to pass.
That’s why this movement to elect Melanie is about more than NY-03:**If we don't draw a hard line NOW and support progressive candidates who reject corporate money, we will never see the change we need.**
The longer we wait to take a stand, the harder it will be for us to take our country back from the special interests doing harm to our communities for the sake of profit. Our Revolution is on the front lines of this fight, and we’re proud to have their support in this race.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JESSICA CISNEROS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
We’re ramping up our field operations for the runoff. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4ncNffnCt8Lt9Je5R9WOvk5rLHTOWXpvoH3UwkCWTNEr9ewMnyoV4iRON81PGmRHrshjvXlyrfh4SRdiWmKzrgZZC6qz95OuEqVHfVl0lrgaNYROlc5TyjHMy2hZq5vdrlEwBJ--4nDcqJHjrniL8g3i2QLWLFOArxy_KaSFBvS_prw9UsarHI38km_hTqQJsI/3k2/Y7lSIKEyQ6qvp7uGx3d3mA/h0/dS_0LaSN9SthoyoEhXBrpNzKyXLNsS3KM-sZiDIHkmw) Peter, here are a few key updates for you:
* The runoff election is just **81 days** away.
* Henry Cuellar still has **$1.2 million** cash on hand to get re-elected.
* So to compete with Cuellar’s corporate funders, **we’re ramping up our field operations in every corner of our district** to spread the word about our movement to bring bold, progressive change to South Texas.

**How are we doing this? By funding our field operation to reach every part of the district from Laredo to San Antonio.**

With the runoff election just weeks away, we’re doubling down on our outreach programs to reach out to voters. We’re also putting up more road signs, more posters, and hosting more phonebanks to make sure everyone knows about Jessica’s vision for South Texas.

[_**To help us fund our voter outreach programs, we’re relying on our grassroots supporters like you to help us keep the momentum going. clean_body: We’re ramping up our field operations for the runoff. | | | Peter, here are a few key updates for you: The runoff election is just 81 days away. Henry Cuellar still has $1.2 million cash on hand to get re-elected. So to compete with Cuellar’s corporate funders, we’re ramping up our field operations in every corner of our district to spread the word about our movement to bring bold, progressive change to South Texas. How are we doing this? By funding our field operation to reach every part of the district from Laredo to San Antonio. With the runoff election just weeks away, we’re doubling down on our outreach programs to reach out to voters. We’re also putting up more road signs, more posters, and hosting more phonebanks to make sure everyone knows about Jessica’s vision for South Texas. Our campaign is powered by grassroots donors — regular folks chipping in what they can, and when they can — unlike Henry Cuellar who depends on corporate PACs and special interests to fund his campaign. It’s clear that Henry Cuellar has a lot of big, powerful, wealthy interests in his corner. But we have something better: we have you. We have the people.** We know that our people-powered campaign can overcome Cuellar’s corporate donors. And we can make up that difference in our fundraising gap during the runoff election. And the more we close the fundraising gap with Henry Cuellar, the wider our path to victory will be. Together, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

body:
Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion, or prohibiting the free exercise thereof . . . Peter, I think we can agree: **America needs more Christian conservatives in Washington.** Our country was founded to be a place where people could practice their religion freely and without fear of infringement. It’s because of our founding fathers that my great-grandparents were able to found the church I grew up in and still teach my children in. **WATCH MY NEW VIDEO:** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=255ed8eeffa84be8ab8bfec85b5ea8aa&_e=tGr1ZW8jk8uyKPVQAH8vQfIR9erqE5-5-bmjqLughh8PhTjZeTMOMnS56OvedZJWsDqsSk2bnWb72JsZNVDbEoOyl-52sEQyWLMVSH0euNrMt_n9WnZ5Qpxq261A9bN3GCmj2MQ7r7S8_YatQoyrpg_N0PFhhb7U-yFazTEHOqgEJ8hQQmvMyqLCFpMAbfw_o6QFsyShpylf9BjAs-LOf3igp0HtRbU7DIaACoq4Bv3-yxsOXNhNFL5P2iLdpf-LgbSK8Znz8KhuqjeKxs-w_1Bgd-5hpQ99-Gy2jqPvG3JuuFulaQ_DSBfJygevek--0vkolW1IpQXrIjbaOsi9Ax9ARL7vg5MPbqkd5kN8BR0hKRyuIHJaV9K4YCXG7VdQG_CROajgCmjH1TyUkJPpTieX09O4clR-ybYYG5DwiLtWeu11pzXY8OBX3kL72WIKCic1KyKTi8wVNk5Xz3oXaQ%3D%3D) [**Put More Christians in the U.S. Senate**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=255ed8eeffa84be8ab8bfec85b5ea8aa&_e=tGr1ZW8jk8uyKPVQAH8vQfIR9erqE5-5-bmjqLughh8PhTjZeTMOMnS56OvedZJWsDqsSk2bnWb72JsZNVDbEoOyl-52sEQyWLMVSH0euNrMt_n9WnZ5Qpxq261A9bN3GCmj2MQ7r7S8_YatQoyrpg_N0PFhhb7U-yFazTEHOqgEJ8hQQmvMyqLCFpMAbfw_o6QFsyShpylf9BjAs-LOf3igp0HtRbU7DIaACoq4Bv3-yxsOXNhNFL5P2iLdpf-LaVq_fF8z71h-aprpK6qjEiCFdXA6eyScgfpv6Quqp4HTES8TubNoCh9RCofdws0aHmxR300n-vymTVWw9u5aGrkq7f8zZql2BFxUS6DCi3dBlHx3cQ3NLnEBVkLbbtfYxzEK2S6aVQtfe22oCSvNBW7FpcQK3oFFcey7pfeIs_tZR5z6NwcGZByB8gUO-0JiiXoPnWZn2iew8nXaZgeE5A%3D%3D) **_I’ve dedicated my entire life to serving our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, and that service will not stop in the Senate._** **As a Christian conservative, I pledge to:** **• Protect our religious freedoms** **• Stand up for Christian values** **• Protect the lives of the unborn** I struggle to imagine a world where our founding fathers are looking down on us right now and are proud of what we’ve done. If we don’t put up a fight by putting _God-fearing patriots_ in Congress, **_we risk losing our First Amendment rights._** **DON’T LET THAT HAPPEN, Peter.** [**ADD YOUR NAME & JOIN THE FIGHT**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=255ed8eeffa84be8ab8bfec85b5ea8aa&_e=tGr1ZW8jk8uyKPVQAH8vQfIR9erqE5-5-bmjqLughh8PhTjZeTMOMnS56OvedZJWsDqsSk2bnWb72JsZNVDbEoOyl-52sEQyWLMVSH0euNrMt_n9WnZ5Qpxq261A9bN3GCmj2MQ7r7S8_YatQoyrpg_N0PFhhb7U-yFazTEHOqgEJ8hQQmvMyqLCFpMAbfw_o6QFsyShpylf9BjAs-LOf3igp0HtRbU7DIaACoq4Bv3-yxsOXNhNFL5P2iLdpf-LGNncjGO51BlI9yifqE2VOfhS2DapOjRK5XlTGTVt7xvuCYe3UBQ6lJDSRvKqTRYwow6C_mUhilJkLBuRGiM4Rq0yGjtpmtqMt_oZL_fiDYPhPdQXiVJL5EvzAsS2KFWRd7UOxGyG81SN4t2tg0eKweiTonzh5f5WXxKwJVNzz9PxwJ1GseWgJgD5GFJx4KKAXBPEpH226D0_As1oA-G05w%3D%3D) Thank you for your time and support, Katie [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=255ed8eeffa84be8ab8bfec85b5ea8aa&_e=tGr1ZW8jk8uyKPVQAH8vQfIR9erqE5-5-bmjqLughh8PhTjZeTMOMnS56OvedZJWcOyJLO5aEQBQzPH0AgRyB123So-yv1YwV4lDmB_3avMUt7_pmjhYzGv1vRinhuijmnM4FYI4Y2_E9b4yqCK9pgnIYxv46eYzMYsGJnDPT1WJjVWzOgALG9djU59EjD_tx-VvbCWSerCggDbm1OH2YbcO9WsHZqZ-mxodSbZVwlrUTZpfIHAOYdTb3jti0J_m1EnPiaeLEfn5QC-OeqmUr7RBoEh_3sZiiAovs4dT8HO8G1yuQkRLydc7DHPCGc-p8ovMNQf3MFIVVRf6aRy7Nt6UOzdLG-2Rcyvhq89ew9wo4zZL8tpiq4vWpEeULiEfZP5sgIWgRlorCmyr4UmDxV0W8C-pg5Nv3VQBtcHtyyhxN6BpbLa443ykbTsJ2eGt) Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

| | Happy Women’s History Month, friends. While this month serves as a time to celebrate the women’s movement and the progress women have made, we can’t ignore the discrimination and misogyny that continues to harm women – especially women of color. To demonstrate a fraction of the hardships impacting women across the country, let me share some statistics with you:
* Women earn 82 cents to the dollar of every man (even less for women of color).
* Nearly 1 in 4 women will obtain an abortion at some point in her life – meaning the ongoing cause to repeal reproductive rights is impacting women’s safety and autonomy over their bodies.
* Every 1 in 5 women is a victim of sexual assault.
* Women comprise nearly half of the workforce, but only 27% are STEM workers.

As a woman leader in politics, I know firsthand what it’s like to be dismissed and violated. If I give a passionate speech on the House floor or during an interview, then I’m perceived as _irrational_ or _emotional._ But if a man in the same position as me does the same exact thing, he’s _validated._ I was the first woman to ever be elected to MI-11, and I ran my campaign on the basis of hopefully inspiring women, especially young girls, that it’s okay to use your voice to stand up for what you believe in. That’s why I voted yes to pass the _Women’s Health and Protection Act_ , legislation that protects a woman’s right over her body, why I voted to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment to abolish the wage gap, and why I am an ardent supporter of paid family leave, a burden that more often than not falls on mothers. That’s also why I will always keep pushing for more STEM education funding to help more girls enter one of Michigan’s most prominent industries. **Women’s History Month serves as a reminder that this month, and every month, we must recognize the work we have ahead while appreciating how far we’ve come.[If you’re with me, will you chip in $25 or whatever you can to keep me advocating for these issues in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42570513/333457688/-1707378419?refcode=EM_BS_STE_220304_FR_WHM_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc0OTZlMy1lNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fGIhy8xfalBr5wYRXdby5cmKkGhlsBBZ4DZ12OeX5n4=)** | | | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42570514/333457693/-1707378419?refcode=EM_BS_STE_220304_FR_WHM_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc0OTZlMy1lNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fGIhy8xfalBr5wYRXdby5cmKkGhlsBBZ4DZ12OeX5n4=)

clean_body: | = | | Happy Women’s History Month, friends. While this month serves as a time to celebrate the women’s movement and the progress women have made, we can’t ignore the discrimination and misogyny that continues to harm women – especially women of color. To demonstrate a fraction of the hardships impacting women across the country, let me share some statistics with you: Women earn 82 cents to the dollar of every man (even less for women of color). Nearly 1 in 4 women will obtain an abortion at some point in her life – meaning the ongoing cause to repeal reproductive rights is impacting women’s safety and autonomy over their bodies. Every 1 in 5 women is a victim of sexual assault. Women comprise nearly half of the workforce, but only 27% are STEM workers. As a woman leader in politics, I know firsthand what it’s like to be dismissed and violated. If I give a passionate speech on the House floor or during an interview, then I’m perceived as irrational or emotional. But if a man in the same position as me does the same exact thing, he’s validated. I was the first woman to ever be elected to MI-11, and I ran my campaign on the basis of hopefully inspiring women, especially young girls, that it’s okay to use your voice to stand up for what you believe in. That’s why I voted yes to pass the Women’s Health and Protection Act , legislation that protects a woman’s right over her body, why I voted to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment to abolish the wage gap, and why I am an ardent supporter of paid family leave, a burden that more often than not falls on mothers. That’s also why I will always keep pushing for more STEM education funding to help more girls enter one of Michigan’s most prominent industries. Women’s History Month serves as a reminder that this month, and every month, we must recognize the work we have ahead while appreciating how far we’ve come.= | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Together, Haley | | = | If you'd like to support Haley Stevens for Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Folks, I’ve spent a good deal of time back home in Colorado with my girls this winter. When I wasn’t working hard for Coloradans in Washington, I put the snowblower to use digging my family out after the last few winter storms, and now I’m meeting with Colorado Democratic groups across the state. Meeting with folks here in Colorado and reading your responses to my team’s surveys every month helps as I fight for you in Washington. Your insight has helped me pass legislation like banning surprise emergency medical bills; securing investments in our roads, bridges, and high-speed internet that will create jobs all across the state; and cutting taxes for working families. You drive my work, so I have a personal request: [_**Will you take a moment to take the Official March Priorities Survey today? I look forward to reading your response as I plan for the months ahead.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42582162/333510139/-7838427?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220304_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTJlNGRjZi0wZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NnoujDQ7eVXdZa5HdZVXKE2YJAbegGcPs9IpwtxD08Y=&emci=c70fc587-fa9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9a2e4dcf-0e9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1295540) | | [BEGIN SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42582163/333510141/-7838427?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220304_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTJlNGRjZi0wZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NnoujDQ7eVXdZa5HdZVXKE2YJAbegGcPs9IpwtxD08Y=&emci=c70fc587-fa9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9a2e4dcf-0e9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1295540)

body:
We’re holding her accountable. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q8N8HQVdVYgja3bqzWMQJ9gXg-d1W-UxdpQdoxqWJV84gtRfPOZSek0tIjuoV2K2hMwKXmXy_0kNfow00aZdi4E-EpKISZZfhqpXugwDS4A1FqmY-n6mvDZxMPPRTIGJcKnZu6-uRmsQL4QYtcQZ5eWnxGoAr-K3jrEefRDjB5Nv2ArU-QOnryxqAr_AGq62EUpbo09Ftll1QpSIgjOLxhB339BuVlIYtV8SGtAPuh5uFzWAW7lMh9KLrkwA-DDcqo/3k2/HWBt6oCBQ1-a_BRN5w9QeA/h0/lEFxVXJAhMRVRCI6i6gtkx0gsR3ctfYin3B7PIi8fZI)
Peter, Sinema has betrayed our Native communities. Indigenous leaders who mobilized Arizona voters to help elect Senator Kyrsten Sinema in 2018 say**the corporate-backed Democratic lawmaker can no longer count on their support** after she chose the filibuster over voting rights reforms that would have vastly improved Native communities’ access to the ballot box. Jonathan Nez, president of the Navajo Nation, the largest tribe in the U.S., said this:
> _We’re disappointed in the Senator. She’s on the national stage due to the Native American vote and large turnout among Navajo people. If she doesn’t deliver on what’s important to us,_**_I’m sure there’s another candidate who will._**
We agree. name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: We need your signature!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8cf8a6b5fb3f/campaign-update-yellow-couch-tour-flag-day-and-juneteenth-6853317?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=677412457d&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear Friends,

As of this morning, we have collected 23,000 signatures.

Thank you to all of you who have signed, collected, and supported our signature gathering efforts up to this point!

Once we have 28,000 signatures, we will submit our packets to the Lt. Governor's office. We anticipate up to 50% of those signatures will be rejected for any number of reasons.

So while 23,000 is a number we are excited about and proud of, in reality, we need to gather at least 23,000 more to ensure enough of our signatures meet the criteria to be verified. And we need to gather them by the end of March!
---
|
---
| You can help us reach our signature gathering goal and ensure a place on the Republican primary ballot a few different ways:
* If you have been collecting signatures for us, turn in your packet ASAP so we have the most accurate count possible. Mail your packet to Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate, P.O. Box 1467, Bountiful, Utah 84011.
* If you have not yet signed a packet, do it NOW at any of our [s](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=a2a6a1fc8e&e=10c1db3257)[ignature gathering locations.](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=5ef581d0ce&e=10c1db3257)
* If you have already signed a packet, [make sure you are registered as a Republican. ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=4e426509ec&e=10c1db3257)
* [Sign up to collect signatures.](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=c0ba45806f&e=10c1db3257) Take your packet and talk to your family and friends, knock on doors in your neighborhood, and stand outside public places with lots of foot traffic to gather as many signatures as you can as quickly as possible.
* If you are already gathering signatures, thank you! Use [this list](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=d96c68ff14&e=10c1db3257) of busy locations to collect signatures with #TeamBecky or find busy locations in your own community and keep gathering!

We need your help. Together we can gather enough signatures to get on the Republican primary ballot and unseat Mike Lee.

Thank you as always for all your support. I cannot wait to take my vision for Utah's future to Washington DC, and I know you can help me get there!
---

name: Dr. Gillian Battino
subject: Celebrating - and creating - women’s history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Gillian Battino for State Treasurer
body:
Honoring women’s history has no end date.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42582800/333512568/237656307?refcode=EM_FR_220304WHM_N_GB_90DO_4_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWUwMzVlOC0xMDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=itTwQx6oeh2BhydLM8_ZB9Hbkvq4kbJhmt2Rc-6Y-WU=) Team,

March is Women’s History Month. This is a time to celebrate both the legacy of our foremothers and the promise of our daughters.

This year’s theme - providing healing and hope - really strikes a chord with me. _As a physician and mother of six_ , I have spent most of my life **giving comfort and care to others.**

This is work that I have been honored to perform, but caregiving is often overlooked and relegated to women. In my travels across Wisconsin, I have been so inspired by the resilience of ordinary, caregiving women and moved by their struggles.

**Women’s work is work,** and it must be recognized and respected. Let’s come together this month, and all year long, to embrace - and create - women’s history.
Sincerely,

\--Gillian Battino
---

Dr. Battino is a University of WI-Madison fellowship-trained radiologist who lives in Wausau with her husband, Ben, German Shepherd, Stella, two teenage children, and their laundry. **Can you help us send Gillian Battino to Madison?**
---

clean_body: Honoring women’s history has no end date. = Team, March is Women’s History Month. This is a time to celebrate both the legacy of our foremothers and the promise of our daughters. This year’s theme - providing healing and hope - really strikes a chord with me. As a physician and mother of six , I have spent most of my life giving comfort and care to others. This is work that I have been honored to perform, but caregiving is often overlooked and relegated to women. In my travels across Wisconsin, I have been so inspired by the resilience of ordinary, caregiving women and moved by their struggles. Women’s work is work, and it must be recognized and respected. Let’s come together this month, and all year long, to embrace - and create - women’s history. Sincerely, \--Gillian Battino Dr. Battino is a University of WI-Madison fellowship-trained radiologist who lives in Wausau with her husband, Ben, German Shepherd, Stella, two teenage children, and their laundry. Can you help us send Gillian Battino to Madison? = Paid for by Dr. Gillian Battino for State Treasurer Contributions may also be mailed to: Dr. Gillian Battino for State Treasurer P.O Box 292, Wausau, WI 54402 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
subject: One of our strongest supporters in Cresco
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
No extra effort required.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/lte/LTE-SCOTUS-fight-climate-crisis/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-04_lte_scotus_nonopeners_&source=ema_2022-03-04_lte_scotus_nonopeners_&t=2&akid=12950%2E53494%2EvQaJUr) Friend, It's more important than ever that the U.S. lead the world in a global transition away from fossil fuels. The Russian invasion of Ukraine is an enormous tragedy, and it's being powered by fossil fuel money. The U.S. government must be empowered to regulate climate pollution and accelerate a just transition to a clean energy economy where there is no room for petrostate autocrats like Putin. And that very power is potentially on the chopping block: **This week, the Supreme Court heard a case that directly threatens our ability to regulate climate pollution.** That's why right now, I'm asking you to take the next step in your climate advocacy and submit a letter to the editor of your local newspaper to get the word out about _West Virginia v. EPA._ (To make it as easy and quick as possible, we've already done a lot of the work for you.) [**_Will you take a minute today to submit a letter to the editor of your local newspaper in support of federal climate action? (We wrote a customizable letter that you can sign. No extra effort required!)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/lte/LTE-SCOTUS-fight-climate-crisis/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-04_lte_scotus_nonopeners_&source=ema_2022-03-04_lte_scotus_nonopeners_&t=3&akid=12950%2E53494%2EvQaJUr) | [SUBMIT A QUICK LETTER](https://act.evergreenaction.com/lte/LTE-SCOTUS-fight-climate-crisis/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-04_lte_scotus_nonopeners_&source=ema_2022-03-04_lte_scotus_nonopeners_&t=4&akid=12950%2E53494%2EvQaJUr)
---
The conservative supermajority on the Court is considering gutting the _Clean Air Act_ , undercutting the EPA, and limiting executive climate power. This one decision, which will be released in June, could disrupt 50 years of precedent and progress.
So we need to speak up now, before it's too late. With just a minute of your time, you can help get the message to SCOTUS that the American people want clean air, an effective EPA, and federal climate action—and as one of our strongest supporters in Cresco, we need YOU to join us and elevate this issue in Pennsylvania.
And though this action takes just a minute, it is one of the strongest you can take today: The opinion section is the most widely read section of any newspaper. It's where community members turn for new ideas and where powerful decision-makers take the pulse of the nation.
[**_Click here to use our easy and quick tool to submit a letter to the editor in just a minute. We have a pre-written message (that you are welcome to edit!), and we'll find your local paper for you. Once you submit via our tool, we submit directly to your local paper._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/lte/LTE-SCOTUS-fight-climate-crisis/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-04_lte_scotus_nonopeners_&source=ema_2022-03-04_lte_scotus_nonopeners_&t=5&akid=12950%2E53494%2EvQaJUr)
Your voice is your most powerful tool in the climate movement—and now is the time to use it.
Thank you for taking a high-impact action with us today,
Lena Moffitt
Campaigns Director, Evergreen Action
[SEND YOUR QUICK LETTER](https://act.evergreenaction.com/lte/LTE-SCOTUS-fight-climate-crisis/?utm_source=ema_2022-03-04_lte_scotus_nonopeners_&source=ema_2022-03-04_lte_scotus_nonopeners_&t=6&akid=12950%2E53494%2EvQaJUr)

name: Jewels Gray
subject: I just got back from CPAC
body:
Big things are happening in the America First Movement.
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016hBnj9GANhqmUvPHqZhJn2EeNalK1GAdO5HRyoMp2MCTLvdiRYkoMA44Y3Djeqk3beCdYbaBElMEww2GpW46fQhinvvjOwNSraUmw0ZWFiGp2rpTF9Ya-LzyA5pY7_aQDeFEhsf8G7jPQlAKBskdrg==&c=eh9aQ6H3oT4-XJp5r2BwdwlOu9Snr8DDj31EFhxDa9qK3wMjEBuL6Q==&ch=O-kx4RleTf2JUNK12kEtCdU6SnJXGMFNHRQuwYDG_B44ySI8Cx82fg==)
---
---
| Fellow Patriot, I just got back from CPAC with the America First P.A.C.T. and let me tell ya, big things are happening in the America First Movement. Last month I was accepted as a member of the America First P.A.C.T, a group of America First candidates dedicated to working together to enact meaningful policy change once elected into office.
I was one of only two candidates from Colorado that attended CPAC and it was a privilege sharing the message of hope that we have in Colorado this election cycle.
---
| While at CPAC I was honored to meet many America loving patriots including General Michael Flynn and Mike Lindel. I was able to talk to General Flynn about our campaign for CO-08 and I am hopeful that we will earn his support.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016hBnj9GANhqmUvPHqZhJn2EeNalK1GAdO5HRyoMp2MCTLvdiRYkoMA44Y3Djeqk3Zur7Kr9dNr2KjIg9sVAOnUEowQj7lewFs9mJq0ky1Xr130qJJbpZqczrZaKuWGsE5uGMnZQPBzp8dGbuq5k2d7kcnsclKHTYRmH9RdvtkkPyNe9YIfEKdw==&c=eh9aQ6H3oT4-XJp5r2BwdwlOu9Snr8DDj31EFhxDa9qK3wMjEBuL6Q==&ch=O-kx4RleTf2JUNK12kEtCdU6SnJXGMFNHRQuwYDG_B44ySI8Cx82fg==)
---
| I was thrilled to be featured LIVE on Lindell TV and be able to share my message of saving Colorado from the radical left, taking back Colorado, and taking back the House!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016hBnj9GANhqmUvPHqZhJn2EeNalK1GAdO5HRyoMp2MCTLvdiRYkoMA44Y3Djeqk3Zur7Kr9dNr2KjIg9sVAOnUEowQj7lewFs9mJq0ky1Xr130qJJbpZqczrZaKuWGsE5uGMnZQPBzp8dGbuq5k2d7kcnsclKHTYRmH9RdvtkkPyNe9YIfEKdw==&c=eh9aQ6H3oT4-XJp5r2BwdwlOu9Snr8DDj31EFhxDa9qK3wMjEBuL6Q==&ch=O-kx4RleTf2JUNK12kEtCdU6SnJXGMFNHRQuwYDG_B44ySI8Cx82fg==)
---
| Although CPAC was a huge success, I need your help. I am closing in on a massive fundraising deadline and I am asking you to pitch in $22 to help keep my campaign going. Any contribution, whether it's $5 or $2,900 (the maximum allowable by law) is greatly appreciated!
---
| | [Donate to Our Campaign Today](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016hBnj9GANhqmUvPHqZhJn2EeNalK1GAdO5HRyoMp2MCTLvdiRYkoMA44Y3Djeqk3Zur7Kr9dNr2KjIg9sVAOnUEowQj7lewFs9mJq0ky1Xr130qJJbpZqczrZaKuWGsE5uGMnZQPBzp8dGbuq5k2d7kcnsclKHTYRmH9RdvtkkPyNe9YIfEKdw==&c=eh9aQ6H3oT4-XJp5r2BwdwlOu9Snr8DDj31EFhxDa9qK3wMjEBuL6Q==&ch=O-kx4RleTf2JUNK12kEtCdU6SnJXGMFNHRQuwYDG_B44ySI8Cx82fg==)
---
| Your support is CRITICAL to the success of our campaign for CD8.
One of my opponents is begging me to drop out because I am a threat to her and her success. If you donate today, she will see that she was right to be intimidated of our campaign and we will surely see victory in June.

I am asking for you to step up and help today.
Sincerely,
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016hBnj9GANhqmUvPHqZhJn2EeNalK1GAdO5HRyoMp2MCTLvdiRYkoMA44Y3Djeqk3mmx5nlRPMgh56SmMpIBZQSExJMv0kNoaodxXktiSwMPbgaqfVgy2wkzpp2OAHiB4PPXFcS1EDrmCuJyUPZom7w==&c=eh9aQ6H3oT4-XJp5r2BwdwlOu9Snr8DDj31EFhxDa9qK3wMjEBuL6Q==&ch=O-kx4RleTf2JUNK12kEtCdU6SnJXGMFNHRQuwYDG_B44ySI8Cx82fg==)

body:

|
---

| | [“MSNBC’s ‘The Rachel Maddow Show’ struggles without namesake host, sheds viewers across the board”
\- Fox News](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42583252/333514359/-1924158478?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDVhMTRkZi0xMjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8A4su0_Nwf3iZsLtZgsp6n_0gbMkv69Ta4JyT_IQBPk=&emci=bbef5a10-3f9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=305a14df-129c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=16481489)

**__[We need to know: Do you think Rachel Maddow should return?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42583253/333514370/-1924158478?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDVhMTRkZi0xMjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8A4su0_Nwf3iZsLtZgsp6n_0gbMkv69Ta4JyT_IQBPk=&emci=bbef5a10-3f9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=305a14df-129c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=16481489)__** | [Take the poll!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42583254/333514378/-1924158478?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDVhMTRkZi0xMjljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8A4su0_Nwf3iZsLtZgsp6n_0gbMkv69Ta4JyT_IQBPk=&emci=bbef5a10-3f9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=305a14df-129c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=16481489)

[Friend, we’re reaching out to get your insight.

**FIRST:** Rachel Maddow, one of the most trusted journalists exposing the dangers of far-right extremism and the Trump administration, announced that she would take a hiatus from her nightly news program on MSNBC.

**THEN:** Donald Trump’s favorite news outlet, Fox News, started GLOATING.

subject: the CNN report
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
"MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION." |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59738105:68ZtP5E4N:m:1:3253819041:B1C08B78F655B1DE02217085F8089524:r)

---
Peter,

It's becoming clearer by the day that this Senate race in Georgia is going to be THE race that will decide control of the Senate.

But don't take our word for it. Recently our opponent sent out an email to let his supporters know CNN had named him the _**" MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION." **_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59738105:68ZtP5E4N:m:1:3253819041:B1C08B78F655B1DE02217085F8089524:r)
There you have it ... straight from our opponent's campaign. When we tell you how critical this race is, we really mean it.

According to recent polling, the race is too close to call. **[A Quinnipiac survey from last month had our campaign leading our Democrat opponent by ONE POINT- a statistical tie.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59738105:68ZtP5E4N:m:1:3253819041:B1C08B78F655B1DE02217085F8089524:r)**

Peter, $7 or more today really would go a long way in helping us:
1. Register thousands of new voters across the Peach State
2. Reach persuadable voters who will be crucial to victory in November
3. Pay for airtime in expensive Georgia TV markets

In a race as close as the one we're facing, every dollar is make or break.

**[Please let us know we can count on you for your support today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59738105:68ZtP5E4N:m:1:3253819041:B1C08B78F655B1DE02217085F8089524:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59738105:68ZtP5E4N:m:1:3253819041:B1C08B78F655B1DE02217085F8089524:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for Senate

name: Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: There’s only one way to flip PA’s open Senate seat.
disclaimer_text: paid for by the highest bidder
body:
Here’s the big picture of what’s happening in our race.
#
Derek, here’s the big picture of what’s happening in our race in Pennsylvania.
1. **John Fetterman is in the lead to win the Democratic nomination.** We’ve got a double-digit lead in the primary polls, historic grassroots support, and a candidate who’s already won historic statewide victories.
2. On the other side we’ve got Dr. Oz and David McCormick — **two ultra-wealthy GOP dudes who’ve made it clear they’re in this race to protect the interests of their fellow multi-millionaires,** NOT unions, rural communities, LGBTQ+ folks, Black and brown folks, or working families.
3. **Oz and McCormick + their super PACs are spending so much to buy this race (literally tens of millions) that this is now the most expensive Senate race in PA history. 🤯**

There’s only one way to win this. That’s by counting on our powerful movement of hundreds of thousands of working folks from across Pennsylvania that can take on celebrity millionaires, GOP super PACS, and anyone who think they can buy this Senate seat.
**[Will you show you’re a part of this movement right now by pitching in $5 or any amount you can spare? Your donation will directly help John flip Pennsylvania’s open Senate seat and secure a Democratic majority.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45119?refcode=em20220304-4834&t=1&akid=4834%2E434096%2EO1mJfp)**
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45119?amount=5&refcode=em20220304-4834&t=20&akid=4834%2E434096%2EO1mJfp)**
__
Supporters like you are making sure Pennsylvania will *not* be bought and paid for by the highest bidder. That’s pretty freaking cool, Derek.
Thank you for being on this team, 🙏
—Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220304-4834-footer&t=21&refcode2=4834_434096_O1mJfp&akid=4834%2E434096%2EO1mJfp)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Dan Rowe, Organizing Director for Team Morgan Harper
subject: How to support our organizing program:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220304-749-footer-ak&t=1002&akid=749%2E90090%2ECXomZ0 ]Morgan Harper

Hi! In case we haven’t met
yet, I’m Dan, the Organizing Director for the Morgan Harper campaign.

As Organizing Director, my number-one priority for this campaign is to
make sure that our campaign can reach as many Ohio voters as possible
— from every part of the state. Mobilizing folks to vote for Morgan in May
requires our team to build deep ties to communities throughout Ohio, and
build trust. We have a lot of work to do with just 60 days until the
primary — and that’s why we need your help.

Together, we can build the largest organizing team Ohio has ever seen to
beat out our far-right and our corporate-backed opponents. Here’s how you
can get involved in our organizing program:

Canvassing

We are knocking doors across the state to identify Morgan supporters, and
talk to undecided Democratic voters about the issues that matter most to
them and why Morgan is the best person to represent them in the U.S.
Senate. Closer to the election, we’ll also be reaching back out to
supporters to make sure they have a plan to vote!

We have canvass events already scheduled across different communities that
you can sign up for. If there isn’t one in your area we also have a huge
need for canvass hosts. Hosting a canvass means you’d schedule an event on
our event platform and serve as the point person for other volunteers.
We’ll have our organizing team train you through webinars and 1:1
trainings to ensure you’re completely prepared and comfortable. The day of
the canvass you’d run a quick training at the beginning of each canvass
and distribute materials provided by the campaign.

Solo canvassing is also an option if there isn’t a canvass nearby, or if
the scheduled dates don’t fit with your schedule.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer?refcode=em20220304-1&t=1003&akid=749%2E90090%2ECXomZ0 ]If you would like to get involved with this effort or learn more,
please click here to sign up for canvasses happening near you, sign up for
a solo canvass, or sign up to host a canvass.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer?refcode=em20220304-749&t=1004&akid=749%2E90090%2ECXomZ0 ]Sign up here →

Call Team

You can sign up to join the call team where you’ll help make phone calls
to voters and supporters across the state. Together, you can help us
recruit more volunteers, and talk to voters about why Morgan is the best
candidate, while reminding them to vote.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer?refcode=em20220304-1&t=1005&akid=749%2E90090%2ECXomZ0 ]Sign up to join the call team here by filling out our volunteer form!

[ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer?refcode=em20220304-749&t=1006&akid=749%2E90090%2ECXomZ0 ]Sign up here →

Texting

Our texting program is a great opportunity to reach hundreds, or even
thousands of voters from home! If you join our texting team, you’ll be
texting people on our targeted list to make sure as many voters as
possible know about Morgan, to identify our supporters, and ultimately
remind them to vote before the primary!

[ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer?refcode=em20220304-1&t=1007&akid=749%2E90090%2ECXomZ0 ]Click here to fill out our volunteering form and join our texting team!

[ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer?refcode=em20220304-749&t=1008&akid=749%2E90090%2ECXomZ0 ]Sign up here →

Data Entry/Admin

If you volunteer to help out with our data entry/admin team, you’ll help
support the canvassing program by using our voter database software to
convert our statewide list of targeted voters into specific walkable lists
that canvassers will use to knock doors. Our staff and volunteers will
also collect important contact information on paper sign-up sheets from
people who attend our events or that we meet out in the field, and the
data entry team will make sure we can actually use all that information by
helping enter it into our campaign database.

We’ll provide training via webinars and written documentation for every
step of the process.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer?refcode=em20220304-1&t=1009&akid=749%2E90090%2ECXomZ0 ]If you’re interested in helping out with our data entry needs, please
fill out the form to sign up here!

[ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer?refcode=em20220304-749&t=1010&akid=749%2E90090%2ECXomZ0 ]Sign up here →

Additional Volunteer Opportunities

We also have a lot of other miscellaneous ways to get involved with our
campaign. Occasionally we’ll need temporary housing for staff or
volunteers, donated office space, donated office supplies, or social media
amplification, just to name a few. If you feel like none of the
volunteering opportunities mentioned above are a good fit for you,
[ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer?refcode=em20220304-1&t=1011&akid=749%2E90090%2ECXomZ0 ]please check “other” on this volunteering form and we’ll reach out if a
need arises.

[ https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer?refcode=em20220304-749&t=1012&akid=749%2E90090%2ECXomZ0 ]Sign up here →

I hope you’ll enjoy these opportunities to get involved and help build a
strong grassroots movement to send Morgan to the U.S. Senate!

Thank you for your support,

Dan

Organizing Director
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. To remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1013&akid=749%2E90090%2ECXomZ0

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio.

As Organizing Director, my number-one priority for this campaign is to make sure that our campaign can reach as many Ohio voters as possible — from every part of the state. Mobilizing folks to vote for Morgan in May requires our team to build deep ties to communities throughout Ohio, and build trust. We have a lot of work to do with just 60 days until the primary — and that’s why we need your help. Together, we can build the largest organizing team Ohio has ever seen to beat out our far-right and our corporate-backed opponents. Here’s how you can get involved in our organizing program: Canvassing We are knocking doors across the state to identify Morgan supporters, and talk to undecided Democratic voters about the issues that matter most to them and why Morgan is the best person to represent them in the U.S. Senate. name: Emma Bouton
subject: The "hockey stick" effect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
| | | Hi Friend, I’m the Finance Director with Matt and Cynthia’s campaign and I’ve been thinking a lot lately about how to solve a problem that almost every progressive campaign faces: the “hockey stick effect”. The hockey stick effect is a visual metaphor that explains how grassroots, small dollar donations often shoot up right before Election Day as lots of energy and attention gets focused on the campaign. While money at any stage of a campaign is important, the challenge with the majority of a campaign’s budget coming in right at the end is that campaigns can’t plan for these funds or make the early investments they need to win (like hiring staff, designing and printing mailers, etc). The hockey stick effect has cost many strong progressive candidates victories. That’s why our campaign is working tirelessly to fundraise early, and bugging you with so many fundraising emails (sorry)! Friend, a recurring donation from you today would make a HUGE difference in helping us break the hockey stick! This is one of the highest impact ways to give because it allows us to budget accurately in advance.
**[Our campaign currently has just over 50 monthly recurring donors, and we’re shooting to get that number to 75 by the end of the week. Friend, can you start a recurring donation today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yVYYsIDNX1DfXh1F5jUPC7_od5KzpA_pkPNkeMl6OXBngCxnGatTf8ISve91z2xHFvKxUf8FQ0sOUuo5UQUVCXqKxDyw_HxlC2hCx8LSsxf4O46-oT9PJ2gIPNhuCGlm4Cyk9qmd6Hv80kOx0iPIq9DDKucjB1HIf3vab8A5prCX5f8JHhQchE5mcfj_h2gWSFkZmJ-itt1w3ImB14uT8lp_u4vwZ1nupm5VixDgSM8G5u13NMCLphsETp_XB_fIkU5XvnkloHItsP_1KTvK6oMsm-_7VRzZxnY1u9sHX26w/3k2/8pe9p_UWQ8iMY0izav_gAw/h0/8mrCDNQZDRkzL_xL4cQgSV55PnrCCpfH0xYK6wXNvbo)** Did you know that 40% of voters in the new Sixth used to be represented by Congresswoman Bonamici in the First District? We've got a really tough road ahead of us. As Congresswoman Bonamici said, the field is crowded. Andrea has some stiff competition, including at least one billionaire who thinks he can buy this seat. We're not going to let that happen. **[Will you stand with Congresswoman Suzanne Bonamici and donate to Andrea now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42583916/333516073/-1795595002?refcode=2022-03-04-sbkicker&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=59b265f0-149c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWIyNjVmMC0xNDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_I7Mht96vNzZARNvjUiJQEFIqjrtOvfGujgGXKQ0FQ=)** _Shannon Geison_ [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42583917/333516074/-1795595002?refcode=2022-03-04-sbkicker&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=59b265f0-149c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWIyNjVmMC0xNDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_I7Mht96vNzZARNvjUiJQEFIqjrtOvfGujgGXKQ0FQ=) Forwarded Message [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42583918/333516075/-1943795144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWIyNjVmMC0xNDljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_I7Mht96vNzZARNvjUiJQEFIqjrtOvfGujgGXKQ0FQ=&emci=4c262ffc-0f9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=59b265f0-149c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=5643047) Hello Today I am endorsing Andrea Salinas for Congress. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gómez for Assembly 2022 Special Election, #1443884
body:
https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
Before I was elected to City Council, I spent 12 years fighting to keep polluting industries out of my neighborhood of Barrio Logan and other South Bay communities like it. After being elected, I worked tirelessly to pass smarter climate policies and create a greener San Diego.
Needless to say, oil corporations aren't my biggest fan.
They know I'm going to bring that same fight for our environment to Sacramento. That's why Big Oil has been pouring money into my opponent's campaign and outside attack ads.
My priority has always been working folks, not special interests.
I need to reach as many potential voters as I can before Election Day to make sure I can get my message out — and Big Oil can't buy themselves this seat >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_030522_BigOil]
Thank you so much!
-- Georgette

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The FBI’s Political Hit List
body:
Wouldn't it be great if we could carry a firearm, openly or concealed without any permit required by the government?
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/bczdrTWUcAs6kN8ucaJ9fQ/5ZLI8rwLIiHHEhRWTRsIHQ)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/bczdrTWUcAs6kN8ucaJ9fQ/5ZLI8rwLIiHHEhRWTRsIHQ) Wouldn't it be great if we could carry a firearm, openly or concealed without any permit required by the government?

**Of course!**

It's called Constitutional Carry.

Florida's Governor Ron DeSantis said this about Constitutional Carry when asked about it during a recent press conference, "put it on my desk, and I'll sign it!"

**And that should happen . . . but it won 't help me and other Americans who have been unconstitutionally Red Flagged by the FBI!**

[**Help me get to Congress where I will work to dismantle the FBI's political hit list that strips the Second Amendment Right of Americans!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/bczdrTWUcAs6kN8ucaJ9fQ/5ZLI8rwLIiHHEhRWTRsIHQ)

In 2020, I was placed on the FBI's "Federally Denied Persons File" after I confronted former FBI Director James Comey at his book signing. I was never notified about being put on this list, and I only found out I was on the list when I applied for a concealed carry permit in Florida, **and was denied!**

There are likely hundreds of thousands of people on that list who don't even know about it . . . **just like I didn 't know about it!**

The FBI's "Federally Denied Persons File" is nothing more than a political hit list to disarm patriots and Americans whose politics they don't agree with.

We've seen this with the IRS through their denial of conservative non-profits, and we even saw it with the Clinton White House when Hillary literally kept a list of names of Americans who she wanted to illegally harass through government agencies.

**Congress has the power to fix this, and NO ONE - not even members of our own party are talking about it!**

[**Help me change that by getting me elected to Congress so I can EXPOSE the FBI 's abuse of power and their political targeting of Americans!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/bczdrTWUcAs6kN8ucaJ9fQ/5ZLI8rwLIiHHEhRWTRsIHQ)
When I'm in Congress, I will fight tirelessly to ensure that federal agencies never get away with infringing on any Americans' Second Amendment Right, the way they infringed on mine! Early voting in my Congressional primary is just FIVE MONTHS away and I need all the help I can get. [Chip in to support my campaign today with whatever amount you can contribute](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/bczdrTWUcAs6kN8ucaJ9fQ/5ZLI8rwLIiHHEhRWTRsIHQ).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Joe Biden FAILED
subject: Can he stand up to Russia?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard
body:
Joe Biden isn’t strong enough to stand up to Vladmir Putin Peter, Joe Biden isn’t strong enough to stand up to Vladmir Putin.

His thoughts and prayers for Ukraine aren’t enough, and his sanctions are too little, too late.

_And as if he wasn’t delusional enough, he’s even asking Communist China to stand up to Russia so he doesn’t have to. _

**The truth is, Joe Biden and his Democrat administration's weakness allowed Russia’s attack on Ukraine to happen. **

We need to do everything we can to prevent this from happening ever again - and that starts with patriots like you.

Our team put together a survey to find out if YOU approve of Joe Biden’s handling of the war in Ukraine, and your input is _critical_ to developing Republican leadership in 2022 and beyond.

clean_body: Joe Biden isn’t strong enough to stand up to Vladmir Putin Peter, Joe Biden isn’t strong enough to stand up to Vladmir Putin. His thoughts and prayers for Ukraine aren’t enough, and his sanctions are too little, too late. And as if he wasn’t delusional enough, he’s even asking Communist China to stand up to Russia so he doesn’t have to. The truth is, Joe Biden and his Democrat administration's weakness allowed Russia’s attack on Ukraine to happen. We need to do everything we can to prevent this from happening ever again - and that starts with patriots like you. Our team put together a survey to find out if YOU approve of Joe Biden’s handling of the war in Ukraine, and your input is critical to developing Republican leadership in 2022 and beyond. Do you approve of Joe Biden’s policies towards Russia and the war in Ukraine? Thank you, Team Waltz Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. I wanted to share my story with you, and tell you how it shaped me into the person I am today.

**[I hope you’ll read it all the way through and, if you can, chip in a few of your hard-earned dollars to help me raise the kind of money I need to defeat a Capitol Insurrectionist>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42573060/333468675/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.03.04_b1_story_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.03.04_b1_story_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzYwNmQ0YS1lZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5xSumXuwGj45FMqaDgaIa_GwvvXQNIp2gv1BuxHbryw=)**

I was raised on a dairy farm right here in rural Wisconsin. I met my wife here, and we raised our family here, just as my family has done since they came to our country in the 1800s. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42573062/333468677/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.03.04_b1_story_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.03.04_b1_story_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzYwNmQ0YS1lZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5xSumXuwGj45FMqaDgaIa_GwvvXQNIp2gv1BuxHbryw=) That’s how I know that rural America is just as important as anywhere else.

I had my dream job as Secretary of the Wisconsin Department of Agriculture, Trade and Consumer Protection. I understood the help and protections that our farmers were looking for.

**But after I sparred with Republican legislators over funding for a farmer suicide prevention program, they unanimously voted to fire me from the job.**

Even though it cost me my job, I don’t regret speaking out. I saw a need, and I will always fight for what’s right.

Because that’s what rural Americans do. We don’t just go away. We’re resilient. So, I ran for State Senate. And I won. Instead of going away, I’m with them every day, holding Madison accountable to the people of Wisconsin.

**But my opponent, Derrick Van Orden? Well, he was a part of the Capitol Riots on January 6th and then tried to lie to Wisconsinites about it.**

We can’t let a person like that represent us in Congress. So I’m going to win this race the only way I know how: by going everywhere and talking with everyone. But I won’t kid myself. I know it’s going to be a tough race, so I need your help to build this campaign strong.

**[Will you chip in $5 to help us start this month strong? We’ve got a big goal this month, and anything you can give will go a long way towards helping us reach it:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42573064/333468679/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.03.04_b1_story_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.03.04_b1_story_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzYwNmQ0YS1lZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5xSumXuwGj45FMqaDgaIa_GwvvXQNIp2gv1BuxHbryw=)** | [GIVE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42573066/333468681/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.03.04_b1_story_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.03.04_b1_story_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzYwNmQ0YS1lZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5xSumXuwGj45FMqaDgaIa_GwvvXQNIp2gv1BuxHbryw=)

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42584337/333518774/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2MzNzgyZi0xNzljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xYpxkAZN_UCyFSdPK9440FiHCMX4DpBUwzdJtyKM_S8=&emci=300c622a-079c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=acc3782f-179c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42584338/333518775/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2MzNzgyZi0xNzljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xYpxkAZN_UCyFSdPK9440FiHCMX4DpBUwzdJtyKM_S8=&emci=300c622a-079c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=acc3782f-179c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
The courage we are seeing from President Zelensky is not the kind of instantaneous courage used to charge an enemy or the self-promoting false courage of Trumpian showmanship.
Zelensky’s courage is that of thought-through deliberation, choosing to sacrifice oneself to protect others, to do one’s duty in office. That is the definition of bravery.
**Imagine what Putin must be thinking when Russian citizens and besieged Ukrainians stand up to him more fiercely than senior Republicans like Chuck Grassley ever stood up to Donald Trump.**
The Javelin missiles that Ukrainians are now bravely using to repel Russian tanks are the same ones that Trump was impeached for holding hostage – and that Republicans refused to hold him accountable for.
When I defeat Chuck Grassley this November, the Democrats will have the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. That’s fitting in the shadow of January 6th, because it’s time we had more leaders in Washington who choose sacrifice and service – versus corporate donations and personal gain.
The polls show a close race, and McConnell’s Super PACs are already queuing up millions to spend against me. I’m a hard target, but that won’t stop Fox News from fabricating some made-up tale.
**We need to raise another $25,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight to fight back, but right now, we’re still $5,067 short. The only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue is if grassroots donors like you chip in now:**
[**Please, may I count on you to urgently give $5 or more right now – whatever you can spare before our critical deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42584339/333518776/-42398318?refcode=em20220304pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2MzNzgyZi0xNzljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xYpxkAZN_UCyFSdPK9440FiHCMX4DpBUwzdJtyKM_S8=)

clean_body: Hello, The courage we are seeing from President Zelensky is not the kind of instantaneous courage used to charge an enemy or the self-promoting false courage of Trumpian showmanship. Zelensky’s courage is that of thought-through deliberation, choosing to sacrifice oneself to protect others, to do one’s duty in office. That is the definition of bravery. Imagine what Putin must be thinking when Russian citizens and besieged Ukrainians stand up to him more fiercely than senior Republicans like Chuck Grassley ever stood up to Donald Trump. The Javelin missiles that Ukrainians are now bravely using to repel Russian tanks are the same ones that Trump was impeached for holding hostage – and that Republicans refused to hold him accountable for. When I defeat Chuck Grassley this November, the Democrats will have the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. That’s fitting in the shadow of January 6th, because it’s time we had more leaders in Washington who choose sacrifice and service – versus corporate donations and personal gain. The polls show a close race, and McConnell’s Super PACs are already queuing up millions to spend against me. I’m a hard target, but that won’t stop Fox News from fabricating some made-up tale. We need to raise another $25,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight to fight back, but right now, we’re still $5,067 short. The only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue is if grassroots donors like you chip in now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = The past few years have shown that democracy is a fragile thing; but it is always worth fighting for. name: Team Slotkin
subject: Betsy DeVos’ latest play in MI
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220304&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220304&amount=28]
Team,
Betsy DeVos is one of the most well-known and wealthiest Michiganders. As Trump’s Secretary of Education, she was focused on dismantling Title IX regulations that made it harder for students to file sexual assault complaints. Well, she’s got a new project: defunding public education.
Recently, DeVos launched a petition drive in Michigan to create a voucher system, taking money from our public schools and redirecting it to unaccountable private schools. This latest move follows on DeVos’ ideological belief that the concept of public education, as envisioned by our founding fathers, is dead and that the state funds for education should be left to for-profit charter and private schools to use.
What’s particularly concerning here is that Michigan's petition system allows potential legislation to bypass the Governor’s veto. So if DeVos’ plan gets enough signatures, it has a real chance at becoming law.
Unfortunately, Elissa’s opponent supports this initiative. In fact, he’s sponsored similar voucher legislation in the past, and the DeVos family have been major donors since he was first elected in 2014. He is a DeVos devotee through and through. He's been voting against Michigan's education budget since seven years ago when he took elected office.
Last year, the DeVos family spent millions to prop up conservative candidates and causes in Michigan, and this time, they’re sure to do it again. Will you chip in $10, $15, or even $25 to help Elissa’s reelection campaign so she can continue to fight for public education? name: Jessica Mason
subject: We refused to be silent, Peter.
body:
Thank you for sticking with me in this journey.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42573616/333470977/-1288899752?refcode=220304_CLTV_electionloss_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDhjOTBkMy1lZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6TtGy_giqSQ452jEKGgSrJ3rxRfeccRVWH7_qOmcQM=)
---
Peter, I needed a few days to gather my thoughts and figure out how to write this email to you all. Although we didn't get the results that we had hoped for on Tuesday's primary election, I can't find the words to express how incredibly proud I am of the fight we fought together.

We knew coming into this race that it wasn't going to be easy. From the beginning, I refused to take a dime of corporate PAC money. I started from scratch without any major funding for campaign resources, and I lacked the advantages, the rolodex, the connections, and the mega-donors that others had.

_**And still, we persevered.**_ We consistently managed to raise the most money in individual small-dollar donations, which speaks VOLUMES of who this movement was built and run by -- everyday people, like **_you_** , Peter. One dollar at a time, we built a solid grassroots coalition of working-class people across the country who are ready for a New Deal.

I'm most proud of the fact that we ran an honest campaign, through and through. We were brave enough to stand up against the status quo politicians and demand bold, progressive solutions like universal healthcare, a Green New Deal, and more. We called out corporate corruption and dark money. We took on the elitist culture that permeates our government. We lifted up the voices of the underserved and underrepresented and elevated their stories. _**We refused to be silent.**_

I will continue to fight for these progressive issues and causes until our leaders deliver tangible results for our communities. Yes, I am **disappointed** at our election loss, but I am **_not_** _**completely discouraged**_. This defeat cannot take away our hope for a brighter, more equitable future. One voice at a time, we will keep organizing and mobilizing, and amplifying the stories of everyday people. And, win or lose, this scrappy, grassroots, people-powered campaign was a stepping stone to laying the groundwork. We should all be proud of what we've accomplished here because I'm confident that we have had more of an impact than it might feel like right now in this moment.

Thank you for sticking with me in this journey. Your support was what carried this campaign. We would never have made it this far without you. I'll be forever grateful. The fight isn't over yet, and I look forward to our next move together. Onward, **Jessica**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42573620/333470987/-1288899752?refcode=220304_CLTV_electionloss_SIGNOFF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDhjOTBkMy1lZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B6TtGy_giqSQ452jEKGgSrJ3rxRfeccRVWH7_qOmcQM=)

The Democrats are dumping HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS into red states - including Utah - in order to hold their Senate majority. Like other Senate Republicans, I’m in their crosshairs. clean_body: We’re ready to bring a movement to the polls. | | | Peter, There are just months to go until Tennessee’s midterm elections, and we’re fighting as hard as we can against the GOP. While the GOP is trying to silence us, we know this movement can win anywhere. We know that the new 5th and 7th districts had Democrats neck and neck with Republicans in 2018, and we’re ready to bring a movement of working people to the polls. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Middle Tennessee deserves a representative who will fight for the people, not corporate donors or far-right conspiracy theories. That’s Odessa. No matter what maps they draw, the GOP won’t silence this movement. Soon, we’ll have news about how we’re staying in this fight. Thank you for being part of this movement. Team Odessa Kelly | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m in trouble.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4k54c9btqs6vih0clrg1us0a7q771q5f6nek4ag_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpbfdpjmlgmfd1mcpj6eo5m62r39orjc9pj8c5jm9p75c9nmtgrct5heap39crn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6pj3aoljchjr4d3661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5hm2pj0s5gmcoh5u)

| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zks2j2oh5a89nge9jfm51pvo3joa0cua0phhgqs8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3c5j61ob1cph2bs)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **

**BREAKING NEWS:**
**Florida legislature PASSES a bill banning abortion after 15 weeks**
Friend, _I’m worried about what will happen to people in Florida if Gov. DeSantis remains in office._

When a ban on abortion was first introduced in January, DeSantis said it was “a good idea.” **And last night, Florida Republicans passed one of the most restrictive anti-choice laws in the country.**

Unlike DeSantis, I don’t believe in jeopardizing a woman’s healthcare, or that stripping women of their right to choose is a “good idea.” DeSantis has shown his true colors over the past two years, and now he’s on the verge of eliminating reproductive rights for countless Floridians.

But I can’t defeat him on my own. No one can. Instead, it’ll take a huge, statewide movement to toss Gov. DeSantis out of office, which is why I’m writing this email.

**[Chip in today so we’ll be able to build the movement we need to take down Ron DeSantis. I’m grateful for your continued support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42584716/333523138/1828375930?refcode=20220304_f_3_ND

Friend, the U.S. Postal Service is a critical public service, delivering everything from daily mail to lifesaving medical supplies. In recent weeks, millions of Americans have depended on the USPS to ship COVID-19 tests provided by the Biden administration to keep them and their families safe. But this critical public service was thrown under the bus by the Trump administration.
**FIRST:** Trump BLOCKED USPS funding in the middle of the pandemic and handpicked the Board of Governors who selected Trump megadonor Louis DeJoy to be postmaster general.
**THEN: ** DeJoy started cutting USPS hours and facilities – delaying the delivery of Medicare prescriptions, Social Security benefits and groceries.
**NOW:****DeJoy is at it again, this time enacting plans that reduce post office hours, increase prices and MASSIVELY slow down deliveries – including of the Biden administration's free COVID-19 tests, a key part of our country's pandemic response.**
We need action NOW to remove DeJoy and save the Postal Service. **But we can't stop him without grassroots support, so we need to hear from 54 more people in 18326 by midnight tonight. Please, friend, tell us now:**
