name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Ukraine + 1/6 Digest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- Many members of Country First have reached out to ask "what can we do to help Ukraine?" And following the huge outpouring of support for our Afghan Ally Relief Fund, I'd like to provide an opportunity to support the courageous Ukrainian people, who continue to inspire me as they bravely defend democracy against an evil tyrant. [](https://www.country1st.com/ukraine?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=2) | [](https://www.country1st.com/ukraine?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=3 "Stand with Ukraine Fund") [Stand with Ukraine Fund](https://www.country1st.com/ukraine?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=3)
---
At a time when evil, lies, and darkness too often seem to overwhelm the truth, it's incredible to see people from around the world, including the vast majority of Americans, stand in solidarity with Ukraine. Together, we are drowning out the lies being trumpeted by Putin and his far-right American agents as justification for this illegal, unprovoked war.
And while here in America, we're still in the fight of our lives to save our own democracy from internal threats, it does suddenly feel to me like those pedaling darkness and lies are playing defense; that the truth is rising up; that, perhaps, if we can all be Ukrainians, we can all be Americans, too.
Thank you for considering a donation to the [**Stand with Ukraine Fund**](https://www.country1st.com/ukraine?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=4). 100% of the funds will go toward supporting the Ukrainian people as they fight for a country that, God willing, they'll soon begin to rebuild. This war is a David and Goliath story for the ages, and I pray that victory and peace will again belong to the free and the brave of Ukraine.
Country First,
Adam[](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=5)
* * *
* * *
* * *
## 1/6 Committee Weekly Digest
Country First presents the next edition of The Weekly Digest to highlight the important work of the January 6th Select Committee. Each week that the committee makes news, we’ll provide a recap to make sure you’re up to date. **In Case You Missed It:**
* Rep. Kinzinger [speaks](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=B-xMNSNcDpdY3m1jne-HGWJe1CIu5Lyr37SIvxs5Wi7Xtohx4hwH1WPBqenrQJQ3n-FpFk9UsMqX2uyaWjbL_cC4kOUHKJ9uj0xBqfX8dlFZhZ7a0KqIOaKrqEv_nq-V&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=6) at "Principles First" Summit about January 6th and leading with courage.
* Rep. Kinzinger joins CBS to [discuss](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=BiDEj8yGy-h4To0LUa2PcidWXR_XtL6LVsVE-Q_p8o4uBxT5CUJKHoAiXiF2rROktQJXReMfaDpnBRKJrmPs6P6mvXtNh4ln4hZXQRUa3_DRg6JSExEuesdrd1fPVgaA&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=7) Rudy Giuliani and give a committee update.
* Rep. Kinzinger appears on NBC's "Meet the Press" to [reiterate](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GmrkqIvTVM5Gw19P8OEWnrmt_orbbeBjotI_wHKZxDLGyT1eFHMDPqk5-XG750hzc3t-bg3heTv-6PMr-6h8qOxc4z53ErakIAROyc953JLo3bAo4OxvtXZenZs7B4HGrs5s3FB3gZX3OKACMMp7Ymjuqnv0KopCLYPk-ZuYoVo3cxuLHimbqPQYN816BUC6&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=8) the "substantive narrative" the 1/6 committee is putting together.

****Who the January 6th Committee Has Requested Information From:****
* Subpoena issued to Cleta Mitchell, an attorney who was regularly in [contact](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHkev5NjJF0bc42GvNE7Ugc8deYUKLh2LdsxQRzUym1UrZowTBp9w0h15VWOn6W0U7UDw8VVKK8w0KyUl-Kli7HE&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=9) with Members of Congress to promote the Big Lie.
* Subpoena issued to Kenneth Chesebro, an attorney who peddled legal theories to state officials, including key swing state officials.
* Subpoena issued to Katherine Friess, an attorney involved in the efforts to overturn the election via seizure of voting machines.
* Subpoena issued to Kurt Olsen, a lawyer who helped draft an executive order for the DOJ.
* Subpoena issued to Phillip Kline, who helped convene a meeting with Trump and 300 state legislators to urge former Vice President Mike Pence to overturn the election.
* Subpoena issued to Christina Bobb, an OAN correspondent who was believed to have been a part of the "war room" at the Willard Hotel on January 6.
* Subpoena issued for [Kimberly Guilfoyle](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=OwehQGnYjrzpIc0rxaR28Zg-3pjG8881iwbsJF1GviD1amnkL1SyBtj78kBsar7XxdzntMgVNfbE5F87Dbnht9bbmOu11bRftf3zOEd-XcAjmJaUGRdKCszke9WRsJN0&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=10), a top fundraising official for the Trump campaign and fiancée to Donald Trump Jr.

Here are the major developments from this past week: **Evidence Obtained by 1/6 Committee Suggests Trump Committed Crimes While Trying to Overturn 2020 Election Results** In a new [court](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=zveC7zroragI2qrXZZ9Nau8g06OiiFSrYZB4vdSsTxzx91lnnt1FNIDHlU_4T7v_HLsUvKe-9xDBi_4npCFRW_srbFNYfMakPdXFxQIdut9ssMoOIPDa-znSksrwCjl00jPHVOufPMEdNR8TzIiboeMDwgXwjpSA71ggscKeRAsXAwraL3AYkHQzIo20rie4&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=11) filing, the House select committee responsible for investigating the Capitol riot suggested that Trump’s efforts during the 2020 election violated the law, and included the crimes [obstruction](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dzpfx3cqdBLOGs9Sz-8L5Cm2c9xOwrrBEAoqPXXWQ7_F8cuWHMOIig3RD4IhSGZWpYykNNSA1UlZh6lnC__Ssa3zkPirRR7jhVPCKP6z6kROjnvXuWibxDlF7Edfw0Hrw0FfFe3TN67OP3Vx2Ew1Qs4B_9oBaAfBVhGw9q0qamL6SGebbimZlf1Py5xtgFeRI4Z7ORLEjnnMfwp-xu_pw3AxT-qa4goPetExcnrhAJq7NbN6BaJvZ_nMgNhThb8OMfQFYJhemp4XNT8Vvyl8LQ&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=12) and fraud. This court filing does not charge the former president with any crime, the DOJ would have to indict. Reps. Liz Cheney and Bennie Thompson released a [joint statement](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=dzpfx3cqdBLOGs9Sz-8L5DCywXuOJZs_3NnWx24FmU33AEP8Vv26ugKHkm-9E1n6OAWDjRoDcq9zuSFem2tc0kWJ2cFg60ww9xzOJrzr4QXPze2UbXTE2ni-OPAxEyS-0Anxerc8ignT_rd8HysJcQ&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=13) that disclosed, "The facts we’ve gathered strongly suggest that Dr. Eastman’s emails may show that he helped Donald Trump advance a corrupt scheme to obstruct the counting of electoral college ballots and a conspiracy to impede the transfer of power." The filing made on Wednesday, March 2 indicates that former President Trump and his allies engaged in a series of criminal activities that led to the attempt to overturn the election and incite an insurrection. John Eastman is a former law professor and Trump legal advisor who has refused to cooperate with the panel’s ongoing investigation and he continues to make numerous claims of privilege. **House Select Committee to Release Interim Report by June** Congressman Bennie Thompson, 1/6 Committee chair, spoke with reporters earlier in the week and [announced](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=BiDEj8yGy-h4To0LUa2PcjmkijSlrcPzIc5hTE0mvj7A6FCZnK8d2CJo3RWiCnT3PUUe7HUCqjMizwilXw_ylrdoq9EMzLJRVR4y-PJv5e38pydbjDR5Z5fv35Pr0jXd&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=14) some key benchmark dates coming in the next few months. The goal of investigators is to complete witness depositions in early April, followed by public hearings and then an interim report sometime in June 2022. This comes after weeks of testimony from key players in the insurrection, including Patrick Casey, the leader of "America First", a far-right organization that played a major role in pushing the Big Lie and promoting the 1/6 rally in front of the White House. However, if investigators uncover new information or want testimony and records from additional witnesses, the timeline the committee has established could be pushed back. **Oath Keeper Member, Joshua James, Pleads Guilty to Seditious Conspiracy Charges** Joshua James, a member of the Oath Keepers, pleaded [guilty](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GjwzQmjoNJNKZ7-eUAZR_Ne2_dvt_-iTPYIUPr-0aOYUOpfg8My4Jnf9uaZuFauyGyKtz0gAobe2MTmzdSZg_B_1P8s8xoH_3aaZpe-w05xTiJJ9Ehu8Jpu_CxbILIVV&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=15) to seditious conspiracy charges on Wednesday, March 2. The far-right militia group claims they were responsible for much of the "protecting" of the former president and his allies on January 6. These charges were the most serious charges pressed against those who took part in the attempt to overthrow the election results and undermine democracy. In his statement, James said that Stewart Rhodes, the founder and leader of the extremist group, "instructed [him] and others to be prepared and called upon to ... use lethal force if necessary" to keep the former president in power. Armed with tactical vets, goggles, and more, the far-right group breached the Capitol of the United States of America. James did not make any statements in court other than answering the judge’s questions. A former soldier, James gave up his rights to military benefits as a result of his involvement. **Trump Spokesperson Speaks to 1/6 Committee** The former Trump White House deputy press secretary [spoke](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=qyDi432GwqzcezEbr9kAv0PGqO6DBt1AnoK2JqKn-mj__rkYevQl0lrzuz9jETkMVnFnc0NjCrVuupbZPiscM_vKOQFZtr6KfSc2W205bs9XPQ67HuLfwO5aqSTivMlkaBTjoG_-1SrfsFNXK-Xl5AXjIxSu5iKw6dJ5IatkRwo&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=16) with the 1/6 Committee on Thursday, March 3\. In compliance with a subpoena, Judd Deere, who is now the deputy chief of staff for communications for Senator Bill Hagerty (R-TN), spoke with the 1/6 Committee as it works to understand the "White House’s response to the January 6 attack as it occurred," according to [CNN](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHthN91zANLr8kTjzNYOPvyMpQr8YHRklndntpTVuuLgDnAZAw7QdYUMR_B9LeTlYLWB-2BZXWCV558-MmXAChtWdNfYopyG3sZYj_PYSsVMd&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=17). Deere, who was reportedly in the presence of Trump on January 6, was subpoenaed to answer questions surrounding the communications with Trump White House figures that were requested by the panel from the National Archives. **Son of Capitol Rioter Testifies Against Father in 1/6 Insurrection Case** Jackson Reffitt, the son of riot defendant Guy Reffitt, [testified](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHj_4J8JlqN7zusqLapKV7CjgcE8GuVQqzg1BM0fxCBxz9hnjt-kVUDPuD6vHM3Oie1nBJRrdIDUzgKnQkLIl4KAOtIBRSUsTDxgLLuRRKkel&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=18) in front of the jury for more than 3 hours on Thursday. Jackson, 19, has become a key witness for prosecutors after alerting the FBI to his father’s far-right extremist tendencies on December 24, 2020, mere weeks before the insurrection. His father, Guy Reffitt, has been accused of taking part in the insurrection that left five dead and hundreds injured, and that he carried a weapon. Afterwards, he is accused of threatening his children if they did not stay silent about his involvement. Jackson recorded his father’s texts, calls, and conversations in order to turn them over to the FBI because of his concern that his father had been radicalized. "I don’t regret it, but it’s a lot. I don’t have the words to really describe it. I think it’s the best-case scenario," Jackson Reffitt said at the conclusion of his testimony. **Other news that may be of interest:**
* GOP Chairman in Georgia [claims](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=9j2xrPCwd3yFLU_EZoBgHtLvMG2w0lbbyCzkW0Hh-8dKhrH0nnzrcyjj1cem9S3vwrcXXknmVBaGM4IM5FQHt1fOczBO725D4xaIARfKh86v8HMaGNct77FNmWwAzDDl-RWMLA-iFmHar7RGbbnozw&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=19) the Trump campaign orchestrated the alternate elector scheme.
* Daughter of former president, Ivanka Trump, in [talks](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9bmQjRYvg5RiftfZZQBIKJ_y3-tyYYc2dkf58oizEZNry12RL3qMW1WoYHVU_M2VzCkriv4fmUJHoWcCfeQ-OPpBb_PswmFmnLNHYx5r-UIA&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=20) to cooperate with the 1/6 committee.
* The first 1/6 insurrection trials [begin](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=wLp8m_D3QQPwYN-gxhDqoX33mIe62y7HrqjC9WwsmQzesutBIav9D9rRA9ZQbc-_wq8Lz-pO1wB2nyszQ2-16tmz4Zs_jApVQB5oUn4EHSsMjGnYSAenNs0h39BqmqKZ&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=21) in Texas.
* Man who smoked marijuana in the Capitol Rotunda was [sentenced](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=GmrkqIvTVM5Gw19P8OEWnqPAtIHhAMxU89vlTUXNYDbvmrTcCWOYzEWjDEh_PpPa6xLu4tfPxMoiG3ukUvYHQx3w-ais-dmdPSKG9uw_liYwrgAyuYdECAr6uLO_VHp05KFdvIIf-vPfin2eaOtIlmKFNGD7RJr5X0h_1Fx7bsw&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=22) to two years probation.
* Rioter who [carried](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9bmQjRYvg5RiftfZZQBIKJ9hoXkY3tW7chwQe2x1pjzB8ozZ3G0oYt5fM_lNMBxTHIk31DLzf8dOERwajQaAdzpnoE6IuNSUuUt_zqNutPAB&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ukraine_nd&n=23) Speaker Pelosi’s podium has been fined $5,000 and sentenced to 75 days in prison.

_Country First is proud to release The Weekly Digest with important updates on the 1/6 Committee's investigation of the Capitol attack. If you would like to help contribute content to this newsletter, please e-mail[volunteer@country1st.com](mailto:volunteer@country1st.com)._

clean_body: | Friend -- Many members of Country First have reached out to ask "what can we do to help Ukraine?" And following the huge outpouring of support for our Afghan Ally Relief Fund, I'd like to provide an opportunity to support the courageous Ukrainian people, who continue to inspire me as they bravely defend democracy against an evil tyrant. | "Stand with Ukraine Fund" At a time when evil, lies, and darkness too often seem to overwhelm the truth, it's incredible to see people from around the world, including the vast majority of Americans, stand in solidarity with Ukraine. Together, we are drowning out the lies being trumpeted by Putin and his far-right American agents as justification for this illegal, unprovoked war. And while here in America, we're still in the fight of our lives to save our own democracy from internal threats, it does suddenly feel to me like those pedaling darkness and lies are playing defense; that the truth is rising up; that, perhaps, if we can all be Ukrainians, we can all be Americans, too. Thank you for considering a donation to the . 100% of the funds will go toward supporting the Ukrainian people as they fight for a country that, God willing, they'll soon begin to rebuild. This war is a David and Goliath story for the ages, and I pray that victory and peace will again belong to the free and the brave of Ukraine. Country First, Adam 1/6 Committee Weekly Digest Country First presents the next edition of The Weekly Digest to highlight the important work of the January 6th Select Committee. Subpoena issued to Katherine Friess, an attorney involved in the efforts to overturn the election via seizure of voting machines. Subpoena issued to Phillip Kline, who helped convene a meeting with Trump and 300 state legislators to urge former Vice President Mike Pence to overturn the election. Subpoena issued to Christina Bobb, an OAN correspondent who was believed to have been a part of the "war room" at the Willard Hotel on January 6. This court filing does not charge the former president with any crime, the DOJ would have to indict. Reps. Liz Cheney and Bennie Thompson released a that disclosed, "The facts we’ve gathered strongly suggest that Dr. Eastman’s emails may show that he helped Donald Trump advance a corrupt scheme to obstruct the counting of electoral college ballots and a conspiracy to impede the transfer of power." The filing made on Wednesday, March 2 indicates that former President Trump and his allies engaged in a series of criminal activities that led to the attempt to overturn the election and incite an insurrection. John Eastman is a former law professor and Trump legal advisor who has refused to cooperate with the panel’s ongoing investigation and he continues to make numerous claims of privilege. The goal of investigators is to complete witness depositions in early April, followed by public hearings and then an interim report sometime in June 2022. This comes after weeks of testimony from key players in the insurrection, including Patrick Casey, the leader of "America First", a far-right organization that played a major role in pushing the Big Lie and promoting the 1/6 rally in front of the White House. However, if investigators uncover new information or want testimony and records from additional witnesses, the timeline the committee has established could be pushed back. body:
When Zinke tried to put Bears Ears on the chopping block, I joined local activists in Utah to fight back. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42574308/333474003/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTVlZDc2My1mMDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZjuMe9-mv5b9jRJeodPDZTeqePwTAmYpGtySPc9DRMw=) Friend, Some of you may not know this, but this campaign for Congress won't be my first time going toe-to-toe with Ryan Zinke. Back in 2017 while working for the Trump Administration, **Zinke put Bears Ears on the chopping block – reducing its size by 85%.** Bears Ears is one of the most significant archaeological sites in the United States. It's importance to science and its tribal descendants can't be understated. Not to mention it's one of the most striking and beautiful monuments in the world. When I caught news of Zinke’s plans, I knew I had to do something. So, I joined with local activists in Utah to restore Bears Ears, bringing with me my Montana roots and love for our public lands. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42574310/333474006/655314317?refcode=em-3.4.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTVlZDc2My1mMDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZjuMe9-mv5b9jRJeodPDZTeqePwTAmYpGtySPc9DRMw=)
_Standing alongside organizers working to protect Bears Ears._ **The voices, hard work, and history of the communities of Bears Ears were honored when the Biden Administration announced the restoration of the Bears Ears National Monument. It was a huge step, but we still must work to protect it.** Zinke is already calling Biden's reversal part of a “radical, left wing” agenda. He should try telling that to the Indigenous communities who have ties to Bears Ears dating back centuries. It's shameful, but it's a familiar attack that politicians hide behind when their true motive is protecting corporate interests. [**Montana deserves better than Ryan Zinke, but we can only defeat him with widespread grassroots support. If you can, please chip in $3 so we can work to prevent what happened in Utah from happening in our own state.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42574311/333474007/655314317?refcode=em-3.4.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTVlZDc2My1mMDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZjuMe9-mv5b9jRJeodPDZTeqePwTAmYpGtySPc9DRMw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42574313/333474009/655314317?refcode=em-3.4.22-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTVlZDc2My1mMDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZjuMe9-mv5b9jRJeodPDZTeqePwTAmYpGtySPc9DRMw=)

name: Pat Cram and June Heston
subject: Ending burn pits and saving veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
We need to end burn pits

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=122%2E61531%2E4ndGF9)
Hello,
Our husbands—Michael and Mike—were veterans who dedicated their lives to protecting their families, Vermont, and our nation. When they went abroad, we knew there was a chance they might not come back. But we didn’t expect for their service to cost them their lives when they returned home to American soil.
During their deployments, they were exposed to burn pits. These massive open-air trash fires—containing everything from tires, jet fuel, metal, and medical waste—sent smoke filled with toxic fumes into the air that our husbands, and many others, breathed in day and night. Veterans who have been exposed to burn pits have a much higher incidence of cancer and other diseases. Michael and Mike both developed cancer from their exposure, and our families were forced to suffer with them as they struggled before passing away. It’s left a huge hole in our lives.
Knowing that our husbands won’t get to watch their grandchildren grow up is painful. That’s why we’ve made it our mission to end burn pits and get other families the support they need. Right now, about 80 percent of burn pit claims from other active military and veterans have been denied by the VA. This is unacceptable—and we’ll continue to fight against this injustice on our husbands’ behalf, because they can’t. Our way of honoring them is by making sure that no family is forced to endure what we had to.
In the face of many closed doors from the government, Peter Welch has been fighting for veterans and families like ours. He’s been working to end the practice of burn pits within the armed services, and has been pushing the VA to provide real care to those impacted. Because Peter understands that the cost of the war has to include the cost of caring for the warrior when they return home.
Yesterday, we finally saw some progress. Peter helped pass the Honoring our PACT Act in the House, which will reduce the burden put on veterans to prove that their illnesses are linked to burn pit exposure and make sure these soldiers get access to the health care and benefits they need from the VA. It’s what we owe them for their service.
[**We support Peter because we know as Senator, he’ll continue fighting for Vermonters. We hope you’ll support his campaign by making a contribution today.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1477?t=3&akid=122%2E61531%2E4ndGF9)

subject: Statement from Laurel Imer on Tom Tancredo's Stage 3 Cancer Diagnosis
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress
body:
Please see the following statement from Laurel Imer,
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Gf8islwNr7p5-yFIbmlDdAF_emalV1CGC-n9bJMmHmT8uLrNupHmP-T1BlX0-DAZeQSiiflYTiYbiDtx3_ojccNWqhFizUdriAPpdzGeZSrAjzLxNuNmVUFdc4Dk8GfMwGRoaG1E_4BWTdiygQcMWfUpWhHBUY1EO1phGx4DXzgVgJn_LKkjq-wrlRXPxNtI7bnQSytZXZyqMGKlalVWdyaceRjjHQRXXzL3ZiaGHF2s2a5Jleqvw==&c=g6Dbb04z4ocQKy10werFWq7Z6BTQPb-wXHmup7IpMLX-p4sepRIlSQ==&ch=pumXaqiK56NTB6hLFJHW0Za7nb548cWN16cp_JcXpuJXgKrRrBZ0ng==)

| |
---
| *FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE*
PRESS CONTACT: Laurel Imer for Congress Press Office Press@laurelimerforcongress.com (720) 248-7639 ext. 2
LAUREL IMER ISSUES STATEMENT ON NEWS OF TOM TANCREDO'S CANCER DIAGNOSIS
Golden, CO\-- Laurel Imer issues statement on Tom Tancredo's Stage 3 Colon Cancer diagnosis that was recently announced to the public:
"As many of you may know, my dear friend, ally, and republican comrade, Former Congressman Tom Tancredo has been diagnosed with Stage 3 Colon Cancer.
My team and I have been aware of this for many months and have been respecting Tom's privacy during this time. However, now that his diagnosis has been made public I felt that it was time I said something about my friend.
Tom and I have been fighting together to Save Colorado, America, and secure the southern border for decades. I have supported him in his runs for Governor and President in the past and still support him today especially while he undergoes chemotherapy.
Tom has endorsed me in the 7 Congressional district race and I could not be more grateful for his support. During this time in Tom's life, it is important that we all come together and support him and his family whether that is through Prayer, logistical support, or even financial support.
Tom has asked for privacy during this time and he is in good spirits and is expected to make a full recovery. I am sure that I speak on behalf of all the candidates that Tom has endorsed when I say, Tom, We love you, we are praying for you, we are here for you and we wish you a speedy recovery and many more years of kicking democrat ass!"
With Hope and Love, Laurel Imer and Team.
###
About Laurel Imer Laurel Imer is a Republican candidate in Colorado's 7th Congressional District. In 2020 Laurel was hand-picked by President Donald J. Trump and his team to be his delegate to the Republican National Convention for Congressional District 7.
In the last election cycle, Laurel ran for Colorado's House District 24 as the Republican Nominee against incumbent Monica Duran (D). Laurel has been a small business owner, worked in sales, marketing, and advertising, been a Teacher's Aide and volunteer in private Christian education, volunteered for several years in the Ladies Auxiliary of the VFW, and is a grassroots political activist. Laurel served as Jefferson County Chair for the Donald Trump Campaign in 2016.
Laurel was also picked by President Trump and his team to be one of Colorado's 9 Republican Presidential Electors at the Electoral College for the 2016 Presidential Election.

clean_body: Please see the following statement from Laurel Imer, | | | | | | | == | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE PRESS CONTACT: Laurel Imer for Congress Press Office Press@laurelimerforcongress.com (720) 248-7639 ext. 2 LAUREL IMER ISSUES STATEMENT ON NEWS OF TOM TANCREDO'S CANCER DIAGNOSIS Golden, CO\-- Laurel Imer issues statement on Tom Tancredo's Stage 3 Colon Cancer diagnosis that was recently announced to the public: "As many of you may know, my dear friend, ally, and republican comrade, Former Congressman Tom Tancredo has been diagnosed with Stage 3 Colon Cancer. My team and I have been aware of this for many months and have been respecting Tom's privacy during this time. However, now that his diagnosis has been made public I felt that it was time I said something about my friend. Tom and I have been fighting together to Save Colorado, America, and secure the southern border for decades. I have supported him in his runs for Governor and President in the past and still support him today especially while he undergoes chemotherapy. Tom has endorsed me in the 7 Congressional district race and I could not be more grateful for his support. During this time in Tom's life, it is important that we all come together and support him and his family whether that is through Prayer, logistical support, or even financial support. Tom has asked for privacy during this time and he is in good spirits and is expected to make a full recovery. I am sure that I speak on behalf of all the candidates that Tom has endorsed when I say, Tom, We love you, we are praying for you, we are here for you and we wish you a speedy recovery and many more years of kicking democrat ass!" With Hope and Love, Laurel Imer and Team. About Laurel Imer Laurel Imer is a Republican candidate in Colorado's 7th Congressional District. In 2020 Laurel was hand-picked by President Donald J. Trump and his team to be his delegate to the Republican National Convention for Congressional District 7. In the last election cycle, Laurel ran for Colorado's House District 24 as the Republican Nominee against incumbent Monica Duran (D). Laurel has been a small business owner, worked in sales, marketing, and advertising, been a Teacher's Aide and volunteer in private Christian education, volunteered for several years in the Ladies Auxiliary of the VFW, and is a grassroots political activist. Laurel served as Jefferson County Chair for the Donald Trump Campaign in 2016. Laurel was also picked by President Trump and his team to be one of Colorado's 9 Republican Presidential Electors at the Electoral College for the 2016 Presidential Election. subject: Our big plans for March
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42574598/333475193/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTYzMzU0Ny1mMjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwcbDGA6J-fk4YAM4gu3zkdxfRuNjwulGDdnWL9NO54=)

Hey friend,

Before we get too far into March, I wanted to make sure you're up to date on our plans for this momentous month – and that you can see how [your support](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42574599/333475194/189849860?refcode=em22_220304_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTYzMzU0Ny1mMjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwcbDGA6J-fk4YAM4gu3zkdxfRuNjwulGDdnWL9NO54=) powers this campaign.

**March is going to be big. Here's the plan (so far).**

First – we're opening up our campaign headquarters this weekend! Thanks to the support of our donors, we've been able to sign a lease and bring on our field director Emily, who is already off to the races.

Second – our top priority this month will be gathering signatures to get Kara on the ballot. With campaign literature, clipboards, pens and petitions in hand – Emily is already organizing regular canvasses to collect signatures throughout the district and ramp up our grassroots efforts to win this race.

Third – Kara and our team are going to be on the road connecting with as many of our New York 1st neighbors as possible. Just this week, Kara's spending time in Plainview, Greenport, Hauppauge, and Brentwood!

That means knocking doors, hosting and attending events, and – most importantly – listening to what matters most to the people of this community.

**We've gotten this far thanks to the generous support of grassroots supporters like you, friend. But if we're going to make the most out of every single day during this critical month, we need your help continuing to ramp up our operation.**

**[Can you chip in $5 or more right now and help build the foundation for a winning campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42574600/333475195/189849860?refcode=em22_220304_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTYzMzU0Ny1mMjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwcbDGA6J-fk4YAM4gu3zkdxfRuNjwulGDdnWL9NO54=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42574601/333475196/189849860?refcode=em22_220304_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTYzMzU0Ny1mMjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwcbDGA6J-fk4YAM4gu3zkdxfRuNjwulGDdnWL9NO54=) Campaigns are always changing – but our one constant is your _grassroots energy_ and support.

We're glad to have you on the team to flip this district blue.

Kelley Hardon
Campaign Manager
Kara Hahn for Congress

| Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a _must win_ for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. **Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress!** [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42574602/333475197/189849860?refcode=em22_220304_campaignupdate&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTYzMzU0Ny1mMjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwcbDGA6J-fk4YAM4gu3zkdxfRuNjwulGDdnWL9NO54=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42574603/333475198/189849860?refcode=em22_220304_campaignupdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTYzMzU0Ny1mMjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwcbDGA6J-fk4YAM4gu3zkdxfRuNjwulGDdnWL9NO54=)

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Today is the Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Two Years Later](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooSz9xeORj8ARyAUsN1Wi_0gxOZ9yDJxq9YXtSiuX2AJw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar4_final&n=1) Yesterday, I rose on the Assembly Floor to express my support for our Ukrainian community. As usual, I was forced under threat of physical removal to wear a mask. Calling out the Legislature’s leaders, I asked if they thought Nancy Pelosi behaved recklessly by attending the State of the Union unmasked. That got their attention. A few hours later, [a memo](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=T5He9HRd2mnp6QN0SYKMHEGgI-Mi0Nowc5mws1asme-cGpsTB9w5tuCOD6oZ19KFo72cK3oe9HdOmXXD_f0R_pgcmi3CxPC8aLeC8FlwnSs&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar4_final&n=2) went out rescinding the mask requirement at the State Capitol. This minor victory came on the eve of a notorious day. It was on March 4, 2020, that Newsom declared the State of Emergency. In the weeks that followed, I was barred from the Capitol as the Legislature recessed. When we finally returned on May 4, 2020, I [insisted](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6mUkg0Sw2Al21zP0eHDrETI6BLLm74EZjB9lguzfKOuODTkfTPZeptEnVitnNtOBXC0ocZsuVc7edb1AvEFp_vo&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar4_final&n=3) one-man rule must end. When Newsom continued to rule by decree, on May 21, 2020, I introduced [ACR 196](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2mLSj4FPM2Ac4B3BVRXG3vw9qh-8nvEviiylo2zrV2aYd2tgpHQ-hUW4gVK07nHttO9nCnyVKVP01FT3tzy_Upi1_eZSs4w-6UAfMIGV0VQZxoPFlQlrYiwN6TgGPCvq&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar4_final&n=4) to terminate the State of Emergency. When the Legislature refused act, on June 8, 2020, James Gallagher and I walked into Superior Court and sued Newsom for abusing his emergency powers. We won an [injunction](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziop7RA5_hkcrdesVk_CFou53t11d2yIkCIa3xxkiTpEGZHzhIlsJQrRNLvsIY_8utxWpp6E10JZi2QNKIjteBFRQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar4_final&n=5) against him and later [a trial](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqsHxYLkFeK3-sB-3M8mj2WMc2H7E-zMgoZcy_iTtDE1Q&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar4_final&n=6). For 2 years, we've all fought Newsom in every way we can. We've channeled every outrage into a citizens movement that came breathtakingly close to toppling the Governor and has only kept growing. I'm hopeful we'll end the emergency soon. But really, we already have. We the People have taken matters into our own hands, and we can now reclaim our state and country. [Wish Newsom's State of Emergency Happy Birthday by supporting his “chief antagonist"](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar4_final&n=7) [Share this Post on Social Media](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAw8nQSqyOWU6nYPuZ7frANukt9eYD8SscFcSX1ogB0_yQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar4_final&n=8) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar4_final&n=9).
clean_body: | Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: Yesterday, I rose on the Assembly Floor to express my support for our Ukrainian community. As usual, I was forced under threat of physical removal to wear a mask. Calling out the Legislature’s leaders, I asked if they thought Nancy Pelosi behaved recklessly by attending the State of the Union unmasked. That got their attention. A few hours later, went out rescinding the mask requirement at the State Capitol. This minor victory came on the eve of a notorious day. It was on March 4, 2020, that Newsom declared the State of Emergency. In the weeks that followed, I was barred from the Capitol as the Legislature recessed. When we finally returned on May 4, 2020, I one-man rule must end. When Newsom continued to rule by decree, on May 21, 2020, I introduced to terminate the State of Emergency. When the Legislature refused act, on June 8, 2020, James Gallagher and I walked into Superior Court and sued Newsom for abusing his emergency powers. We won an against him and later . For 2 years, we've all fought Newsom in every way we can. We've channeled every outrage into a citizens movement that came breathtakingly close to toppling the Governor and has only kept growing. I'm hopeful we'll end the emergency soon. But really, we already have. We the People have taken matters into our own hands, and we can now reclaim our state and country. Kevin Kiley California Legislator Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

subject: America In Crisis: Vaccine Mandates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
The Biden Administration is telling you what to put in your body, and they need to back off... | | |
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

I’m reaching out today to discuss a major crisis area for America, and invite you to [**_join me_**](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=12bb0d9930&e=a9d1410029) in the fight to take our country back. _Today, I want to talk about vaccine mandates_.

I receive calls from concerned Kansans every day, and vaccine mandates are a common topic of those conversations. The Biden Administration is telling you what to put in your body, and they need to back off. Any person who would like to receive a vaccine in this country should have access to it, but the federal government should not have the right to mandate that any American citizen inject anything into their bodies against their wishes.

We don’t need a nanny state – we need a return to normalcy and a government that upholds the freedoms of its citizens. The Biden Administration has been wasting time telling Americans what medicine to take when they should be spending their time fixing the supply chain, curbing inflation, and securing the southern border. These are actual problems that the government is responsible for fixing – not monitoring the personal healthcare decisions of free citizens.

The Biden Administration, and Speaker Nancy Pelosi, have completely backwards priorities. I am working around the clock to help Republicans take back the House in the upcoming election and I need your help.

_Please kick in $100.00 today and invest in the fight to stop vaccine mandates._

([Donate here](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=fbd1308317&e=a9d1410029))

With you in the fight,

Tracey Mann

P.S. I will continue to stand for Kansas as we move forward, and I will do everything in my power to ensure that our kids have a bright future. Please _[(click here)](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=6d6a794db3&e=a9d1410029)_ to donate today and help take our country back

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeff?=
subject: The KickOff Was Amazing!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
Come & Be Part Of A GREAT Team! | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-March 4 Vol. 2, #5**
---
| | |
##
4 March 22

**The Campaign KickOff Celebration**
Thank You! The campaign Kickoff celebration was a huge success. Nearly 70 people attended and over $5,000.00 was donated toward restoring our nation. It was one of the most multi-cultural and multi-generational events we’ve experienced to date.

Perhaps the greatest effect was that people were inspired and filled with hope. Many commented on the powerful conclusion as we sang God Bless America.

Jeff is deeply moved and inspired by the trust and support of so many. Just a few months ago, most of us were strangers and now we are friends!

**Gerrymandering Court Cases**
A major development occurred last week. The judge allowed the cases to challenge the gerrymandering to proceed to a full hearing. This is huge! It is expected that the cases will be decided around March 22.
**Next Steps** **Phone Calls**
Beginning next week, the campaign will begin training volunteers to use our online system to call voters. If you enjoy talking with strangers, you’ll love this. If you don’t like talking to strangers, you’ll love this. Why? Many people don’t answer their phones. If the call goes to voicemail, you can simply click a button that leaves a pre-recorded personal message from Jeff Warner to the voter. In our beta test, under 5% of voters answer the call. This means 95 times out of a hundred, you will leave Jeff Warner’s voicemail on their phone. Please email the campaign at [info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com](mailto:info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com) if you’re interested in getting trained and we'll email you our short quick-start guide. Training sessions last less than 30 minutes. The system is really user friendly. _You can live anywhere in America and assist the campaign since the phone calling is all web-based._

**Training Dates** (All by zoom-contact us for login info):
Tuesday, March 8, 10a-10:30a
Wednesday, March 9, 7p-7:30p
Thursday, March 10, 7p-7:30p
Friday, March 11, Noon-12:30p

The weather this weekend is going to be amazing. It will be a great time to get outside to waive signs and place door hangers in Laurel or around your neighborhood. You'll be amazed how much can happen in one hour.
We are asking our sign waivers and door hanger volunteers to serve for at least one hour this weekend. Be sure to take pics and forward them to info@JeffWarnerForCongress.com. Have fun!
**Sign Waiving**
You should soon be seeing people “popping up” waiving and holding Jeff Warner For Congress signs. We are targeting busy intersections especially during rush and lunch hours, schools (during drop off & pickup), shopping centers, sporting events high traffic areas, etc. We need get Jeff Warner’s name out.

**Door Hangers**
Door hangers is NOT door knocking. Even though the maps are still in the courts, we know that the communities around Laurel are the overlap areas. Simply get the word out. People will begin to talk. Jeff was at an event in Alexandria, VA recently and gave a business card to a man who had family in Silver Spring (perhaps his District). This area is very connected. Let’s get Jeff’s name and issues out.

Thank You for your support. The campaign continues to make and break records. Come and be a part of amazing team. Imagine how good it will be to say you were part of this team in November as we celebrate our historic victory!

[ **Donate Here**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=4a7684b2fc&e=12a37459a2)

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Standing with you,

Jeff
---
| [Jeff Warner For Congress Website](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=3592cb0d68&e=12a37459a2 "Jeff Warner For Congress Website")
---
|
---
| | | _© 2021 Jeff Warner For Congress, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
P.O. Box 634 Greenbelt, MD 20768

[info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com](mailto: info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=1a433d998e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=1a433d998e).

“MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION.” "MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION." |
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37b5a005a5b54d62a9b6c0ae68b3e0e4&_e=u_py8DPOc761_wal5CQB5UEzHTdGI61IWayWOrWIwpKkElw06KLZGdj8hfflCR50ATeqFPKPfVQM1nuQdeTPKt4fwiGD2JqH_lFnj7lRfZbvGMH-DSIT5nikTqtSRIucR6QDeXd9yjeavG4Vqb6jj6Nr2-aLh_VHFZaofJp9EwFEHbzlPjMUtvASNuVEde9wT3XbFIilpE8Bab74Axa6UhqpbEhrYSkl_eDgT7-U86hL1t4XO7n7sMCqrITxXLQ9JpIcP-cYtERnDYK9c2lsN86p6aVKL2FXTEc9PqGzzByU8oYdvimKllX8kh8ZBGCfYpZKEV44wDME18AWozTqqaPRuC8aJzxUsQR9ltUF-axR8llryxHIz6Ux2fbYx5WHeo4xNOjtR0j6FGGJx87MlbFGcXdu2UL2aNjseT8OMtlXjVBCKKF87XC7DQHm5VPa5caK0E_uSvtyK6gIurojNw%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

It's becoming clearer by the day that this Senate race in Georgia is going to be THE race that will decide control of the Senate.

But don't take our word for it. Recently our opponent sent out an email to let his supporters know CNN had named him the _**"MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION."**_

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37b5a005a5b54d62a9b6c0ae68b3e0e4&_e=u_py8DPOc761_wal5CQB5UEzHTdGI61IWayWOrWIwpKkElw06KLZGdj8hfflCR50ATeqFPKPfVQM1nuQdeTPKt4fwiGD2JqH_lFnj7lRfZbvGMH-DSIT5nikTqtSRIucR6QDeXd9yjeavG4Vqb6jj6Nr2-aLh_VHFZaofJp9EwFEHbzlPjMUtvASNuVEde9wT3XbFIilpE8Bab74Axa6UhqpbEhrYSkl_eDgT7-U86hL1t4XO7n7sMCqrITxXLQ92zVNf1kpfdnrzZC5LtS_eAchdv8aiuudqXO3rjW27-QpDzZ6Hit45tEThHnZKnvTNmFp1t3AUNaARQfJzhopP11qIVznZ9Stt7zyNb8-dLKgz4Punin57MULFVaTmzKWWrCfyTo8TMmMhJSwVtTX71OTlQNNGKMNvRmE56CRi04xKFNl6SElJwXNhBGeFzssNNW-3djCe9GuJC9YFHiKDA%3D%3D)
There you have it ... straight from our opponent's campaign. When we tell you how critical this race is, we really mean it.

According to recent polling, the race is too close to call. **[A Quinnipiac survey from last month had our campaign leading our Democrat opponent by ONE POINT- a statistical tie.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37b5a005a5b54d62a9b6c0ae68b3e0e4&_e=u_py8DPOc761_wal5CQB5UEzHTdGI61IWayWOrWIwpKkElw06KLZGdj8hfflCR50ATeqFPKPfVQM1nuQdeTPKt4fwiGD2JqH_lFnj7lRfZbvGMH-DSIT5nikTqtSRIucR6QDeXd9yjeavG4Vqb6jj6Nr2-aLh_VHFZaofJp9EwFEHbzlPjMUtvASNuVEde9wT3XbFIilpE8Bab74Axa6UhqpbEhrYSkl_eDgT7-U86hL1t4XO7n7sMCqrITxXLQ9CUatCVQW9mgSeev4jt6PLk6ZTUy_7lU8Zx0l6b3l-jBzORYXG5UWTFgbl17bLsNJVma5YIJIn7g0mJ3ouHbLlix2m8_h2973o---jbFz4K29DNUWYF8VYWnhoS4k01YEMUqWB5f3EoCcaDf8RyrDFf7KzZXCPHkQViG2qi3706oDJm_pwq3GtT7ddAUOvCObcoSL2fnhaKIYhuHbvruSBw%3D%3D)**

Fellow American, $7 or more today really would go a long way in helping us:
1. Register thousands of new voters across the Peach State
2. Reach persuadable voters who will be crucial to victory in November
3. Pay for airtime in expensive Georgia TV markets

In a race as close as the one we're facing, every dollar is make or break.

**[Please let us know we can count on you for your support today!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37b5a005a5b54d62a9b6c0ae68b3e0e4&_e=u_py8DPOc761_wal5CQB5UEzHTdGI61IWayWOrWIwpKkElw06KLZGdj8hfflCR50ATeqFPKPfVQM1nuQdeTPKt4fwiGD2JqH_lFnj7lRfZbvGMH-DSIT5nikTqtSRIucR6QDeXd9yjeavG4Vqb6jj6Nr2-aLh_VHFZaofJp9EwFEHbzlPjMUtvASNuVEde9wT3XbFIilpE8Bab74Axa6UhqpbEhrYSkl_eDgT7-U86hL1t4XO7n7sMCqrITxXLQ9tevoZMMmJgkt6ILWWcg4pWLtSZrCNTCHhKxGm7piUpeOzkrYKaNoYfSs2_ewY1JRMhGd9uxdHyE7-Dch6Mz0NtRgmU_KLs4QlH275hcz1uwGq6sU7gNsjn1BEhtpgT-lJdaoTrJR3KJL4hD5lDmnIYboa3lUs0Pt8ZemMbDH1cGYyrs4tlq0Kbnri4xDMRlF6S-tT-oFpy71uYyu3LlQoA%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37b5a005a5b54d62a9b6c0ae68b3e0e4&_e=u_py8DPOc761_wal5CQB5UEzHTdGI61IWayWOrWIwpKkElw06KLZGdj8hfflCR50ATeqFPKPfVQM1nuQdeTPKt4fwiGD2JqH_lFnj7lRfZbvGMH-DSIT5nikTqtSRIucR6QDeXd9yjeavG4Vqb6jj6Nr2-aLh_VHFZaofJp9EwFEHbzlPjMUtvASNuVEde9wT3XbFIilpE8Bab74Axa6UhqpbEhrYSkl_eDgT7-U86hL1t4XO7n7sMCqrITxXLQ9NbdR7EwRjRQKXPs82ivpIv-MYvpAv4K3CQYlkbeKf_q2fo4eZByJ0BG8TgNa3PUug-dfAVXw72peJSANXlS8NkZ8nfZk7Ce_S-7aWF_lcCF_kra7N48nd-ARYHSAyrY3JpHXU1N_Pxrf2q1Lw6IyH_kXz2_th9S11CkGSoXe7JhOk4LA2SCX1lqefhXRqlo3b0xkJL0ugnXT9msQilV1ig%3D%3D)

This could be a dangerous tipping point for our nation, friend. Donald Trump packed the Supreme Court with far-right justices who now **appear poised to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , threatening reproductive rights nationwide. **And now several GOP-led states are passing measures to restrict access to abortion, including right here in Florida. What's worse: Republicans even rejected an exception for rape, incest and human trafficking.
But there's hope: Congress can pass pro-choice legislation that finally enshrines reproductive rights. **I will always****fight for reproductive rights, which is why I****voted in the House to make _Roe v. Did you see my last email about Florida's anti-choice bill, friend? Things just got worse... The Florida legislature just passed one of the country's most EXTREME abortion bans – and we only have HOURS left to stop Gov. DeSantis from signing it into law. Reproductive health care decisions should be made between a patient and a doctor – not the government. That’s why I won’t stand by as the Republican Party tries to roll back the clock on reproductive freedoms by 50 years. But this anti-choice bill is currently on its way to the governor's desk, and I need 50,000 concerned Americans to stand with me and President Biden by calling on Ron DeSantis to veto it. clean_body: | | | | It Comes Down to YOU! www.votelindstrom.com Friends, What an exciting time to be a Nebraskan! We have been hard at work passing priority legislation, meeting with activists, business owners, and opinion leaders in every corner of the state. I am working hard to earn your vote in both May and November. I am most hopeful for my priority bill LB 825 to come up for final vote soon during this session of the Unicameral. This vital legislation will cut the implementation time in half for our massive tax cut on social security benefits. What a great blessing this will be for all Nebraskans! And we are just getting started! I am your proven tax-cutter in this race. That's where you come in. One of the big benchmarks of support for a campaign are the number of donors a grassroots campaign reports. This weekend is our Weekend Grassroots Blitz! With your help we will WIN! I am running for Governor to fight for YOU and to . I need your help to show the huge support we feel and see every single day. | | | | | | This is the time to join our team and take a stand for lower taxes and a New Generation of Leadership in Nebraska! We need just 37 more donors to hit our big grassroots goal! I know your heart is with us, but I need you to give even $1 or $2 to bring a New Generation of Leadership to Nebraska. Always fighting for you, Brett | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- Paid for by Friends of Lindstrom Campaign - 2437 S. 130th Cir, Omaha, NE 68144

body:
Abbott will flood Texas with attack ads, but we’re building the biggest organizing program this state has ever seen.
#
Here’s what we’re seeing in Texas.
Beto is igniting massive grassroots energy in every part of the state. He just won the primary race with more than 90% of the vote. And on top of that, over 53,000 volunteers have already signed up to join our fight.
But Greg Abbott plans to spend more than **$100,000,000** trying to drown us out.
**[Abbott will flood Texas with attack ads, but we’re building the biggest organizing program this state has ever seen — and we can out-organize his $100,000,000 if we raise enough resources. That’s why we’re counting on you to donate $3 or any amount you can spare today.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53676?refcode=ema20220304-178923&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=178923%2E444211%2EfNv6cb)**

This is shaping up to be the most expensive — and competitive — gubernatorial election in Texas history.
After all, Greg Abbott has price gouging corporate executives writing him massive six-figure checks, and that doesn’t even take into account the right-wing super PACs that will swoop into this election to spend tens of millions in the months ahead.
Beto isn’t taking a dime from corporate PACs. He’s running to serve the people of Texas, and in turn, we’re counting on grassroots donors to power everything we do in every part of Texas.
**[It’s officially Beto O’Rourke versus Greg Abbott in the race for the future of Texas. We need all hands on deck to fight back against Abbott’s $100,000,000. Will you make your first $3 gift now?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53676?refcode=ema20220304-178923&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=178923%2E444211%2EfNv6cb)**

Fellow Conservative, The far-left policies of Joe Biden and Susie Lee have led to one disaster after another.
* Their tyrannical vaccine mandates have cost millions of Americans their jobs.

* Their reckless Big Government spending has led to the highest inflation in 40 years.

* Their refusal to enforce our immigration laws has created the worst border crisis in American history.

* And their weak foreign policy has emboldened our enemies and led to catastrophes in Afghanistan and Ukraine.

Friends,

**_Good news:_**
**Our voices are finally being heard, and your donations are making a meaningful impact!** **_MASKS ARE BEING LIFTED ACROSS AMERICA!_**

subject: Biden said his piece. Now it's time for you to say yours.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DREW FERGUSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
I want to know what you think about the state of our union. I believe all American opinions matter, and I need to know what patriots like you think. |
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bd031c78c5cd4a84828633dbd8724b64&_e=fDaLmQoKrFWY3ke5JFYx-6EApBEERNobVtgSvPwPVZzMzjqyyfIVkeMxyTAKpCxNpmLZdP9Tk_3W9Qb2KhWsDqzOQUl7FQC1c9W1q2mmfKhqkYgY4GUmHkPmyCd_BOre3oVXOaj1gJbKznf2JVOHK4Sq-y0vwsbq5LQ1DPFXp-YuWOllQmNIFBr084oWPJZm_Dw3-7vT3Yajcd0A4IbFhKGwmDD_ADUkRGUtRc-XMdsqzVT5_5GYYbvmvS63mN5-5naEZgsyRvfi7iaVKYfcwidRRB26u62_BH-eHcf4wu2w-9WtaEbiZhGFxEuh5jBBctVIPiS7xkC8gFzn22uKm3_Be-JU5Hsc8V2GN-8x6dJgY_3mEYS2BnHzUgdPtSu7ov1EVExynzZM8mH9Bo9q6bXPu6cEX4f_b9lA3ykd9sCNGjsuw4iYlgjV15Z8JQz-SWEeP0S75VE_J0fAMIPdmuvBHxAeUFB0h_ragLs-0cDiWpztc5x9wTSD3TFC0j1WctJfRegb3HGTgDcMOZI-ftQiQPSqpjy-G9OiFg61y2pN6q94AvGo9L7Ju6LWAGC4LiGkWv0gy3mNN4dlZOUTQw%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

What does the state of our Union look like? The way I see it, just one year of Democrat rule has led to nothing but crises and suffering:

* $4 gasoline
* Foreign crises from Europe to the Middle East
* Runaway inflation
* Socialist spending policies
* Big government takeover

Peter, it would take me hours to go through all of the Democrat disasters. Right now, I need to know how Americans are feeling. **What do you think about the current state of our union?**

[**LEAVE YOUR THOUGHTS ››**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bd031c78c5cd4a84828633dbd8724b64&_e=fDaLmQoKrFWY3ke5JFYx-6EApBEERNobVtgSvPwPVZzMzjqyyfIVkeMxyTAKpCxNpmLZdP9Tk_3W9Qb2KhWsDqzOQUl7FQC1c9W1q2mmfKhqkYgY4GUmHkPmyCd_BOre3oVXOaj1gJbKznf2JVOHK4Sq-y0vwsbq5LQ1DPFXp-YuWOllQmNIFBr084oWPJZm_Dw3-7vT3Yajcd0A4IbFhKGwmDD_ADUkRGUtRc-XMdsqzVT5_5GYYbvmvS63mN5-5naEZgsyRvfi7iaVKYfcwidRRB26u62_BH-eHcf4wu2w-9WtaEbiZhGFxEuh5jBBctVIPiS7xkC8gFzn22uKm3_Be-JU5Hsc8V2GN-8x6dLnPZa1WFuZsSqnsPq-dZj9pyWEVBayDLRpdhqkbN05KpK1TfPxY8pXTVzl4kizQLmo51NaCeyeSEn2NK4djCnnDF8z-DCkGJkLlirIR-U8YpdNvyNEUh30fk-IK48YIKA6qdAmBUrEhS9rbLJfO9RyymIFCMu5uLOXjtgSUaFKQxleX4x_fLBrLJ6LkP55ctbR4Ub-pPc7UM69q1UVOo_uLbMiywUyIZTGdJvPEYRMOA%3D%3D)
_Joe Biden would want you to think that it's stronger than ever, when in reality, we have never been more divided._
Joe Biden’s address was a laundry list of issues and provided no plan to resolve them, nor did he even take accountability for the disasters he created.

And as a result, gas prices will get higher, the southern border will remain open, and more issues will continue to rise.

But I need to hear from my fellow Americans, like yourself, Peter. So please, [**will you take my quick survey to let me know what you think about the current state of our union?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bd031c78c5cd4a84828633dbd8724b64&_e=fDaLmQoKrFWY3ke5JFYx-6EApBEERNobVtgSvPwPVZzMzjqyyfIVkeMxyTAKpCxNpmLZdP9Tk_3W9Qb2KhWsDqzOQUl7FQC1c9W1q2mmfKhqkYgY4GUmHkPmyCd_BOre3oVXOaj1gJbKznf2JVOHK4Sq-y0vwsbq5LQ1DPFXp-YuWOllQmNIFBr084oWPJZm_Dw3-7vT3Yajcd0A4IbFhKGwmDD_ADUkRGUtRc-XMdsqzVT5_5GYYbvmvS63mN5-5naEZgsyRvfi7iaVKYfcwidRRB26u62_BH-eHcf4wu2w-9WtaEbiZhGFxEuh5jBBctVIPiS7xkC8gFzn22uKm3_Be-JU5Hsc8V2GN-8x6dKwg1wkgUbwJ1aMxTzcB0ELS809cxldOBda1x8gqfOiUkRoM7Xs9k7AAIMw-KMW42fcA-UNxyaLDBAKrz_1gTImEd2eessTIAk5UoX_uZCflOEM0gih2-M2csu0xhB8EouvipG8A8NLwb9_boUZUyWoRnBNwOm5wMRtBcRiFMKI7qrHOvVed9Z0qzF86kNBET60JN1_4zudWYFB_ARyd-n63Rr6ZhaPhC3KFws5MtNZpw%3D%3D)

For America,

Drew Ferguson

[**LEAVE YOUR THOUGHTS ››**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bd031c78c5cd4a84828633dbd8724b64&_e=fDaLmQoKrFWY3ke5JFYx-6EApBEERNobVtgSvPwPVZzMzjqyyfIVkeMxyTAKpCxNpmLZdP9Tk_3W9Qb2KhWsDqzOQUl7FQC1c9W1q2mmfKhqkYgY4GUmHkPmyCd_BOre3oVXOaj1gJbKznf2JVOHK4Sq-y0vwsbq5LQ1DPFXp-YuWOllQmNIFBr084oWPJZm_Dw3-7vT3Yajcd0A4IbFhKGwmDD_ADUkRGUtRc-XMdsqzVT5_5GYYbvmvS63mN5-5naEZgsyRvfi7iaVKYfcwidRRB26u62_BH-eHcf4wu2w-9WtaEbiZhGFxEuh5jBBctVIPiS7xkC8gFzn22uKm3_Be-JU5Hsc8V2GN-8x6dKXAX3aZbpEb8zgdLSKe5aRAmAFCAlDTCJO8ndlyv-DA2tLI04Z8uuGKkthRPw4c4ollRaouKpENUgrSgNUqDfI6mq6jCmryQEoxK8AmfkJei0z2WrYk6wfu5b20BzLoVwABJJilIwVXyh0z4IP7DEbFG8fTa-NHWGwZGUbHUNRDqDQ3uLRv4jYdBakf5WH-A5gkxZDy2HvDohV4Po_cowJY3wZ96HnOdtnikvzhoPqAA%3D%3D)

| Team, the AZ GOP recently filed a lawsuit with the Arizona Supreme Court to **_end all early voting and voting by mail in our state, including PEVL!_**

Since November 2020, the AZ GOP has tried every voter suppression tactic in the book. But after their fake audit failed, they are now desperately trying to end all early voting and all vote by mail on a legal technicality.

This is an insane voter suppression tactic that will undo three decades' worth of voting by mail and early voting here in Arizona. We have to push back!

**[Team, we need to mobilize opposition to this lawsuit and push back on the AZ GOP’s extreme voter suppression! Can you make a $10 donation right now to our Voting Rights Fund so we can help fight back against this extreme lawsuit?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z3LNGdjjp_6L5R-butU81DC_GBshmIF8mx9OFUrjz3ao0v_W3wogy16g38JFzGRSQbQVgJK_VRWYPGGP6JELKxa7_r2SWw5YKnd3tPYA65o_qdIptcfV_PvpGwhTCkWRonPH898d-f2UHdVZHu1LZ_01vIjXJSP5qF-ZcxUjvy8jqCHpiGWRv2nbcId6uqxd3u9GnrO09gYwrDdwP4ZVv1kb8Yiq4AtlNk-_kqemPpv4YmlLqDK9j-IcemcL-7qaP3oFBaH_BCtTolJedzpDRV-4FHG5tdQYCQInybMcOOSm323XxE39acq11AR8fGoaj3tt8QbZrb9HON2sV_NIu6nLkGearzOiLAm3iA92YUir3xQyFxUaR9HAhBkgzk1Kfuk2Zg-H2ARTIeWl0KHAc39EyworfOjXdCjbGv6yykplw5Ab2mf3m8BvcfNc3zQuDLNPqdEQA4D4VnklzrGAFcIab4m8KPvQdU5bMkRLl67w/3k2/BVA8k_u3SQWSkoIMtArHrg/h1/PkFOg9XXKiG7xeUdz9AB4qzrFgoqRnF4KX7IavQwfCs)** [

Since November 2020, the AZ GOP has taken more and more extreme measures to reduce voting rights. It started with their fake audit and initial voter suppression legislation.

Now, they are suing so that all voting happens on election day only – **which would disenfranchise millions of voters in Arizona!**

Voting early and by mail is extremely popular in Arizona and has been successful for three decades. But now that Trump lost, the AZ GOP is going to extreme measures to try to take away our voting rights.

_We have to fight back now – and flip Arizona completely blue in November – to stop this assault._

**[Team, can you make a $10 donation today so we can mobilize against the AZ GOP’s extreme voter suppression lawsuit?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z3LNGdjjp_6L5R-butU81DC_GBshmIF8mx9OFUrjz3ao0v_W3wogy16g38JFzGRSQbQVgJK_VRWYPGGP6JELKxa7_r2SWw5YKnd3tPYA65o82673lJqY35HCMvnSFrL3a_IpjLrdOC1T1auIZISk-6umB9y63_TY5BzryJAWawFMDZy7uYGk8PyYSfgS1Rn215-27fHK4a_1AEOkzrGqSee_uUN6XgUKZ0pbJFAXtdK-vd4d2Pw7fSkpJveGwyibW9kOKzqQ_0tAk3TXGzMCr7fayWJmTVmveo-m0UmM2pK8ArbJUImpTf-RL8ACz0KIxmeLUtcWazqHse5TZil3uyVaMY1rZsLkBkcJ5-DsbvcAJOez1EeHXCFYVeN4SZD-z-RGW7xzHdnh0DlHBudyMogGbmijaOPfE0UK1Tuv1G8Y9hSSQcdn3zMRkm7CErXb17d0DhiyZ2tCGikSulqWRb9A7qIFcqtpyIsAbXvCooIA/3k2/BVA8k_u3SQWSkoIMtArHrg/h3/AKX-x82E-59SbcA5k-1_ghwGbFWOkOS4MQ1unZQjw6U)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: End Northstar Rail Now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
Stop the Met Council | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=acac44958b&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | This past week, I introduced legislation to end the subsidies to fund the Northstar Rail.

Northstar has been a bad deal for taxpayers since the start and is nearly as bad as **[Sout](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=be82a76927&e=9d6926af69)[ hwest Light Rail which has billions of dollars of construction overruns.](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=d468a58355&e=9d6926af69)**

Northstar Rail now **[makes up less than 1% of the total ridership](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=9fb66ac4f3&e=9d6926af69)** of Met Council operations and by the **[end of summer 2021 on 26,000 rid](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=a44fe61b59&e=9d6926af69)[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=ad9c3fcdca&e=9d6926af69)[ ers had been](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=40801599cb&e=9d6926af69)** on the line.

On top of that, the **[Star Tribune reported](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=7aba1bfdf1&e=9d6926af69)** , **the public subsidy in 2020, the most recent figure available, was $97.34 per ride, according to Metro Transit.**

I outlined in my **[Day One plan how](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=120e469756&e=9d6926af69) **we can rein in the Met Council and as Governor, I will put an end to the wasteful spending on transit and **once and for all make the Met Council accountable to the people of Minnesota.**

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Will you endorse my campaign for re-election to the United States Senate?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
I am counting on you to be actively involved in this campaign.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42577322/333489807/396464211?refcode=em-logo&source=em220304-1-b&refcode2=193a9759-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=NbjoRSZrsZJy9RCiafoqIT1edzfPYggEALcoiusKFCSy7OnYDB5ahl8M2ZObMnUQuuAHdSzLuf0PHufXVZPwZA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTNhOTc1OS1mYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RP_oIY2nwDf-zBQDlov4iWxB2H_VQqvxrt-x_BxIGz8=)
Friends -
For four years I fought to protect Marylanders from the poisonous policies of the Trump Administration, including their attempt to take health care away from millions of Americans by repealing the Affordable Care Act.
Then, with President Biden in office, I was proud to help pass the American Rescue Plan and his historic infrastructure modernization plan, two measures that benefit families, communities and small businesses across our state.
But when I filed the official paperwork last week for my first re-election to the United States Senate, there was one thing I knew for certain.
I cannot win this 2022 campaign and hold the line for Senate Democrats alone. Standing up to the powerful special interests that want to get their way at the expense of the American people requires all of us to do our part.
That's why today, I'm asking you to do something different to show that you are a part of our fight to protect this democracy of ours and the common values we share as Marylanders and Americans.
[**Can you please add your name today to let me know you personally endorse my campaign for re-election to the United States Senate? We're looking for 1,000 signatures before midnight to show the incredible strength of this grassroots team.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42577323/333489808/-1468177639?source=em220304-1-b&refcode2=193a9759-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=NbjoRSZrsZJy9RCiafoqIT1edzfPYggEALcoiusKFCSy7OnYDB5ahl8M2ZObMnUQuuAHdSzLuf0PHufXVZPwZA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTNhOTc1OS1mYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RP_oIY2nwDf-zBQDlov4iWxB2H_VQqvxrt-x_BxIGz8=&emci=80345c53-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=193a9759-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=2216363)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42577324/333489809/-1468177639?source=em220304-1-b&refcode2=193a9759-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=NbjoRSZrsZJy9RCiafoqIT1edzfPYggEALcoiusKFCSy7OnYDB5ahl8M2ZObMnUQuuAHdSzLuf0PHufXVZPwZA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTNhOTc1OS1mYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RP_oIY2nwDf-zBQDlov4iWxB2H_VQqvxrt-x_BxIGz8=&emci=80345c53-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=193a9759-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=2216363)**
Covid-19 hit us hard. But since President Biden was sworn in, we've taken bold action to help Americans weather the storm.
Unfortunately, Mitch McConnell and the Republicans in the Senate have opposed us every step of the way. Not ONE Republican voted for the American Rescue Plan. And they will stop at nothing to regain control.
So make no mistake, every big issue we care about is on the line in this year's midterm elections. From voting rights to women's rights. From climate action to gun safety. From raising the minimum wage to cutting the prices of prescription drugs.
We need to take this moment seriously, and work to protect our democracy from slipping backwards. That means I am counting on you to be actively involved in this campaign. If you're with me, will you let me know by personally endorsing my campaign today?
[**Add your name today to let me know I can count on you in this fight. It would mean a lot to have your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42577325/333489810/-1468177639?source=em220304-1-b&refcode2=193a9759-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=NbjoRSZrsZJy9RCiafoqIT1edzfPYggEALcoiusKFCSy7OnYDB5ahl8M2ZObMnUQuuAHdSzLuf0PHufXVZPwZA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTNhOTc1OS1mYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RP_oIY2nwDf-zBQDlov4iWxB2H_VQqvxrt-x_BxIGz8=&emci=80345c53-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=193a9759-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=2216363)
Thank you for being a part of this team. I promise to continue fighting for you and your family every day.
Onwards,
Chris
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42577326/333489811/-1468177639?source=em220304-1-b&refcode2=193a9759-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&contactdata=NbjoRSZrsZJy9RCiafoqIT1edzfPYggEALcoiusKFCSy7OnYDB5ahl8M2ZObMnUQuuAHdSzLuf0PHufXVZPwZA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTNhOTc1OS1mYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RP_oIY2nwDf-zBQDlov4iWxB2H_VQqvxrt-x_BxIGz8=&emci=80345c53-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=193a9759-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=2216363)**

PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/80345c53-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/193a9759-fc9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTNhOTc1OS1mYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RP_oIY2nwDf-zBQDlov4iWxB2H_VQqvxrt-x_BxIGz8=&id=102988412), but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

name: Team Gansler
subject: Doug is committed to keeping our kids safe in schools
body:
This week, Doug wrote an op-ed in The Baltimore Sun about the need for school resource officers to keep our kids safe and out of the criminal justice system. Hi friends, This week, Doug wrote an op-ed in _The Baltimore Sun_ about the need for more school resource officers to keep our kids safe in school. Check out some of the highlights from the article below!
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDBwjo9JxMo4A0UPMsgBN9jnJtrGDH2jN_3KJ7CVX-jxVUOlIZZVTNRvuqBkLN6mKKhKFY0vXR6I-Zbvg9pO6AaEF9XSHBuJTkoVirlXTsI9II-Ec1JGjzEGSIx7Kt_DHW-N3mUqmH4HepeSYmv9QVWxUzAn36emjaH8QpAqoz5tFegEC67qXmmvksPHzkr65yHXqQDxVyywIitmRxCQAXa3pXLoP3cFgsFejKOdTVu8f_-HBRBCDNy4odH0-YE4T4UMMozlG2r4AA4hOlhCJGOAYyMTa5QNTyFMdkKt4cDwVLjsrvokSSHLeU1ha49nQ2EKJ0G3jZaqRgJnxyh4xeRlwLcXWghHzmXc7uS2oN6MyKqvX_XQlXYyUgYakmCTV1qSoY7xd0h5ZgRCJ9nZ_nqEhjKTtpNjzj0D47QwsS0x-fGFBmCTJaUhHBy17PFI9ugF8IzFPvWpzbdlZUPAHM2U/3k2/54C7QAxSRWy_QSXlY3-7jQ/h1/ZtSKgxTPsi1eL2WCV9CC8j2nkIV5tL2fI0gPRme-R1Q)

**SCHOOL RESOURCE OFFICERS KEEP KIDS SAFE AND OUT OF THE CRIMINAL JUSTICE SYSTEM; WE NEED MORE OF THEM** **By: Doug Gansler**
---
_"The number one job of government is to keep people safe. But the government has been failing to do its job in Baltimore. A recently-released report** ** revealed that the number one cause of unexpected death of Baltimore children is homicide... Guns are killing our young people, and kids who get into trouble at school are at greater risk of becoming murder victims themselves._ _That 's why the state should provide funding for more Student Resource Officers to help keep guns out of schools and to help students from falling into the criminal justice system._ _A world-class education should be the right of every student in Maryland no matter what their ZIP code. Baltimore needs more investment in its schools, and it also needs more investment in public safety. Because a child cannot learn, and a teacher cannot teach, in an environment that is not safe. And parents should not have to worry that they will never see their kids again when they drop them off at school. [...]"_ **[Read the full op-ed on the Baltimore Sun website HERE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6GHp7-0r6IA-x8_AatP4V2Q5XadvGSQ4JB8kyapqrSgWKGM4UXg7ApMiXjC0O4d1bEK-ApZLz4-v603JvQRZ13CiVoLhj3NmfHMdJHNG4ZLEYH_Lscsx4AbEJswLqTAYHIi5AphX8EuafUXSJg3KEtfnNHLkrPhYrr7WZOTRWZRRnkXsHH7qmG7WYgDPrdBlzaQW6dCgU07rAAQf5PP3dpq1HVZaQCOU-QVn-vEAmgLPJxYCoYGJlA_SGZOVSYhLW4tFcNEz702nDqQMUwGZu9IMkRZmOWYnbRT3bDKhb86UaDevG0pXFqWiCh-Ib8eYGtFa3xeGA6rNC3DgMxZ5ROvqkoBwRN4hXwruTYoqSc5UEtB-F-cTk9SZ-RDOJhtl-T2AiS-8Jafx9wCHTDdioZerBGqnEwVwiXS9u-LumNiyF_VmNcMINM81powQ-0bVZVC9x1ntLHqSFcCEoYXpHZjyVRAwmCcn2cQqg6TKH0iCOq2_APYzEAmbUhEQk5xODhvtURRneIicd2pgUgwItzKUX_3tVWZDQRvZSZcFIu1agv7WebVi-HyKXsutqWGQjOfsaEkSxxl6yU3vFnpuOAG4BlxBxNdlk_a9OQzMPoDvQVpbfm6Lr6fNH6URUwRa6-WMwz-uWJ-wiNz4rG_Df-gBJSgO8rKd-XoAo30opZQ0nrGVp4neWpf2CYQQo8sy8S0AbjI59eRhFNjT8OFPlFjz7UZ6aM-o6892xWXmyzDuieROi_HE6ZjL-LWEVcj6ddZvxbPFonOLqVh0sgAV67N6cFhyG04J5k4BrsG_Pzr1LFs57iqdGOfbnhEfhgOm3Apxn0xRC2efyioYYprsLiooTrXPNb6IK_-rvkKv5YJHB5-yPEKi2eY8Bk48_yD6zQ/3k2/54C7QAxSRWy_QSXlY3-7jQ/h2/GnpUnNF4Ib6J5ATnZYjh72hTbtCPdSogD7QxxeApdmE) and be sure to follow us on social media to keep up with all things happening on the campaign trail and beyond!**

name: Ralph Rebandt For Governor
subject: 10 More Volunteers Needed!
body:
Help us get signatures tomorrow!

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saturday_golf_show_help&n=1)
---
Friend -- The Golf Show in Novi today has been so successful so far! There are so many people willing to sign that we could use some more hands to get the maximum amount of signatures. We are expecting tomorrow to be just as busy, if not busier, so if you have a free hour or two tomorrow we would love your help! Our booth number is **615** and the hours are**9am-7pm**. The more people we have there, the more signatures we can get. Feel free to email Adam at adam@ralphrebandtforgovernor.com with any questions or to let us know you are coming, otherwise you can just come by the booth when you are available and we will put you to work! Thanks again! It’s events like these that will get Ralph on the ballot. Ralph Rebandt For Governor
[](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saturday_golf_show_help&n=2)[http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saturday_golf_show_help&n=3)
Ralph Rebandt For Governor · MI 48094, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/unsubscribe?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saturday_golf_show_help&n=4).
You can also keep up with Ralph Rebandt For Governor on [Twitter](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNOLWyCuYNiwV9ZFyY__b-ZA&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saturday_golf_show_help&n=5) or [Facebook](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6uhbeqVmbeXGs-kYC9NuYd-tJTgdOC5xFCeUG_TRnUZF&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saturday_golf_show_help&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saturday_golf_show_help&n=7), software for leaders.
