---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| RINOs IN FULL PANIC-MODE
---
| | |
---|---
|

The RINOs in the DC swamp are in full panic mode. Two weeks ago, disgraced former WSRP Chairman Chris Vance joined with his globalist liberal Republican buddies (who include several confirmed supporters of sexual deviants at the Lincoln Project) in DC to hold a fundraiser for impeachment voters Dan Newhouse and Jaime Herrera-Beutler via a virtual event. Just three days ago, another disgraced Republican and former Chairman of the Washington Mainstream Republicans, Mike Vaska, wrote an op-ed in the failing Seattle Times calling for [Republicans like you and me to be removed from the Republican party](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tOdgFdm4KTb_gA0KYcQ-4JH3Q0qBgvO6wn82KKw5oLC_oSsdE9qj1pyFWtiYPOv7Zf8CB9bjxTf6Kcy4qHsETcGAVJddm9aDFzNBC4V3Xa4XBLpzzuMgPUj6QG3rPupsfsa2tFiw5NVpb6g0M9_fxM1jGH-EvxDfH2NOnx605HMRkWJIk5KpsSLZE8iNDiSEfHnmqASmGXzDcpQbhfoRySlb5ra3P2a4&c=DWip6LpP3alZCIFwuUqQFTgSgcMuMU-pyLXWvhsbp6-8OY_IxsekoQ==&ch=wFhlan80zI60p3AiwRh_AfT2aUI69neXzQbqbo3dxKPkW59hNeDumw==). Of course, he didn't frame it that way. He framed it as Trump and those who support the President are somehow shills for Putin. So, here we go again: Russia, Russia, Russia. After all, the fear-driven Covid narrative has run its course and they need a new boogie man.

We need to change the name of the children's game, "Where's Waldo?" to "Where's Dan Newhouse?" The world is on fire and the President and Vice President he supported through his impeachment vote and his support of the January 6th Commission witch hunt is suspiciously missing. The Biden Administration is a complete disaster and Dan has found no opportunities to criticize the President or to call for him to be held accountable?

Why is that?

Well, maybe it's because he believes the same rhetoric as Mike Vaska and Chris Vance? Dan Newhouse and his friends in DC want to get rid of Republicans, conservatives, and patriots like us because we hold them responsible to do their jobs and follow their employee handbook: The US Constitution. Central Washington is the most conservative district in Washington State--a district I won by a mile over Jay Inslee in 2020. Washington Congressional District 4 deserves to be represented by a Congressman who shares the values of our community. You deserve to have a Congressman who understands that he is a public servant who works for We the People and is expected to lead from the front on their behalf.

The liberal Republicans in Washington DC have given Dan Newhouse over $500,000 in Special Interest money so far, with more on the way. Worse yet, Newhouse has deep connections to DC lobbyists through his wife, who is a DC lobbyist herself (you can't make this stuff up).

While Newhouse and members of his liberal Republican goon-squad like Vaska and Vance rely on corporate special interests, lobby money, and wealthy so-called "elites", I rely on the working-class men and women--the farmers, the truck drivers, the nurses, the small business owners. You are the very best of America.

If we are going to take our country back from the radical left and RINO goons like Newhouse, Vance, and Vaska and stop these people from selling our country out to those who hate us, we need proud patriots like you to step up and help!

[Will you contribute to stop Newhouse and these liberal Republicans?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tOdgFdm4KTb_gA0KYcQ-4JH3Q0qBgvO6wn82KKw5oLC_oSsdE9qj1iv4PulhTysIDibcbDAwhRFG5Heh-2EQszW1YMO2M4Hzt105Y_2PXDUoWkM9kad7uE3cLAfs2UD8yGIjr0SsxWQW7XfBjW7uHliiUpxI-OsfoSP3bnkK18bWHLduVWNbKmRAjuMn3UqwtEof2vHSoBRkuLPCbqN1KVppAQO6071aHF8VG_YZtKgbMx3t10YbUm7NnqtuYyYL&c=DWip6LpP3alZCIFwuUqQFTgSgcMuMU-pyLXWvhsbp6-8OY_IxsekoQ==&ch=wFhlan80zI60p3AiwRh_AfT2aUI69neXzQbqbo3dxKPkW59hNeDumw==)

Without your help, we may not have the resources to get the word out about our campaign and send Newhouse to the political outhouse. Your contribution will go a long way in the fight to take back our country.

In Liberty,

Loren

name: VoteVets
subject: $100,000 MATCH to CARE’s Ukraine Crisis Fund
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VET VOICE FOUNDATION
body:
We have some unexpected, extraordinary news.
#
Derek -
So far, more than 3,000 people have contributed $86,949 to Vet Voice Foundation over the last three days — money we will be contributing to CARE’s Ukraine Crisis Fund, aiming to reach 4 million with immediate aid, food, water, hygiene kits, psychological support and more.
But we have some unexpected, extraordinary news.
A VERY generous donor has pledged to match all donations up to $100,000 this week.
What that means is if we can raise another $13,051 before the end of the weekend, we are going to send a $200,000 check to CARE’s Ukraine Crisis Fund.
So please:

Fellow American,

We’ve got two questions for you today.
1. Do you think Vladimir Putin is a thug or do you think he is a good man?

2. In your opinion, should the United States slap Putin’s Russia with the most severe sanctions that any country can author?

The situation in Ukraine is obviously very fluid at the moment, but one thing we’re fairly confident about is now that Putin has invaded, a withdrawal doesn’t appear to be imminent in the coming days.

**As a former member of the Trump Administration, the United States Navy and a Black Republican running for the U.S. House** , taking 30 seconds to let me know what you think of the situation in Russia would really do so much in terms of how best to communicate with voters on this issue.

[** TAKE OUR PUTIN POLL>>**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=abb6c7be767b481a8ca588eb4ae0fe02&_e=pdXgxdvpmCskgW2vB51Bfn1C1Y2K9LPGcTEuA4kEM1nwwX2qyANezmUh7hJ7IjkUVfjlpD2NVMwHZXo7SVIebQpz3_zIWcuvDvJTdm61QS_QQoTikp1YwFLjfD8qbAulaxixINkPwZZxD59AodiX_81erPyzXPZxzefZOjEhaZJM1TEEDisEzaahcD8Z2WNhpBnC7ufQ_fXeCivG2Ws8rg8FM7aDpZs7v2ldnFMzdZr8YtWUZzbkCxCSTOsBWMc6ENH9Dx0ceUCi9koYYMl8hT9xApjBNzKVdghHINpBwgxksn6-ZfPWQtTRUTI0SCQZww6kr0uVOxhbmorwmfB3n3GhNZQVnByS1mw9BL6gXLvJN0dZ-eTVh_UTXXs-fiqc3xjG5YY60NPGrV-VRpF16bGCqQPHxuFK4wAIYdnEkD5-8NWULuOrEOUUA2RFJVJrXL3XIhm9P0VUNJqx5Soy-g9ORz_s3VgfwJ7Ui6Z0G9IeE01Tn9ICwNH57JwFItLrEFvW_RJF63wTPjNwggLIie8JilJzlt7N2Hg_McPq6Hkjt5MvHI4LnCcSPcTKLXL-p5gpJwgwudqoL9tzrzp3P1laYXz0IlYweB7HuK637UU%3D)

Thank you for your participation,

Rod Dorilás

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=abb6c7be767b481a8ca588eb4ae0fe02&_e=pdXgxdvpmCskgW2vB51Bfn1C1Y2K9LPGcTEuA4kEM1nwwX2qyANezmUh7hJ7IjkUVfjlpD2NVMwHZXo7SVIebQpz3_zIWcuvDvJTdm61QS_QQoTikp1YwFLjfD8qbAulaxixINkPwZZxD59AodiX_81erPyzXPZxzefZOjEhaZJM1TEEDisEzaahcD8Z2WNhpBnC7ufQ_fXeCivG2Ws8rg8FM7aDpZs7v2ldnFMzdZr8YtWUZzbkCxCSTOsBWMc6ENH9Dx0ceUCi9koYYMl8hT9xApjBNzKVdghHINpBwgxksn6-ZfPWQtTRUTI0SCQZww6kr0uVOxhbmorwmfB3n3GhNZQVnByS1mw9BL6gXLvJN0dZ-eTVh_UTXXs-fiqcOUaoh8SQFSRjAGH6d9DB8JQ0ED4GovP2T_vA2Rw7tm5uD3t5wp1xEjVYeyhU-TUm0s8cVRl-nVFjNfZanfXEQCtHVLIWdCG3zVkRbIe8HHclX5RV4iVrsKik0kru_1bW3zrGtCpu-un4LRzgY7vpjZLZVYLcaJ-GuxxBYJxvRJ8kS0DFfuhKqQmAnrPwf09uqVQO7AOK_md-RqTdvQDBL2qbLgbTsAKXVXFMTQ0K9ms%3D)

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: State of the Union

body:
Biden failed to acknowledge the crisis he created Friend, On Tuesday, Joe Biden delivered his first State of the Union address and made it clear he will continue to pursue the same failed policies that have created a crisis at our southern border. Despite Biden’s calls for “immigration reform” (he really means amnesty for illegals), the reality is this crisis is not about immigration. [**NO AMNESTY. SIGN THE PETITION**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=96d407a34ee14fe9b7c93a805d71e926&_e=GBbDFXAov7NdiWQgvMjzgmWDEqOvTr6kM53KnQbIfE_QT57Wi0ALtKqffL9yvn-NB2aeng9vcTHfRsOxJOsxsL0At_1kLqqV2BbXAHSe2MAOLgAaZ0zii8TCVjLWG0ZRE6131fRwoIYAnowCUaJKu5jpyC-uGbhHH4Vcl2P1-uP_93RFtrkarWBvRog7srNR9PD3uw4KflCq36t4TP_1yx-B79Ch1CXwarTrTKA2j9NV10xWL2opNl8xryOBT4KtADvrjp_2nIZp80Nb5erMgb9FGLbDoCOyLFr9Ihedy2sivg0U9qu8Tx9081VVqfj202k_pNIsnlpoSsb5PCjVkNqr93ku_oTufcA5V_DEDfEJsiyRDWWuNv8BswIxUKPle169JQQbq9otzPkyPU-ONZkYJnR-EHizUF0ZSXFhFmHj-MtY3aDdgkXGIMCW9BP7FocKbKMFFKW6Knoqx98VRQHhFXEijX9cVwI4H6KdShY%3D) **What we are witnessing is an invasion by human traffickers, drug smugglers, and the cartels who employ them. I know because they have taken over the area just south of my family farm. ** Joe Biden just doesn’t get it. He’s never had to raise children on a trafficking route. He hasn’t had a neighbor murdered and stuffed in a 55 gallon drum in the desert. He can afford to go to Delaware for weekends, ignore our border crisis, and pretend everything is fine while communities and families in Arizona suffer. Joe Biden won’t declare cartels as terrorists, finish the wall, or secure our border, but that doesn’t mean Arizona cannot. **We are facing an invasion, and we have a duty to protect our citizens. That’s why I am running to be your next Attorney General.** [**JOIN TIFFANY. STOP THE INVASION**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=96d407a34ee14fe9b7c93a805d71e926&_e=GBbDFXAov7NdiWQgvMjzgmWDEqOvTr6kM53KnQbIfE_QT57Wi0ALtKqffL9yvn-NB2aeng9vcTHfRsOxJOsxsL0At_1kLqqV2BbXAHSe2MAOLgAaZ0zii8TCVjLWG0ZRE6131fRwoIYAnowCUaJKu5jpyC-uGbhHH4Vcl2P1-uP_93RFtrkarWBvRog7srNR9PD3uw4KflCq36t4TP_1yx-B79Ch1CXwarTrTKA2j9NV10xWL2opNl8xryOBT4KtADvrjp_2nIZp80Nb5erMgYrCMditM7Qe4Z-IABtT9RFdr75kt0feSAgQb3gwDM-VtD4BQAbeUJ5GFx7O6Gs-z_n3BsoHvdvUbQIXtr03Ssj_rAxton_R4LvMolHZKyvj-AksWpIbvb8CNzpuymh6DLDu7IVy678teI_mLE4t_rwpdk-hwsURDvK1TxlZkBPt6xnc22RyBX27f7CokofsuCknS1hTpV9pNIe4sBJMu7U%3D) **The Cavalry isn’t coming. We are the Cavalry.** Let’s get to work and secure our border. Sincerely, Tiffany Shedd [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=96d407a34ee14fe9b7c93a805d71e926&_e=GBbDFXAov7NdiWQgvMjzgmWDEqOvTr6kM53KnQbIfE_QT57Wi0ALtKqffL9yvn-N05FRl70KAnP0yCNOhqFzlYWc9Pm93-jbeZRoAT-Vc-cnZSJAUOBc_gWUkxSLexkwaRCyWBIPmJp54ZMtN0o3rSYNOvoaXDcdSnfvit3Gw98iNhckK7eE3XO5hpB_svsqtvDpxcJriVXOytZg9qpulC8tyQbqyo4dy6XaUIMQVUGyquaMmj0oiGMA1t6PR0KubUrGptJVXxfsv09kvmDe3gVpaqX9cLXYKfPmhwDu2toarX-VKIgjvlPZXcE2z9duJE-OKeKJbzsd-ulEWptweanXFenBuaX9Yse1zL5fTOXcCC9n7zy2E5kCnZyYQZuZdu6VoXwM9hu5A5wWUtLb6Om-O7E8_TmStPvHJkGJ2NG7ulPTtXkNnj-kX-twgJiT-RW4IzR8s1N3H7BNf9wSijPVUpOf7_MXJU3d6uRdwRc%3D) Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Garrett=20Soldano?=
subject: Hollywood Celebrities and Big Tech Oligarchs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Gretchen Whitmer doesn't care about Michigan taxpayers. |
---
| | **Garrett Soldano here.**

_Big things are going on in Lansing this week Peter._

[Yesterday, the legislature passed a big tax cut for Michigan families](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=a6f5917f56&e=fe4b890356) \- finally reversing Governor Granholm's "temporary" income tax increase and lowering the business tax that has driven companies from our state.

This tax cut is just common sense, folks. With families suffering from 'Bidenflation' and with our state budget flushed with cash from the federal government, it just makes sense to **LET US KEEP MORE OF HARD-EARNED MONEY!**

It makes sense to you and me - but not Gretchen Whitmer and the tax-and-spend Democrats in Lansing.

_Whitmer opposes the bill and has refused to sign it._ In fact, Gretchen wasn't even in Michigan when this historic legislation was passed -__**_she was in hobnobbing with liberal elites in Beverly Hills at a high-dollar fundraiser._ **

**Who hosted her fundraiser? **_[Hollywood leftist Rob Reiner, Obama Ambassador James Costos, and former Google CEO Eric Schmidt.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=72b29815e0&e=fe4b890356)_

Gretchen Whitmer cares more about Hollywood elites and Big Tech oligarchs than hard-working Michigan taxpayers, families and businesses. It's time to put the pressure on and remind her who she's working for!
[**Add your name to our petition to tell Governor Whitmer: SIGN THE TAX CUT!**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=4a3aa26962&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [TELL WHITMER: SIGN THE TAX CUT!](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=ee38d46753&e=fe4b890356 "TELL WHITMER: SIGN THE TAX CUT!")
---
| Thank you for being a part of our movement to take back our state from silver spoon politicians like Gretchen Whitmer and give power back to the people, Peter.
---
| God Bless Michigan,
[](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=795bcba639&e=fe4b890356)
**Garrett Soldano**
Republican Candidate for Governor
---
|
---
| **_P.S._** \- You don't need a limousine and star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame to attend my fundraisers, folks.

Join me this Saturday at a [Meet & Greet Fundraiser in Portland](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7abc2b0b9b&e=fe4b890356) or next Tuesday for a [Fundraising Reception in Fenton.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=8e4e721262&e=fe4b890356)

_**P.S.S**_ \- Listen to my full interview with Steve Gruber where I discuss the state of this race and the strength of our grassroots campaign by [clicking below:](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=ae0e7c3f35&e=fe4b890356)

In a late night letter to supporters Obama pleaded for support by begging, "... if we lose [Nevada], Democrats will lose our razor-thin Senate majority." Peter, Obama’s donor network is the largest in the Country, and my opponent just tapped into his donors to save her struggling campaign. If we can’t keep pace with the money flowing in, we’re finished. | Obama wouldn’t be getting involved if Democrats weren’t worried about this seat. We defied the odds and made this race the most competitive race in the country. But now we’re up against the entire Democrat establishment and their network of coastal megadonors. Every Democrat and every ultra-liberal megadonor needs to know we’re not backing down from this fight to take back this seat and the Republican Majority. I’m a Soldier. When I announced this campaign, I made a promise that I would always be fully transparent with voters and supporters.

So here's the truth:

**Central Valley voters _know_ that McCarthy has been horrible, but our biggest obstacle is that many don't know I'm the viable Democrat running against him. **

**The good news is that we recently earned 100% of the vote from local Democratic delegates to be pre-endorsed by the California Democratic Party. This is a huge momentum boost, and it's a clear sign that Democrats are consolidating behind my campaign.**

We are coming up $9,141 short of where we need to be to stay on track for our weekly fundraising goal. If everyone reading this email chipped in just $10 right now, we'd meet our goal _instantly_. I know we can do this, but it'll only happen if we all step up and do it as a team:

McCarthy repulses voters here in CA-20. He's defined by how much groveling he does to Trump and how he refuses to hold the furthest-right wing of his party accountable. But to win this race, we have to talk about what WE are offering. We have to talk about real issues that matter to the Central Valley and find solutions.

That's exactly what we're doing, and it’s why we need your help.

**[Chip in $3 to help us reach more undecided voters>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42586237/333549247/-217444029?refcode=em-3.4.22-nopen-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjdjZTlhZC0yYTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hu2hc4D_WlgthPeolk7w9aobbhPnxs_PmVmgraz-yuE=)**

Marisa

subject: Dems want to fund the police...

...what about the last two years? [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=5e22d7b61bd04c3ca904fd0ad3d0126f&_e=A2xBkFE0jIX2R30hPhq8Swp_uhCdFfUx-lrKqn65jenzRLJh_4mtCR5U49I9u_ZfY6oMlrd0_t5dfX8bZyQkpmqBW1A2UgzH2kS7nWX4PzAf17bJHNEgm2mJ2GnCNmOWxD24hiQJtjOd_KV6kp_QpbaGR_LGB8gTTU50f163LtWLB9JqFYOL6qtX1wyu8-T8bnEaB6kAQZgUM6Z3SSFySTf11OZL35UdXSTg7BBx1aWJ_MxLOJA4GEgHk75SXq0mJ_N2cIpNb_me8AsRQPMjwG_Fw9l2dYk9-6wT1gdk91LVD5HPR6-UrMu01duWXI2thHk1N7bkEHa4UCIhlmT_e20PdXyxTpT6Ljt9-RB--VE%3D) My friend,
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=5e22d7b61bd04c3ca904fd0ad3d0126f&_e=A2xBkFE0jIX2R30hPhq8Swp_uhCdFfUx-lrKqn65jenzRLJh_4mtCR5U49I9u_ZfY6oMlrd0_t5dfX8bZyQkpl3PWy6rN5bOY_RpNa0GxxK5vdKt4Vm87cB3jcvUSkysrrMbFovYmvKJrSMX7cWUBnYoZWHnji4qT_x2RbHAqr_Sl423uvoNEgVcSvIr4sPJ9784Nol7gKLx2ez7vyuZXvcP2THMi5Eam5SdmEoNLeiNcJz2Fxh-7lO3R55MGHOWitoG1ZhEZJg2H7X8BSlCl29w280W35kq9BSFKPRXedrs-i58J9IufCmudyc5z9yfjd1neujGZ-oh-dVzmAr9kEp39igw_JbLFhyFyeJrJks%3D) Once again, Democrats are attempting to re-write history. After two years of the left demanding we defund the police, Joe Biden's announcement to fund the police was met with thunderous applause from Congressional Democrats. Those calls to defund the police began in Minnesota, to our regret. **[Rather than come to the aid of our overwhelmed police officers, Democrats decisively stood shoulder to shoulder with the protesters and rioters in their calls to defund the police.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=5e22d7b61bd04c3ca904fd0ad3d0126f&_e=A2xBkFE0jIX2R30hPhq8Swp_uhCdFfUx-lrKqn65jenzRLJh_4mtCR5U49I9u_ZfY6oMlrd0_t5dfX8bZyQkpmqBW1A2UgzH2kS7nWX4PzAf17bJHNEgm2mJ2GnCNmOWxD24hiQJtjOd_KV6kp_QpRZFJDcyDkefy6B1c6PqSzKm8s3opbJRpMkeIRYgpaglYdZhL4UI6bCcWtEOCxpUhcBPJLV7vIm5ht00rkCe9gPBgs34f9Gfp9WucFsokHb-z7hJCl5jMMrOHor0n_0Ca02njLKjzX5X4gM-r5fO2gQO7sjG8XWLK0W4uuDcwVuXirO6Uqvs_kWC0ll0IDKslRzk303_rZkwchaSD98OmDs%3D)**
We've seen the devastation and crime that these terrible policies enacted by Tim Walz and the Democrats have done. Minneapolis saw a spike in violent crimes and homicides not seen in decades. Fast forward nearly two years later — Democrats are applauding Joe Biden's request to **FUND** the police in his State of the Union address.**** It's just too much. Americans are suffering from whiplash after that plot twist. [_**We need real leaders who stand by our law enforcement through the thick and thin.**_](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=5e22d7b61bd04c3ca904fd0ad3d0126f&_e=A2xBkFE0jIX2R30hPhq8Swp_uhCdFfUx-lrKqn65jenzRLJh_4mtCR5U49I9u_ZfY6oMlrd0_t5dfX8bZyQkpmqBW1A2UgzH2kS7nWX4PzAf17bJHNEgm2mJ2GnCNmOWxD24hiQJtjOd_KV6kp_QpYdbHixeEe7---7jz2ov4EWRBBR-AHMC3R2iU6rK7l96ML7GlAsllTH3xY19dKPZ6Xeym5Ix6xAG-IS4hnDR5ll8E_Gv2zx952yLC71sK0Mq_hzwmtVOLUJSmYsXi8nqwLkBQq3PRiZK2i2aK0K74EjtQYJvf5iGAhXWhWCON53vF5dlcmJ8Bq5uNwwyGGByLkSMK6-FW3dMV7jyMKkA1w4%3D) [**Stand Up for Law Enforcement >> Chip In!
**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=5e22d7b61bd04c3ca904fd0ad3d0126f&_e=A2xBkFE0jIX2R30hPhq8Swp_uhCdFfUx-lrKqn65jenzRLJh_4mtCR5U49I9u_ZfY6oMlrd0_t5dfX8bZyQkpmqBW1A2UgzH2kS7nWX4PzAf17bJHNEgm2mJ2GnCNmOWxD24hiQJtjOd_KV6kp_Qpe3BJyqrAeULgYlKFLHVkDllHtBNUsB-75VkagRtabtc419GWYLmVkTozLmj3ZMmGwXyGddeKZqueWbIHAxVGuJZ_GwUA31u91xaipHfxSuLtLi3A0dnaxeG4sxsdu1A-WmuM5bE9M0S4jAngN4BQIkcL_QBVtCG7e5uIJkQ3ruNOkrHmBp850TiF_IZECHVJkv3vETPT1HMSHjdcgYE_YE%3D) As Senate Majority Leader, I worked closely with my Republican colleagues to ensure that our police were given the best opportunity to execute their responsibilities within our communities. We championed the Matson Strong bill, which strengthened penalties for those convicted of first-degree assault against a police officer. We stopped the Democrats in their tracks as they fought tooth-and-nail to remove qualified immunity. When the public worked to establish citizen oversight boards and remove police, we stepped up and put that movement to bed. Finally, to better incentivize our brave men and women to continue to serve, we passed pay raises for our law enforcement! As Governor, I will work to make sure that all law enforcement officers get the respect and resources they need. [_**I need your help to get the Governors seat so we can support our police officers and make our cities and state safe once again.**_](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=5e22d7b61bd04c3ca904fd0ad3d0126f&_e=A2xBkFE0jIX2R30hPhq8Swp_uhCdFfUx-lrKqn65jenzRLJh_4mtCR5U49I9u_ZfY6oMlrd0_t5dfX8bZyQkpmqBW1A2UgzH2kS7nWX4PzAf17bJHNEgm2mJ2GnCNmOWxD24hiQJtjOd_KV6kp_QpTQsoZBO3n6V0JLiOkR4vFYB_DJ2iQsj9tEgTwi87RbcBoENHjLogtycHY7ebernlA_5dFMazmfup4GaUjT-V_AKBCFRk-2-P1rwavHSbPyNGakSujpeu9tHrVqGZk0sLlPgAzoq2p5ZY_uhq2DZKjBn1AgkFGFTe6rXIn2RBFcIPeSm1zh9UvPjeSYtSo_iY8Y0kWnTIIZg0S8yKQtkCpM%3D) ##
**Send the Blue Wave to Texas!**
**Friends,**

We just took the first step in kicking Ronny Jackson out of Congress: we won the primary! Next, we are going to bring a BLUE WAVE to Texas to wash the corruption, QAnon Lovers, and wannabe authoritarians away from Washington.

I could not wait a minute longer to send you this email.

While millions of Americans are realizing that Joe Biden and the radical Left have brought our nation to the brink of ruin, I am working day and night to SAVE OUR NATION.

Everything great I've ever done is because of loyal Patriots like YOU, which is why I am pleased to invite you to join my _**[Inner Friend Circle.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59738404:JZoBn5E0N:m:1:3253819041:36DB82CF97D41550FFB6B541FC99836B:r)**_

I am only inviting a very small number of Patriots to join. Invitations do not come around often, Peter, so please do not take this lightly.

body:
Legendary Democratic strategist James Carville is ALL IN
| | |
---
Friend, political experts across the board agree: **Senate control will come down to Florida – and with Val Demings statistically TIED in the polls with Marco Rubio, there is zero room for error.**

**That's why legendary Democratic strategist James Carville is ALL IN on this battleground race – and he's asking you to join him:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42586547/333550137/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2564-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzk5YTNkYS0yYzljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xOujQxAnk34CSAPXE2UT6sxgG-Cx6x7bVVFPzqExAu0=)
James Carville knows that with Florida's last Senate race having been decided by just 0.12% of the vote, and polls showing Val Demings within the margin of error, this race will come down to resources. **Marco Rubio is _already_ sitting on a multimillion-dollar campaign war chest, so every fundraising goal, deadline and donation to Val Demings right now is truly make or break.**
The stakes simply could not be higher: If Democrats lose just ONE seat, Mitch McConnell will retake Senate control – so Republicans are laser-focused on doing _whatever_ it takes to defeat Val Demings. **They've already dumped tens of millions of dollars into on-the-ground organizing in Florida to flip this state red permanently and regain Senate control. **
Friend, if Val Demings is going to defeat Rubio and defend Democrats' Senate majority, she MUST hit tonight's midnight fundraising deadline – **but she's still $7,328 short, and with time running out before tonight's midnight deadline, she cannot catch up without your immediate grassroots donation.**
**[Please, rush $5 or more right now to stand with James Carville in this battleground race – whatever you can contribute will help Val Demings flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42586548/333550138/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2564-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzk5YTNkYS0yYzljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xOujQxAnk34CSAPXE2UT6sxgG-Cx6x7bVVFPzqExAu0=)**

As pediatricians, we are all driven to help our communities, and will take leadership on issues including expanding access to affordable healthcare, lowering prescription drug costs, and making sure reproductive health decisions are kept between a patient and their doctor.

| | | Hi there, [**I am the first woman and first gay person to run for Congress in WA-06. Protecting reproductive freedom and LGBTQ+ rights are personal to me. If you can, please contribute to my campaign now and help me win, so I can fight for our rights in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42586637/333550401/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmNjY2UyMC0yZTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwkZWVQp6OC4sXzfWGVbAw2TUnZpO-_CuZe9QOfIaC8=) Republicans in Texas and Florida are attacking LGBTQ+ rights and reproductive freedom. Texas Republicans are trying to reverse gay marriage through the Supreme Court the way they did with Roe v. Wade. clean_body: Are you with me? | Fellow Conservative, It is time to Take Back the House. | If the past year has shown us anything, it is that Joe Biden and his administration are unfit to run the country. Rather than focus on their real duties of looking after the best interests of the American people, they are forcing the Radical Left’s woke ideologies down our throats. If you can’t see the damage they have done so far, I will lay it out for you: Inflation is soaring throughout the country Our Southern Border is being flooded with illegal immigrants Crime is surging all across the country Do I really need to keep going? Everything the Biden administration has touched has failed miserably. The only way to fight back and stop this is to ensure we Flip the House RED. As it stands, the Democrats have the majority in the House and have been taking full advantage of their numbers by passing radical bills that only fuel their socialist ideologies. Their actions have done nothing to build up the American people. Instead, they are putting the American people further in a hole. God Bless, Yesli Vega Conservative Republican for Congress Virginia's 7th District | Military Wife. Mother. Law Enforcement Officer. | Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia Copyright © 2022 Yesli Vega for Virginia, All rights reserved.

|
# We are Taking Back America on the Centurion Team
With her sights firmly set on meeting as many people in the SC-01 district as possible, Ingrid is speaking in West Ashley, James Island and Kiawah Island this week. From small groups to large ones, she is out there telling the world about her awesome campaign. She is the champion this congressional district deserves. She’s been all over the Lowcountry because she wants to represent We, The People.

The Citadel Alumni for Centurion group meets at Andolinis Pizza, West Ashley on Monday at 6PM.

**March 22, 2022**
Ingrid speaks at the One 4 Coffee, 5PM, 114 Jungle Rd Edisto Beach. Join us for a great evening of information.
Click on flyer below to download.

**April 2, 2022**
Dorchester County Candidates Forum at the American Legion #166, Goose Creek.
Flyer coming soon.
| | | Find out more on Ingrid's [campaign website](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=ab2b4ba150&e=bb02dd73bf).
---
| Hi D. P.,

Our mission for March is reaching out to supporters like you and holding events to meet as many new people as possible. You can help me by attending and spreading the word about upcoming events and tell your friends I'm running for Congress!

Upcoming events you can help the campaign by supporting or attending:

3/5 \-- Honky Tonk - Bikers for Trump Rally, 1 pm
3/7 \-- SunCity GOP, 7 pm
3/10 -- Charleston Meeting, Harbour Club, 6 pm
3/14 \-- Andolini's Pizza, West Ashley, 6 pm
3/22 \-- One4Coffee, Edisto Beach, 5 pm

Go to the campaign **[Events](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=1fe7466f2f&e=bb02dd73bf)** page for details.

Are you a phone-aholic? We have the perfect opportunity for you! Contact us to sign up!

Its time for action! Would you like to host your first political party at your home - let's set up a Meet and Greet the Candidate at your home?

I look forward to hearing from you! My campaign hotline is [843-790-3890](tel:8437903890).

God Bless,
---
|
---
| **Ingrid Centurion
Republican Candidate for Congress, SC-01

_America First conservative Republican.
Entrepreneur, Army veteran, wife & mother_

_P.S. -- We need Republicans who speak, act and vote in the House the same way they campaign!_**

name: Team AOC
subject: AOC on MSNBC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
"How the world treats Ukraine, and Ukrainian refugees, should be how we are treating all refugees in the United States."
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220304-2841-header&t=1&akid=2841%2E2526796%2EfZEm-Y)
The eyes of the world have been on Ukraine these past few weeks. One million Ukrainians have fled the country, a tragedy that deserves the attention it’s receiving. But as Alexandria said on MSNBC, “How the world treats Ukraine, and Ukrainian refugees, should be how we are treating all refugees in the United States.”
The contrast between Ukraine and how we’ve treated refugees from Syria, Haiti, Afghanistan and other conflicts and disasters is wrong. But we can use this moment to straighten the crooked path. We can use it to finally push for a pathway to citizenship for all refugees in the U.S. with temporary protected status – far too many of whom have been living in limbo for decades.
[Watch Alexandria’s interview below, then call your representatives and ask them to support a path to citizenship for all those living under temporary protected status.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/call/support-path-to-citizenship/?source=em20220304-2841-P&t=2&akid=2841%2E2526796%2EfZEm-Y)
**[Call now →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/call/support-path-to-citizenship/?source=em20220304-2841-P&t=3&akid=2841%2E2526796%2EfZEm-Y)**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10423?t=4&akid=2841%2E2526796%2EfZEm-Y)
Because so many of you pitched in earlier this week, [we’ve raised over $75,000](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220301?refcode=em20220304-2841-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&refcode2=2841_2526796_fZEm-Y&akid=2841%2E2526796%2EfZEm-Y) so far for Ukrainian relief efforts.
We’re so incredibly grateful to all of you and humbled to see what our movement can do when we all come together when it’s needed most.
Together we can support those on the ground, amplify the call for equal treatment of refugees, increase the refugee cap to allow more victims of war to resettle in the U.S., and build our movement for peace.
With gratitude,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220301?refcode=em20220304-2841-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=6&refcode2=2841_2526796_fZEm-Y&akid=2841%2E2526796%2EfZEm-Y)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220304-2841-P_ENG_ANO_LEG&t=7&akid=2841%2E2526796%2EfZEm-Y)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=2841%2E2526796%2EfZEm-Y) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=2841%2E2526796%2EfZEm-Y) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=2841%2E2526796%2EfZEm-Y)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=2841%2E2526796%2EfZEm-Y)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=2841%2E2526796%2EfZEm-Y)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

subject: We got a lot of messages about this one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, today is
your last chance to get our new sticker!

Last week, we shared our winning Team Booker sticker design with you. Here
it is again, in case you missed it:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220304?refcode=em20220304-1625&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1625_346206_Qq_4y-&akid=1625%2E346206%2EQq_4y- ][IMG]

But right after we placed our final sticker order, we received a lot of
messages asking how to get one.

So we decided to open up our sticker promo again, especially for those of
you who asked (and those of you who may have missed it the first time
around):

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220304?refcode=em20220304-1625&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1625_346206_Qq_4y-&akid=1625%2E346206%2EQq_4y- ]If you make a donation of ANY amount today to Team Booker, we’ll send
you our limited edition Charles Booker 2022 sticker. Chip in now!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220304?refcode=em20220304-1625&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&refcode2=1625_346206_Qq_4y-&akid=1625%2E346206%2EQq_4y- ]Get your sticker!

Your Charles Booker 2022 sticker — on your water bottle, laptop, car,
notebook, anywhere — shows that you’re a part of this movement.

Every dollar raised from our stickers will go toward funding the critical
programs we’re running to reach voters in every corner of Kentucky, from
the hood to the holler. Because we know that individual contributions from
donors like you are going to be the reason why replace Rand Paul and turn
the tides of Kentucky.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220304?refcode=em20220304-1625&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&refcode2=1625_346206_Qq_4y-&akid=1625%2E346206%2EQq_4y- ]So whether you’re able to give $5 or anything at all —
every contribution is appreciated,
Peter. After you chip in, we’ll
send you our brand new campaign sticker so you can show off your Booker
pride everywhere you go!

Together,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220304-1625-footer&t=1005&refcode2=1625_346206_Qq_4y-&akid=1625%2E346206%2EQq_4y-

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1625%2E346206%2EQq_4y-

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

body:
**OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER** ****Katie Helps Kick Off the People’s Convoy**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=49c86daf4d0f479daa7a868659339098&_e=lMqRkmQInErBs818mkvBlIgjxWOXIbdKSjn33c6p6COGvVe8amwyv22rgo70ri0xX7DU7jcCoSFfjjCToq7kUqgGj6N1grFG3mUV86aaDTAyCQ1zRhYB1HT8oFiRV8wXwmBurk1Ir4PLbmMqnjVlO8Fmr55U2gO9LVi7aNQGFA-3e9TYhzketS-BUj3oWXsNNFpQMp2paK5hGTuSSU4cfbR-cAGvQoF5opmr704pMmOdlYYbBrY2uJFuRY0NCMKULVHP2IlDVnGzLqNIESNETjQjfMy9WZRI2PGSAONkdwH-jbC6By1aezGjZ15S5lgB) I was proud to help kickoff Alabama’s participation in the People’s Convoy ([Freedom Convoy D.C. 2022](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=49c86daf4d0f479daa7a868659339098&_e=lMqRkmQInErBs818mkvBlIgjxWOXIbdKSjn33c6p6CNr4MN4sftDm-yV_rGlHKeDP9JxFd9A_ziDhWnj4xDtVoH74Xk167ayxdeKN7wMUT16JS1gXT4lGMHdEqlMT_N20Khp3ToApPY8W_B1wW58GAF5ZnSWGQ7baGQwP6xZtXpQ6PJiIzJKEoVhhPcnQb5hKydM4QJn6ESYoT9DRw0aOZOZvMIeP8H8u7Ebr8GHXB1u3xJP0bpT43QM57ddsCHkoMNi-z9U0FGzIXEiviJd43BJJQI9zJ2gl2w0RnlS4NUh8Al7xRB_Y32XYg1AEjr159r9h8L8QlkhKH3SpZ8kuNtd4DzXmdVzdwJYivqlUo8UfNmOHxMHadqI2NzCLY4ZPcDyxYn2gX_QsSJpPad3VP7LJcQ_bxBLVXI4hkdH5aXsG-Pxq_OBofw2W8MO9g6sRM5Aa9qukJ7cM6gGuLVEHA5u69rwioCnP3eL2axZ03_yVBlMk6lzGA6Ygmx0WJD68ajv53m6WrXenFpL7WJYmw%3D%3D)) today in Cullman County! In the face of a federal government that wants to rule through fear and control, I will always stand up and fight for faith and freedom. We are happy to support patriots who are peacefully making our voices heard and defending our rights and liberties! [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=49c86daf4d0f479daa7a868659339098&_e=lMqRkmQInErBs818mkvBlIgjxWOXIbdKSjn33c6p6COGvVe8amwyv22rgo70ri0xX7DU7jcCoSFfjjCToq7kUqgGj6N1grFG3mUV86aaDTBBEJ6RDA__ymIHOx1wY8cYt0AK-zva_X846uGpw-9GXhQVPZFEbT8lsbeEZknEfAb7C3a8dftzNz7AGst6ZmUhsM88Yz14Tte1CQvw7KO0Bf7JbKhA3TE8CMzqJOn3rKsMWk-WKCO77ptCgY_iTOplb1SYnh0xy-0qLCg-eK8SA-VWimu3ljIqIMUlSb05vRzGIl2f26VYqCBy1Yj0fx3I) **VIDEO: Katie Promises to Preserve the American Dream** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=49c86daf4d0f479daa7a868659339098&_e=lMqRkmQInErBs818mkvBlIgjxWOXIbdKSjn33c6p6CO6pvalZfrLuFW7NI2vx3RLLOeXyaHgic8the38TcB7-UAveV8HB-Cd_RaQoNoYClFMwpvXVzzxzzwjQBYVqggCikyN8ewNRSTQH4Q76d-U8VgoY9u6pFgKQE3If4_XBXWBEKV_4fQg0LEff3wtg35poym-jl1E5-X2J3rYj_Wscm7JnbVEKQZBgx7EOFiLaVjkSuHUBUr_l12gauh_AcSArCzU-tr8JP-dph3kUBaF35PssXQ_LgSIH9Ssdo8wYkA%3D) Less than three months left until the May 24 primary, and we’re continuing to work hard every day to get our [#AlabamaFirst](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=49c86daf4d0f479daa7a868659339098&_e=lMqRkmQInErBs818mkvBlIgjxWOXIbdKSjn33c6p6CPQ4fAJBcLVfiDEPzFJ4Ub_YsVrmwZgZeTRpQo0ANHeCHplTo865ciwwBjNu1tuGy8rcInwnzXfRIHhQ46VzvRKYsx6vQQNYxv42tpOHuN5dbLEjO7vVFs8_-J3YJ5FBvlB5E-CD4rl_Aq-IdkG8m98fViF__aSLwfXJt-40lnymrNj3ioierygY0Cp1F0MtiA73ghT2eulBoCK39OrIfItazyvhfWiE3-nXZYz0olO-JFIC5M1AoHoCVU0Om_QKVa0bgbL-bloPtKq51psrXaXoeKYvgobecGdfttWQfyZ9A%3D%3D) message out. In the Senate, I’ll fight to ensure that zip code does not define opportunity for any Alabamian, so that the American Dream is alive and attainable for all! clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER **Katie Helps Kick Off the People’s Convoy I was proud to help kickoff Alabama’s participation in the People’s Convoy () today in Cullman County! In the face of a federal government that wants to rule through fear and control, I will always stand up and fight for faith and freedom. We are happy to support patriots who are peacefully making our voices heard and defending our rights and liberties! VIDEO: Katie Promises to Preserve the American Dream Less than three months left until the May 24 primary, and we’re continuing to work hard every day to get our message out. In the Senate, I’ll fight to ensure that zip code does not define opportunity for any Alabamian, so that the American Dream is alive and attainable for all! Katie’s Op-Ed on Israel As Alabama’s next United States Senator, I will strongly and unapologetically stand for Israel. Read my full thoughts below: NEW AD: America Needs More Christians in the Senate I'm proud to be a fifth-generation Alabamian whose great-grandparents founded our family's home church in Coffee County. This is where I first asked my Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ, into my heart. And it's where I still come to teach my children our faith and our values. Katie Slams Biden’s America-Last Policies The U.S. buys about 600,000 barrels of oil per day from Russia, sending $60 million to Putin and his oligarchs every 24 hours. That’s enough money daily to finance three days of their unconscionable war on the people of Ukraine. We’re seeing in real time that abandoning America First energy independence has vast economic, national security and humanitarian consequences. ## Don Jr. joins _Spicer & Co_...
After President Trump hinted at his plans for 2024 at CPAC, we had Don Jr on _Spicer & Co_ and got his take.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8c4db8232b&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | | | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Pelosi suggests Americans don’t understand Biden’s accomplishments, gets roasted](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8aecd565fa&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Fox NewsIf only we were all smart enough to understand 40 year high inflation, illegal immigrants flowing over our border, a botched Afghanistan withdrawal, Russia invading Ukraine, etc...
|
---
[Commerce Secretary Gina Raimondo is the designated survivor for Biden’s State of the Union](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c65abafe7a&e=f6564bbe3b) — via CNNAt least he picked an Ocean Stater.
|
---
[White House pushes back on Biden’s ‘Iranian’ flub by insisting he made a different gaffe](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=95db2c848e&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Washington Times
|
---
[The Biden administration is considering following Canada in baring Russia ships from U.S. ports, a government official said on Wednesday ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=eb70be2f7a&e=f6564bbe3b)— via ReutersThe US should be leading on these actions against Russia, not following.
| | | | | | |
---
## Celebrating 2 years of Spicer & Co...
Thank you to all our viewers, guests and team members for making this show what it is today. Hope you’ll continue to tune in.
| | | | | | |
---

Even worse , Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham is totally on board. She’s done nothing to stand up for the safety of our communities... In fact, one of her first acts was to remove the National Guard from the border and make New Mexico a Sanctuary State. It’s true: You’re paying taxes to our federal AND state governments,and they’re both turning a blind eye to the crisis at our state’s border. That’s why my very first TV ad of this campaign focused on the border crisis, and my plan to deploy the national guard and create a border strike force. It’s time for ACTION. But I need to know that you stand with me – this is too important to do alone: Please add your nameRIGHT AWAYand DEMAND that MLG and Biden finally step up to secure our borders. >> OFFICIAL BORDER PETITION EMAIL: STATUS: NOT SIGNED! Sign your name in theNEXT HOURto demand real accountability from our leaders in Washington & Santa Fe. Enough. Is. Enough. –Mark Ronchetti | | | Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. Please send checks to Mark Ronchetti for Governor. 8100 Wyoming Blvd. NE Ste - M4, Box 225 Albuquerque, NM 87113 Click to unsubscribe.

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2617%2E3611125%2El9FaC_ ][IMG]

The national Republican Senate campaign arm is afraid of
me, folks.

They JUST launched a new attack calling me “two-faced Tim Ryan.”

Well, that’s a new one.

The GOP knows this race will decide Senate control so they’re throwing
every dirty trick in the book at me. They’re only coming after me because
they know our campaign has the grassroots momentum to defeat whichever
far-right GOP millionaire extremist they finally settle on.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8367?t=1013&amount=25&akid=2617%2E3611125%2El9FaC_ ]The Republican attacks will only get worse, folks. Will you
chip in $25 or more right now to make sure we have the resources to fight
back and flip Ohio blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8367?t=1014&amount=25&akid=2617%2E3611125%2El9FaC_ ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8367?t=1015&amount=50&akid=2617%2E3611125%2El9FaC_ ]Donate $50 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8367?t=1016&amount=100&akid=2617%2E3611125%2El9FaC_ ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8367?t=1017&amount=200&akid=2617%2E3611125%2El9FaC_ ]Donate $200

We have a long road ahead of us if we’re going to flip Ohio blue, and
these petty attacks are just the beginning.

I’m fine with that—because it means our campaign is doing something right.

While my rich GOP opponents are propping up their campaigns with millions
of their own dollars and billionaire-funded super PACs, I’m fighting for
hardworking Ohioans who are sick and tired of seeing handouts for the

But attacks from outside groups like the NRSC are exactly why we’re trying
to get out on the trail and up on the airwaves. We have to get ahead of
national Republicans’ ridiculous lies and insults if we want to have any
chance of winning this race.

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, With great campaign stops with Senator Portman today, a county party endorsement, and events across the state, Jane continued to work hard every day to earn the vote of Ohio Republican primary voters. The campaign was also thrilled to announce its first broadcast TV ad of the cycle. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **The Real Trump Conservative** For the last five years, there is no one who has done more to advance the America First agenda, support President Trump, and help elect Ohio conservatives across the state than Jane Timken. While others in this race talk the talk, none of them walked the walk when Ohioans and President Trump needed them. Our campaign was thrilled to go on air with an ad that sets the record straight. [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=e2e161b626c8455ab971dd7ea2ef521e&_e=pf363iQwlkJTZMFGj_k-Nlbz_A98P1l_FEgLPIpkqvs0BppnHlGpPavcRodWxAFjlNltAAgBW9m6lQZRoGdPXVwgvX-ZtVF3F7SjPoqoTFGkQ-AVWnOxNmsdW9hWnFx1W7CyMj75dXfd8m6JTvVut-N2XX7QOUcjeX4yusNVhYqPxxxXVrNXy97BN8Fetq2pICKgJUoU-H68ozQVnHY3IUEGyUWttZQkkY5eZIL9KgjV559xVXg2vDT-6gonGBbQ4dYczTeT79IfjvigqlUPAiXZjMGKGZdwXTV_kJ4-SIw%3D)
While other campaigns have already spent millions on broadcast TV buys, this is our first of the campaign. The ad bolsters our unparalleled field operation and grassroots efforts on the ground in Ohio, which has already made over one million voter contacts.
**From the Trail**
Last Friday, Jane met with Scioto County Sheriff David Thoroughman and his officers to see the incredible work they do for their community. Jane will be an ally to law enforcement and keep our communities safe, starting by shutting down the border and the epidemic of heroin and drugs.
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=e2e161b626c8455ab971dd7ea2ef521e&_e=pf363iQwlkJTZMFGj_k-NtTvO_xgjCOvmYYK9gTvjWxFMzkxGPUO-HN2622HryLr4xPt3Bx1KxzPMmWF4KhAAFv4oBPTCrDIlXSrLsg6Qhkccm9aNYzYwti3x3RUlC-NwGmQ1ZpLkxIwHhtnTA_Y5N0Kq_G4dKbwhS98_xwx2g2mAb2AaAqWZouzOsqg-Lu9u0xBFmhUGZ8exdZbkmou3qYPuAfD_FQItooOgFLmz3TxxQ5P5ydYlBg_mrtOYQO9hPWQhfEm7s2qT37yzS68lFjsI1C4d8zu5IEaUeCofCS9OzBy78L_23sW_xBcMeEtHlnZrWYP_CmXp3tp3fTeCg%3D%3D)
Later that day, a group of supporters in Scioto County hosted a meet and greet to discuss the issues most important to Scioto County. Immigration, inflation, and the future of Ohio’s manufacturing workforce are top issues we’re hearing about across the state and in Scioto County.
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=e2e161b626c8455ab971dd7ea2ef521e&_e=pf363iQwlkJTZMFGj_k-Nu7hVFun2toC5Y7DSUQUg9pzNCk0b9230tTPnNWc0xSpo_rYPN--DL8qo27pDIYuxQqCNDWVyEeSgL0v18zH0iPczeiCjmMLJdBjP0SxPAPLAamZgRRvtPZXdXp8jNecP5-Hr_NmmSovlrQcyH4ZXUdfwtLpqNxRofYOvjUycviwBzOOlTaMtaeh9woDjwSP6kjaV0cAvpSgVZFpA72FZElMkWY1-3K_tDJLbGpW89UdlTtwJ7-iWmho8DgZTsSJIw%3D%3D)
On Tuesday night, Jane was thrilled and honored to receive the endorsement of the Madison County Republican Party. As Chair of the Ohio Republican Party, Jane worked hand in glove with county parties across the state and they know Jane will take that kind of leadership to the U.S. Senate.
**On The Road with Senator Portman**
Two weeks ago, we were thrilled to announce the endorsement of Ohio’s U.S. Senator Rob Portman. Senator Portman is a thoughtful, conservative leader who has served Ohio with distinction and not only were we thrilled to receive his endorsement, we were elated to have him on the campaign trail with Jane today.
With stops in Cincinnati, Dayton, and Columbus, Senator Portman fired up the crowds to support Jane’s America First campaign for U.S. Senator. Joined by several of the over 180 conservative leaders who have endorsed Jane across the state at each stop, Jane has built a winning coalition with a Senator who knows how to win this state. We appreciate all of Senator Portman’s support and look forward to hitting the campaign trail again in the future!

I hope everyone has a great weekend.
Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio

name: Wisconsin Senate Update
subject: not-so-great news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
**Good news:** Ron Johnson is in serious trouble. A brand-new poll shows he’s only viewed favorably by 33% of Wisconsin voters. And the most recent head-to-head survey shows Sarah Godlewski is the only Democrat who can defeat him.

**Even better news:** _CNN_ ranked Wisconsin as one of the top THREE Senate seats most likely to flip this November, and _The Washington Post_ called Sarah “the best chance to rid the Senate of Ron Johnson.”

**Now, here's the not-so-great news:** We're facing our first FEC deadline of the year at the end of this month, and our latest ActBlue report shows we've fallen significantly behind our first major quarterly fundraising goal.

We can't afford to come up short — not when Ron Johnson has more cash on hand than anyone in this race and Mitch McConnell's dark money network behind him. So we're asking:

**[Can you make a contribution to help get our fundraising back on track ahead of our first 2022 FEC deadline? name: Team Padilla
subject: Will you share your thoughts in our March Issue Survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
We want to hear from YOU!
#

**Your 2022 Issue Survey Record**
**March Issues Survey:** [**TBD**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/March-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220304-1-60&refcode2=670.159979.532gBS&akid=670%2E159979%2E532gBS)
**February Issues Survey:** _❌ - Did not complete_
**January Issues Survey:** _❌ - Did not complete_
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/March-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220304-1-60&refcode2=670.159979.532gBS&akid=670%2E159979%2E532gBS)**
Hi there,
As you’ve probably noticed, once per month or so Alex asks us to send out an email like this — to check in with our supporters about what issues matter most to you.
We review these results every time and pay close attention to how the results change over time, so we are asking once again:
[**Can you please take our March Issue Survey? We’re hoping for a lot of responses before we go over the results Monday morning.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/March-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220304-1-60&refcode2=670.159979.532gBS&akid=670%2E159979%2E532gBS)
Your input on these survey gives our team important information about how folks like you are doing — what motivates you to act, where your priorities lie, what you think about what’s going on in the world — all things that help Alex do his work in the Senate.
It means a lot to Alex and to all of us to know where you stand, so thank you in advance for taking the time to share your thoughts with us.
\- Team Padilla
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/March-Issue-Survey-2022-em/?source=em220304-1-60&refcode2=670.159979.532gBS&akid=670%2E159979%2E532gBS)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Curry?=
subject: Save The American Dream
body:
One Last Chance |
---
| | [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=9a6df5edd9&e=598f6aa24c)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

I am a product of the American Dream. When I was young, my Father lost his job. Shortly thereafter, we lost our house in a fire. When all seemed lost, the American spirit rescued my family, and I lived the American Dream.

Today, the American Dream feels like a past relic that is taught in schools, but far too many American families feel that they have been left out of that dream. After just one year of Joe Biden.s Presidency, the American Dream has been pronounced dead.

I am running for Congress because I will never accept that the American Dream is dead. I want to give every family in this country the opportunities to live to their fullest potential. This is not beyond our reach, but we need new leadership in Washington DC.
---
| [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=4c7cff4bc1&e=598f6aa24c)
---
| [If you want to restore the American Dream, Join my team Today!](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=09e60cafef&e=598f6aa24c)
Together we will put this country back on track and restore the ideals and values that made America Great! I can not win without you, and I need your support to restore the American Dream!

[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=a140af2fb8&e=598f6aa24c)
[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=60f13446f9&e=598f6aa24c)
[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=14cf4d2f23&e=598f6aa24c)
[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=8c32a2a754&e=598f6aa24c)
Thank you,
David Curry
---
| | **[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=61fc85b0a8&e=598f6aa24c)[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=e04e2326fd&e=598f6aa24c)[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=961ec70519&e=598f6aa24c)**

Peter,
---
There is a major, ongoing crisis at our southern border.
---
But during Joe Biden’s State of the Union speech, he dedicated just 115 words to talking about improved border security measures.
---
_**He spent more time talking about raising taxes on hard working Americans than he did about the most pressing issues facing our community here in southern Arizona.**_
---
We can’t continue to neglect our border security. I support a comprehensive, all-of-the-above approach to secure the border to stop drug cartels and human traffickers. This means putting boots on the ground, deploying new technology, and finishing the wall.
---
I need YOU to stand with me today so we can win this toss-up race and turn our southern border into an _asset_ rather than a liability.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution to support my campaign – and let’s FINISH THE WALL and SECURE OUR BORDER!**](https://links.ciscomaniforaz.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=7a77020b9b4e47c0aadfbe9164482910&_e=_-oPdiipj1XnSUNx55dAnFFkLzMN4s3b3ai_nzd-gtqsG5K7W-EMp9KaDjPw3ZrOxkJGNtQS2hYsSclBK33B7MM3pAxQi94Zw_bVE34OH0NBK8-l2M9BjnN-DqY3UO4CyENb0s_6dHjNnzarIlQzaO97CyRh-TNefkmO1MyITudjgHXk7yLlsNIQyb0hqwj_ZXmG6MaxdAsc7e62qtc6rRxshKcTDPUHOb82CKdGktuoPHjQkbQpJCMbcXMFOZcS34HSZw8KGb1880Fm4Vw9XuU7EuL0we1DVHEHkISbZReDRDq4mVZJRjtzxj2fri78bE5VRr-ICEZoQx6ch4I4yDpzaFrs9F9uQinj2oU-8CO2Aj_5QnVo1TuEH2HcbWAKZ-_NdiuY9F2F3J8D2PP6z7n3xKPQvt3KruZkq061BIGmhrzpLdUy4NQe2iO5hpupWFfmRVMx1LQsIos6TOp8VW8jX_FOgCE4Jx9SNfoQzUqDKYoa79Xwu4IVZ8IMn1t3ueahVSqzspsEA36FD3PpwA%3D%3D)

| Friends,

Mike Lee's [threat to shut down the government](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=b3493df575&e=10c1db3257) in this moment of international turmoil inhibits the safety of our friends and allies abroad as well as the safety of Americans. This shut down would halt defense, homeland security, and veterans affairs bills—a huge misstep at a time of uncertainty and war. Mike Lee does not work for the people of Utah or the people of our nation.

The last government shutdown cost taxpayers $24B. **Will you support our campaign with a donation of $24 now to help bring Mike home?**

It's time for more productivity and less obstruction.
---

body:
A huge step in veteran care!

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42583377/333514610/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDIwMzMwMi0xMzljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZ7XozN3_mZYgOdgE4owqy4u5BKl3CaOs0lcochtYOs=)

Peter, as Chairman of the House Committee on Veterans' Affairs, fighting for and advocating for veterans is one of my highest priorities.

**That’s why I’m so proud to say that yesterday the House passed a bipartisan bill, Honoring our PACT Act , which will take immediate action to support veterans who were exposed to toxic substances like radiation, burn pits, and contaminated water.**

I was so grateful to work with my colleagues, as well as comedian-turned-activist Jon Stewart, to get this legislation passed. But now we must ensure this bill passes in the Senate, too:

[**Peter, if you care the wellbeing of veterans suffering from cancers and respiratory illnesses as a result of their service to our nation, will you take five seconds to fill out my petition asking the Senate to quickly pass this bipartisan legislation now? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42583378/333514611/991998296?refcode=MTFC_20220304_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDIwMzMwMi0xMzljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZ7XozN3_mZYgOdgE4owqy4u5BKl3CaOs0lcochtYOs=&emci=303404b2-e59b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=40203302-139c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=18839602) | [15,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: TELL THE SENATE TO PASS THIS BILL NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42583379/333514612/991998296?refcode=MTFC_20220304_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDIwMzMwMi0xMzljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZ7XozN3_mZYgOdgE4owqy4u5BKl3CaOs0lcochtYOs=&emci=303404b2-e59b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=40203302-139c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=18839602)

Having just passed the House, now is our best and possibly only chance to get this bill signed into law by President Biden.

**These veterans are depending on us for the care they need and deserve!**

clean_body: A huge step in veteran care! | = Peter, as Chairman of the House Committee on Veterans' Affairs, fighting for and advocating for veterans is one of my highest priorities. That’s why I’m so proud to say that yesterday the House passed a bipartisan bill, Honoring our PACT Act , which will take immediate action to support veterans who were exposed to toxic substances like radiation, burn pits, and contaminated water. I was so grateful to work with my colleagues, as well as comedian-turned-activist Jon Stewart, to get this legislation passed. But now we must ensure this bill passes in the Senate, too: | Having just passed the House, now is our best and possibly only chance to get this bill signed into law by President Biden. These veterans are depending on us for the care they need and deserve! Thank you so much, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, our Democratic House Majority is seriously at risk. Fellow American,

Georgia Democrats are already spending some serious money online ahead of November's election.

And we mean _**serious**_ cash.

In the past two weeks alone, Senator Raphael Warnock and gubernatorial candidate Stacey Abrams have spent nearly _**$350,000**_ on Facebook ads targeting Georgia voters and raising money.

Last week, our opponent was the #2 campaign advertiser on Facebook in the ENTIRE COUNTRY - second only to the governor of Texas, who had a primary election this week. With the Texas primaries now over, our opponent will likely move into the #1 spot on the next Facebook advertising report.

Our opponent has serious resources at his disposal, there is no question about it.

**That means we've set a goal to raise $73,080 between now and this time next week** - the exact amount our Democrat opponent spent in the most recently available public report.

name: Travis Brimm, CheriBeasley.com
subject: Give me a chance to explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Our campaign is in a massive growth period right now.
#

I’m reaching out to ask you to make a $3 donation to our campaign to elect Cheri Beasley. But before I ask, I hope you can give me a chance to explain why it’s so important to have your support today.
After Cheri became our presumptive nominee, we immediately turned our attention to the general election and what we needed to do now in order to win.
That meant massively scaling up our campaign. Our plan is to run an organizing operation unlike this state has seen — one that touches every community in North Carolina and gives a voice to every North Carolinian – including those who have been left out and left behind.
We saw in Georgia that this is a big part of what Democrats need to do to win in the South, and it’s why Cheri said from day one that our plan would be to throw out the old playbook that has failed us in North Carolina.
We’ve nearly doubled our staff in the past two months, and we’re not even close to being done with hiring. Honestly, it’s just the start. But staffing this kind of operation — the kind that it will take to win — is expensive and requires more early investment than ever.
So that’s why your support right now is so important, and why I’m asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 donation to our campaign to help us hire more staff and build out our campaign? clean_body: Our campaign is in a massive growth period right now. I’m reaching out to ask you to make a $3 donation to our campaign to elect Cheri Beasley. But before I ask, I hope you can give me a chance to explain why it’s so important to have your support today. After Cheri became our presumptive nominee, we immediately turned our attention to the general election and what we needed to do now in order to win. That meant massively scaling up our campaign. Our plan is to run an organizing operation unlike this state has seen — one that touches every community in North Carolina and gives a voice to every North Carolinian – including those who have been left out and left behind. We saw in Georgia that this is a big part of what Democrats need to do to win in the South, and it’s why Cheri said from day one that our plan would be to throw out the old playbook that has failed us in North Carolina. We’ve nearly doubled our staff in the past two months, and we’re not even close to being done with hiring. Honestly, it’s just the start. But staffing this kind of operation — the kind that it will take to win — is expensive and requires more early investment than ever. So that’s why your support right now is so important, and why I’m asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for pitching in if you can. This is one of our best pick-up opportunities in November, and we must leave it all on the field to expand the Senate majority. \- Travis Brimm Campaign manager P.S. - Our campaign is in a massive growth period right now. | | This week President Biden gave his first State of the Union address. He highlighted the top priorities Democrats will continue fighting to secure — lowering health care costs, addressing the mental health crisis, tackling the climate crisis, and much more. But it's also worth zeroing in on what he said about taxes. When it comes to our tax code, Democrats are working overtime to level the playing field for working families, while Republicans remain committed to protecting tax cheats and slashing taxes for multinational corporations. That difference will be what this upcoming election is going to be about. **[Chip in now and stand with Democrats and working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42584002/333516417/-2044921950?refcode=2022-03-04-sotu&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a3ba9484-159c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2JhOTQ4NC0xNTljLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N-R7WA4xiPaOyeOxRucNWN7Ts2Q49LF26UYutIAqilk=)** We've been here before. We know that when Republicans are in the majority, they move mountains to cut taxes for their mega-rich donors, all while hard-working Americans pay taxes out of each paycheck. **Democrats are coming together to lower the cost-of-living for American families** – lower costs for health care and prescription drugs, child care, elder care, energy, groceries, household goods, community college, and so much more. We're going to close tax loopholes for the ultra-wealthy – and fund IRS tax enforcement to ensure they have the resources they need to hold tax cheats accountable. But we can only fix this if we're all pulling together in this fight for a Democratic majority in 2022. **[Chip in $3 now, and let's get the job body:
Our momentum is growing... THANK YOU for your involvement!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/3e971a56ac4a/grateful-for-your-support?e=daf3f68050)
Peter,

We’ll keep this quick – we just wanted to reach out today to say THANK YOU.

We’re grateful to have you on board, as we work to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene on May 24th and give our district an effective conservative voice and advocate in Congress again!

Our momentum is growing by the day. And last week, we kicked off our 90-Day Victory Drive to get out our campaign message far and wide and get the job done.
https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_thankyou?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_thank-you_20220221&utm_medium=Search&utm_content=thank-you&utm_agency=PG
Together, we can pull off a history-making upset to WIN this primary.

And together, we can help take back the House to STOP the Biden-Democrat agenda!

Thank you, again, for being part of our grassroots team.

- Jennifer Strahan & Team Strahan

P.S. If you can pitch in (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_thankyou?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_thank-you_20220221&utm_medium=Search&utm_content=thank-you&utm_agency=PG) $5 (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_thankyou?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_thank-you_20220221&utm_medium=Search&utm_content=thank-you&utm_agency=PG&amount=5) or $10 (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_thankyou?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_thank-you_20220221&utm_medium=Search&utm_content=thank-you&utm_agency=PG&amount=10) today, it will be a huge help. (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_thankyou?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_thank-you_20220221&utm_medium=Search&utm_content=thank-you&utm_agency=PG) Every dollar we raise will help us reach more Republican voters as we ramp up our efforts.
